body:
A must-read from Speaker Johnson on NJ-07.| | | I do not forward things often, Friend, but this special message from Speaker Mike Johnson to NJ-07 is important to re-share with you. Please take 5 minutes of your day to read every word from our House Speaker about the stakes of the upcoming election. Speaker Johnson is working around the clock day-in and day-out for folks in all corners of our great nation—and he has already made our district in NJ-07 a TOP priority. **This is a BIG deal.** Thank you and be safe, Tom Sent from my iPhone \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Speaker Mike Johnson**
Date: Thurs, Jan 18, 2024
Subject: Sharing my 2024 Outlook
---
| |
---
[](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=940a078a91414709bfd67f5002f3a095&_e=8HsxC8sGjgEPJgJRsnL5STfI2D09ClSrALi1SZk7QElUwjMCFGEPBZfO2bJiFAuuD3VDlttUZxZgAn6jqlaqZ90NT_COI6nIHpPbuVQIhfOZuwr7pIRDKWv6yPIqsasSsSNRFUp4hfUAQMFxK4neaV4R4oet7bYv8Abdtl8g_KipEE9AMA0tNcU82pLzx9HpRTwpY168GxiAHtLqDa_xGRndCtg4zugGins6XYW1tkEs74-6u_JKFK__fZH3SrAgBFaGk83QIn0LVRFR3IBNIFBhnRrLwVZY4p1MjF8A_1qqYPK5z2wyhH6zQ6FrGuqh0LkYccovfi893-hRPcNno0_2iL0EjgYUP-6v4-DTKOsI7_WiJlbhUbsG7mAjwSB5H7K55raWVNrO8he3jeaF7A%3D%3D)
---
| | Hi. It’s Mike Johnson—Speaker of the House. I am reaching out because there is a lot at stake right now concerning NJ-07 and we have no time to waste. On day one as Speaker, I asked my team to put together a list of the _MOST CRITICAL_ districts to keeping— _and expanding_ —our Republican House majority, and I want you to know: **_ Rep. Tom Kean, Jr.’s district in NJ-07 ranks in the TOP 5 MOST TARGETED. _** This means that Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left are going to be pouring MILLIONS of dollars and unlimited resources into this race.
---
| | [ **KEEP OUR HOUSE MAJORITY**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=940a078a91414709bfd67f5002f3a095&_e=8HsxC8sGjgEPJgJRsnL5STfI2D09ClSrALi1SZk7QElUwjMCFGEPBZfO2bJiFAuuD3VDlttUZxZgAn6jqlaqZ90NT_COI6nIHpPbuVQIhfOZuwr7pIRDKWv6yPIqsasSsSNRFUp4hfUAQMFxK4neaV4R4oet7bYv8Abdtl8g_KipEE9AMA0tNcU82pLzx9HpRTwpY168GxiAHtLqDa_xGRndCtg4zugGins6XYW1tkEs74-6u_JKFK__fZH3SrAgKf6MSVyOBsk53w2cU2PLK1kxFrpoACubAAjH7-9Yh5LBu6_vALaRvVejPZs_KwxYNxxpeXe3U1Mge94Jvo3B9wFCySd_nGRiICHFMTjtJwy31sDGtzmXhsEN9zNQSNUOl5essoQ7v8yqe62sIQiKdA%3D%3D)
---
| | Over the past seven years, my family and I have given everything to serve the extraordinary people of the great state of Louisiana—it has been the greatest honor and privilege of my life. Though my role has since expanded, my mission as Speaker remains the same: _God, family, and country._ **_I believe we need to unite as a nation._**_ __The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America._ **_I believe in America_** _—_ _The freest, most successful nation in the history of the world – but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the Radical Democrats force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._ **_And I believe in the law. _**_I’m a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life to fighting for our fundamental freedoms._ **_[I need you to understand that this Pro-America, Pro-Freedom, Pro-Law & Order mission can not and will not be built upon if Congressman Tom Kean, Jr. does not secure NJ-07 in 2024. If the Radical-Left takes over, you can bet it will be the polar opposite of the priorities I’ve just laid out.](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=940a078a91414709bfd67f5002f3a095&_e=8HsxC8sGjgEPJgJRsnL5STfI2D09ClSrALi1SZk7QElUwjMCFGEPBZfO2bJiFAuuD3VDlttUZxZgAn6jqlaqZ90NT_COI6nIHpPbuVQIhfOZuwr7pIRDKWv6yPIqsasSsSNRFUp4hfUAQMFxK4neaV4R4oet7bYv8Abdtl8g_KipEE9AMA0tNcU82pLzx9HpRTwpY168GxiAHtLqDa_xGRndCtg4zugGins6XYW1tkEs74-6u_JKFK__fZH3SrAgw4eXQkCEc6XYHSYJiSbaYmkrfFftkspqcQjz-b5KOPlVuQY5laeHOSY7Gb76xk4DRX4ikjo6nGMO12B2nsj1ppUFZfmuwnP2iqV3p8aqhBzqKktpdCjy2bK8QMDsiqIVVolb4GQ1evlVojwGp_F1cA%3D%3D)_**
---
| | [ **DEFEND THE HOUSE MAJORITY**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=940a078a91414709bfd67f5002f3a095&_e=8HsxC8sGjgEPJgJRsnL5STfI2D09ClSrALi1SZk7QElUwjMCFGEPBZfO2bJiFAuuD3VDlttUZxZgAn6jqlaqZ90NT_COI6nIHpPbuVQIhfOZuwr7pIRDKWv6yPIqsasSsSNRFUp4hfUAQMFxK4neaV4R4oet7bYv8Abdtl8g_KipEE9AMA0tNcU82pLzx9HpRTwpY168GxiAHtLqDa_xGRndCtg4zugGins6XYW1tkEs74-6u_JKFK__fZH3SrAgE0qmIIJKAYbzG8jh548H3llRfm1eq3sZeysXFnKmnS03pCNmGJKHLswc7oTFEjfZw7_f7qQeAi3V_0gVACFCUi_Dx4sXOJAse4xC3WxG2XgCQuj0QXJUaqNLxRzeSQ1yt6_Z9yFB5NqfzwOs3vbF4g%3D%3D)
---
| | The last thing I want to say here before I sign off is what a special leader you have in Tom Kean, Jr. Tom is a man of great integrity, is willing to work across the aisle to get things done for his constituents, and he fights relentlessly for the awesome folks of NJ-07. Thank you for your time. I’m honored to serve as Speaker of your House and **[**I hope I can count on you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024. Are you with me? Please rush in a contribution of any amount with just 3 clicks now. >>>**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=940a078a91414709bfd67f5002f3a095&_e=8HsxC8sGjgEPJgJRsnL5STfI2D09ClSrALi1SZk7QElUwjMCFGEPBZfO2bJiFAuuD3VDlttUZxZgAn6jqlaqZ90NT_COI6nIHpPbuVQIhfOZuwr7pIRDKWv6yPIqsasSsSNRFUp4hfUAQMFxK4neaV4R4oet7bYv8Abdtl8g_KipEE9AMA0tNcU82pLzx9HpRTwpY168GxiAHtLqDa_xGRndCtg4zugGins6XYW1tkEs74-6u_JKFK__fZH3SrAgqYayC-N_JeKh0GxQrrOi_k6zdBbHj1BZW5ZsfURvdvMQ8NFtSlyK-73dX09v8bAfVsXsquGDUoNurYmg590RBMxAxWT4BRiWuTK76bliv6aKfoLsWHwkSbRTq5ooYQdcwkNAMC6uLtPwliLkMTjLgg%3D%3D)** God bless,

name: Katie Porter
subject: re: a goal without a deadline is just a dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
This is the make or break point of our election cycle
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37046%2E3422442%2EdqHftn)
Derek,
_A goal without a deadline is just a dream._
It’s one of my favorite sayings, and it’s especially true when you’re running a campaign.
And here’s the thing, our fundraising deadlines this close to Election Day are especially critical—money coming in the door on March 1st isn’t going to go as far as dollars that come in right now. **The earlier we secure financial resources, the earlier we’re able to reserve ad time, which means we get better rates and better ad placements.**
This is the make or break point of our election cycle. Ballots are being mailed in just one week, and **with 20% of voters undecided, we have to get our message out there.** **[Can you help us meet our January goal by chipping in today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240127-2?refcode=em20240127-37046&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37046_3422442_dqHftn&akid=37046%2E3422442%2EdqHftn)**
**The goal is an ambitious $275,000, and the deadline is Wednesday, January 31st at midnight.** Anything you can give will help us get there.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gordon=20Ackley?=
subject: Wow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
Thanks to St. Croix and St. Thomas for making our voices heard. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/efc9f827de7e/re-hey-9343893?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,
What an incredible two days for the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands.

For those of you who didn’t show up, you missed a tremendous opportunity — regardless of who you may support for president — to engage face-to-face with someone who can help solve our profound challenges.

It was a distinct honor to host Congressman Wesley Hunt of Texas, who was sent by former President Donald J. Trump as his personal representative, at Commit to Caucus receptions Friday on St. Thomas and Saturday on St. Croix.

The congressman’s stumping across the islands attracted significant media coverage, both locally with WTJX and the Source covering it but also nationally.

And then there’s social media.

At last count, nearly 50,000 people have engaged a [social media post of Congressman Hunt in the Virgin Islands](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=f621f0e2e8&e=d30db4cde8). We couldn’t buy that kind of publicity if we tried.

In St. Thomas, we had a standing room-only crowd welcome not just the congressman but also Senator Alma Francis Heyliger, former Senator Adlah Donastorg Jr. and Derrick Callwood, who we hope to call Senator Derrick Callwood after November’s general election. It was great to also see Bruce Flamon, who has done a tremendous job at organizing our outreach to the West Indian community.

Meanwhile, St. Croix. Wow. What can I say.

Women’s Leadership Committee Chairman Valerie Stiles and her co-chairman, Barbara De la Portilla, did a superb job.

The gals (and guys) turned out to welcome Congressman Hunt. I also appreciate the continued efforts of Colonel Johann Clendenin, our national committeeman, to unify the party. After all, the goal of our party is to defeat Democrats and win elections. Period. From president down to the V.I. Legislature and even the Board of Education. To see all of coming together is great.

We were also honored to have former Senator Nellie O'Reilly and 2022 candidate Ron Pickard in attendance.

Friends, our fellow islanders are starting to take notice.

With Democrats lock step behind Sleepy Joe, the [Republican caucus on February 8](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=ce84e08b9a&e=d30db4cde8) is the only vote for president that Virgin Islanders can cast in 2024.

The February 8 caucus is a huge opportunity.

I’m not beneath asking for your help.

I need you to show up. I need you to bring a family member, neighbor or friend to the polls.

This is our one and only chance as Virgin Islanders to make our collective voices heard.

What say you?

Please Commit to Caucus. You can pre-register to skip the line on February 8. [Simply click here and fill out the brief form](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=f2be8a4342&e=d30db4cde8).

I have been here my whole life. We have such a unique opportunity in less than two weeks’ time.

It’s up to you.

Are you going to stay home or are you going to send a message by voting in the caucus on February 8? The choice is yours.

I hope and trust you will choose to be hard.

Onward, together,
Republican Chairman Gordon Ackley
---
| | **_Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
www.republicanpartyinthevirginislands.com_**

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=5e58e42c29) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=5e58e42c29).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&afl=1)
---

Fellow Conservative,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**_With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought._

ALWAYS.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.

Does that surprise you?**

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio. | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gordon=20Ackley?=
subject: Wow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
Thanks to St. Croix and St. Thomas for making our voices heard. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5ab655a379db/re-hey-9343897?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,
What an incredible two days for the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands.

For those of you who didn’t show up, you missed a tremendous opportunity — regardless of who you may support for president — to engage face-to-face with someone who can help solve our profound challenges.

It was a distinct honor to host Congressman Wesley Hunt of Texas, who was sent by former President Donald J. Trump as his personal representative, at Commit to Caucus receptions Friday on St. Thomas and Saturday on St. Croix.

The congressman’s stumping across the islands attracted significant media coverage, both locally with WTJX and the Source covering it but also nationally.

And then there’s social media.

At last count, nearly 50,000 people have engaged a [social media post of Congressman Hunt in the Virgin Islands](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=47307984a2&e=d30db4cde8). We couldn’t buy that kind of publicity if we tried.

In St. Thomas, we had a standing room-only crowd welcome not just the congressman but also Senator Alma Francis Heyliger, former Senator Adlah Donastorg Jr. and Derrick Callwood, who we hope to call Senator Derrick Callwood after November’s general election. It was great to also see Bruce Flamon, who has done a tremendous job at organizing our outreach to the West Indian community.

Meanwhile, St. Croix. Wow. What can I say.

Women’s Leadership Committee Chairman Valerie Stiles and her co-chairman, Barbara De la Portilla, did a superb job.

The gals (and guys) turned out to welcome Congressman Hunt. I also appreciate the continued efforts of Colonel Johann Clendenin, our national committeeman, to unify the party. After all, the goal of our party is to defeat Democrats and win elections. Period. From president down to the V.I. Legislature and even the Board of Education. To see all of us coming together is great.

We were also honored to have former Senator Nellie O'Reilly and 2022 candidate Ron Pickard in attendance.

Friends, our fellow islanders are starting to take notice.

With Democrats lock step behind Sleepy Joe, the [Republican caucus on February 8](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=608bfede86&e=d30db4cde8) is the only vote for president that Virgin Islanders can cast in 2024.

The February 8 caucus is a huge opportunity.

I’m not beneath asking for your help.

I need you to show up. I need you to bring a family member, neighbor or friend to the polls.

This is our one and only chance as Virgin Islanders to make our collective voices heard.

What say you?

Please Commit to Caucus. You can pre-register to skip the line on February 8. [Simply click here and fill out the brief form](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=5d83051b15&e=d30db4cde8).

I have been here my whole life. We have such a unique opportunity in less than two weeks’ time.

It’s up to you.

Are you going to stay home or are you going to send a message by voting in the caucus on February 8? The choice is yours.

I hope and trust you will choose to be heard.

Onward, together,
Republican Chairman Gordon Ackley
---
| | **_Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
www.republicanpartyinthevirginislands.com_**

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=69bdc0ddfe) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=69bdc0ddfe).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&afl=1)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My dad, Boca Eddie
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| When my dad was raising me and my brother Dan, he taught us to believe that even when times are tough, you always make sure to give back to your community.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5234%2E5257348%2EKwnMzG)
Hi Derek,
You may remember I mentioned my father, who we affectionately call Boca Eddie, the other night while I was up on the debate stage. I want to take this opportunity to tell you a little more about him.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240127_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5234%2E5257348%2EKwnMzG)
Originally from Boston, my father left high school early to join the Army at the end of World War II. After his service, he used the GI Bill to attend the University of Alabama but left early to get started in business. He chose the _schmata_ — or clothing — business.
As a traveling salesman, he was earning $18,000 a year. At that time, on that _single_ income, my parents were able to purchase our first home for the same amount – **_$18,000_**.
Can you imagine that today? Buying your first home for the same salary you made that year... let alone as a salesman? Achieving such a feat would be _impossible_ in today's economy.
Too many Californians just can’t keep up with rising housing costs in the Golden State. It’s why I’ve worked in Congress and alongside local leaders to help combat California’s twin crises of homelessness and housing affordability. Everyone deserves the opportunity to have a secure and affordable place to call home, and it’s something I have been focused on for years, and hope to address even more powerfully in the Senate.
Because here’s the thing. When my dad was raising me and my brother Dan, he taught us to believe that even when times are tough, you always make sure to give back to your community. He taught us to stand up to bullies. And he taught us to not back down _even_ when facing tough challenges.
These ideas have guided me throughout my entire life.
I found myself reflecting on his guidance during Donald Trump's presidency, reminding myself not to yield to intimidation. Ultimately, I realized that bullies are, in fact, **_cowards_**.
With my dad’s good advice in mind, I took on Donald Trump and held him accountable for his abuses of power, and now the Justice Department is able to bring him to justice for his many violations of the rule of law.
I’m running for the United States Senate because everyone has the right to a roof over their head. And all Americans should be able to put food on the table, and afford medication. And they shouldn’t have to live in fear of a would-be dictator taking away their rights and freedoms.
My commitment to you is to keep up the fight for working families just like the one I grew up in. To uphold the great lessons my father taught me – **to do what I do best.**
**[Now that you’ve learned more about my upbringing and what motivates me, I hope you will chip in to my campaign to bring these values to the Senate.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240127_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=5234%2E5257348%2EKwnMzG)**

| | |

Republicans are clearly coming after us. The path to the Senate AND the White House runs through Nevada, and they’re throwing everything but the kitchen sink at us to try and flip Nevada red. Trump even insisted the GOP would "win the swing state of Nevada...and take back the Senate" in November.

Minutes ago, Donald Trump went on the attack and praised my opponents at his MAGA rally in Las Vegas, and it was UGLY. I had to reach out to you immediately because I desperately need your help. Republicans are clearly coming after us. The path to the Senate AND the White House runs through Nevada, and they’re throwing everything but the kitchen sink at us to try and flip Nevada red. Trump even insisted the GOP would "win the swing state of Nevada...and take back the Senate" in November. It will only get worse from here. I won’t back down – but I need you with me.= | | = If we don't act ASAP, Trump and far-right Republicans will do anything they can to mislead voters and turn them against us. Believe me – if Trump succeeds in flipping Nevada red, we have no shot of keeping our Democratic Senate majority OR the presidency. Recent polling shows me neck and neck with my far-right opponent, so we don’t have any ground to lose.= I’m glad that I can count on you. Thank you in advance. – Jacky | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. = You can also to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help. Privacy Policy

subject: Josh Hawley’s base is abandoning him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
His former mentor even said supporting Hawley in 2018 was “the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life”
#
Peter — **Josh Hawley’s base is abandoning him.**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43211?refcode=em20240127-4691&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4691%2E614464%2EGqqpsq)**
**FIRST —** After his actions on January 6th, Hawley’s former mentor — Missouri’s three-term GOP U.S. Senator Jack Danforth — said supporting Hawley’s campaign in 2018 was **“the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.”**
**THEN —** Approval polling showed Hawley underwater with voters. _Morning Consult_ even found that Hawley is the least popular GOP U.S. Senator running for re-election this year, with numbers _even lower_ than Ted Cruz and Rick Scott.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43211?refcode=em20240127-4691&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4691%2E614464%2EGqqpsq)
**NOW —** Even Donald Trump says Hawley’s in trouble...
_“So interesting that the Democrats are looking hard at the Senate races in both Missouri and Texas. Josh and Ted must be very careful, stranger things have happened!!!”_
**Republicans and Democrats agree: Our state deserves better than a fraud and a coward like Josh Hawley representing us in the U.S. Senate — and we’re ready to vote him out this November.**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43211?refcode=em20240127-4691&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4691%2E614464%2EGqqpsq)**

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: have you seen this, Pro-Life Friend?
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Tonight, I’ve been going over our current financial situation as we begin our 2024 plans. . .

And I’m afraid we will have to cut up to one million dollars from our key programs if I don’t have enough funds and resources to keep them going.

We’re also not matching our 2023 fundraising goal and it’s concerning, Pro-Life Friend.

**[This is why it’s so important for you to fill out your _Students for Life_ _SUPPORTER BALLOT_ right away so you can tell us what programs you’d have us cut](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdhlily-duchtdja-y/).**

**_But I can’t bear to make such a big decision right now without hearing from you first.**_

I’m also forwarding the email I sent you a few days ago detailing our programs and where you’d advise us to make cuts.

Once you’ve read through it, **[will you please be sure to fill out your _SUPPORTER BALLOT_ right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdhlily-duchtdja-j/)?**

Thank you so much for your continued support as we head into what could be the most critical year for the pro-life movement and _SFLAction_ so far.

Sincerely,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

— _Begin Forwarded Message_ —

Pro-Life Friend,

I’m not going to sugarcoat this: _2024 could be the most critical year the pro-life movement has EVER faced._

The Abortion Lobby and their pals in the press are already busy writing the pro-life movement’s obituary – _as if everything that will happen in 2024 has already been decided!_

Pro-Life Friend, with everything _Students for Life Action_ has on our plates right now, I’m facing some very hard choices.

**As I write to you, I don’t have the money to fund all the admittedly, ambitious plans _Students for Life Action_ has laid for 2024.**

And if that doesn’t change quickly, I’m going to make cuts to our key programs.

That’s why, as one of our most trusted supporters, I need your IMMEDIATE advice . . .

I’m counting on you and a handful of other supporters to fill out their _Students for Life Action_ _Supporter Ballots_ to tell me where to make cuts.

There are several key areas that are essential to success in 2024 I might have to cut back on if I can’t raise the funds to support them. As it currently stands, I have four options:

**1. _Youth Voter Outreach_**

One of the best things we’ve been able to do in recent years is turn droves of young people away from the Abortion Lobby and towards the Pro-Life Movement.

And as a result, a whopping 10-15% of pro-abortion/on-the-fence young people leave the pro-abortion camp with every campus we visit!

In fact, a recent YouGov Poll we conducted showed that **two thirds** of young voter’s support limits on abortion. Not only that, but only **1 in 10** young voters hold the same extreme abortion views as the radical Democrat Party Platform, and **9 in 10** completely reject the Biden administration’s reckless chemical abortion policies.

This is supported by a recent _Rolling Stone_ article I read titled “Biden Bleeds Younger Voters,” which shows that the President now trails in several key swing states because young people are souring on him _en masse!_

_I knew this would happen._

During last year’s referendum fight in Ohio, we were able to convert pro-abortion young people to the pro-life side for just $12 per voter.

The problem is we just couldn’t raise enough money to WIN!

The results were a tragedy for Ohio.

I can’t bear to see the same thing happen to our country.

Pro-Life Friend, our programs reaching out to young voters could not be more crucial as we move closer to the elections this fall, as they will be the future of the Pro-Life Movement.

But, if you think we should pull back on our efforts to tell young people the TRUTH about abortion, then mark: **“STOP TURNING YOUNG PEOPLE AGAINST ABORTION”** on your _Supporter Ballot._

**[STOP TURNING YOUNG PEOPLE AGAINST ABORTION >>](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdhlily-duchtdja-i/)**
**2. _State Legislative Battles_**

Since _Roe v. Wade_ was tossed onto the ash heap of history, the Abortion Lobby has been ramping up its efforts at the state level to push its radical abortion agenda.

State battles are our quickest path to saving lives at the moment with Republicans in Congress currently cowering to the Abortion Lobby.

In fact, media elites were ENRAGED earlier this year when studies showed that at least 10,000 more Texans were born in 2023 than expected.

They’re actually angry these babies weren’t killed! In one article, they blamed a shortage of diapers in America on the pro-life movement. Are you kidding me? _Make more diapers! Don’t kill more babies!!_

Well, I want to give them so much more to be mad about.

We’re engaged in several battles as I write to you – _including in Nebraska, Kansas, Indiana, South Carolina, and New Hampshire_ – but it’s not just legislation we have to worry about.

Radical pro-abortion state referendums are increasingly becoming a threat even to states with pro-life protections already in place.

Pro-Life Friend, these referendums are intentionally written with ambiguous language to confuse voters and allow legislators to define them in a way that permits abortions throughout all nine months of a pregnancy and forces taxpayers to pay for abortions.

In 2024, I’ve gotten word that the Abortion Lobby is trying to force referendums in several states including Maryland, New York, and even Florida!

And Pennsylvania and Virginia are being eyed by the Abortion Lobby for radical referendums down the line if upcoming legislative elections go their way.

If you think we should ease up on our fight against the Abortion Lobby at the state level, including our fight against radical abortion referendums, then mark: **“STOP FIGHTING STATE BATTLES”** on your _Supporter Ballot._

**[STOP FIGHTING STATE BATTLES >>](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdhlily-duchtdja-d/)**
**3. _Vote Pro-life First_**

One thing we found out in the wake of Ohio’s abortion referendum passing was very shocking: _30% of people surveyed who voted FOR Ohio’s pro-abortion referendum stated that they believe that Life begins at conception._

**What could cause such a thing to happen?**

Well, there are two main reasons that a self-proclaimed pro-lifer would vote for a radical abortion referendum:
*** As I said before, these referendums are intentionally written with ambiguous language to confuse voters; and

*** _Not all pro-lifers vote pro-life first_.
That’s why our _Vote Pro-Life First Campaign_ is designed to eliminate this problem and convince pro-lifers that ending the violence of abortion should be their #1 priority when it comes time to cast their vote.

In years past, we’ve had tremendous success helping pro-abortion Democrat politicians and cowardly Republicans “retire early” by getting voters in their districts to pledge to vote pro-life first and oust anyone who doesn’t stand for Life!

And in 2022, we engaged to ensure pro-life U.S. Congressman Ted Budd won his U.S. Senate race in North Carolina. We launched an all-out targeted digital advertising campaign toward half a million youth voters aimed at eliciting direct pledges to “Vote Pro Life First.” We showed this audience 8-10 tested, messaging ads each & chased their replies. By election day, we had 42,000 pledges to vote pro-life first.

When the smoke cleared, Senator Budd won by just 3.2%, a 121,000 vote margin. On a shoestring budget, the 42,000 pledges we garnered because of your support covered over 1/3 of the spread in this key U.S. Senate race. At a cost of just $1.13 per vote.

This program must be central to our efforts to elect pro-lifer leaders across the board in 2024, but the one thing I need to make this a success is pressure.

But, I can’t put pressure on politicians without grassroots support.

_And I can’t gain grassroots support without the necessary resources to travel to battle districts, knock on doors, send texts, make calls, and host Lobby Days._

Though, if you want me to dial it back and let the pro-abortion politicians remain in office just give me the word by marking: **“STOP YOUR VOTE PRO-LIFE FIRST CAMPAIGN”** on your _Supporter Ballot._

**[STOP YOUR VOTE PRO-LIFE FIRST CAMPAIGN >>](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdhlily-duchtdja-h/)**
**4. _DON’T CUT ANY PROGRAMS_!**

There is one way for me to run all our life-saving programs at full-steam this year and put us in a strong position heading into the 2024 elections: _I fund all of it!_

**But that’s a big ask, Pro-Life Friend.**

I’ll have a difficult enough time funding one or two of these programs, let alone ALL of them!

I want nothing more than to keep my foot on the gas all the way through election day this November, but I won’t be able to do that without the generosity of good folks like you.

If you truly don’t want to see any cuts made, then mark: **“RAMP UP ALL OPERATIONS. GO ALL-IN”** on your _Supporter Ballot,_ **[and then follow that up with your most generous contribution of $250, $100, $75, or $50 right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdhlily-duchtdja-k/)!**
**[RAMP UP ALL OPERATIONS. GO ALL-IN! >>](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdhlily-duchtdja-u/)**
Pro-Life Friend, there are no easy choices.

With so much on our plates, I’m afraid it will take a massive influx of resources to fully fund even **_ONE**_ of our major programs.

So, I’m counting on you to tell me where to focus, and where you’d have me cut back.

As a 100% donor-supported organization, _Students for Life Action’s_ programs are determined by what we can raise.

They’re determined by the generosity of good folks like you all over the country.

That’s why I’ve decided to come to you for advice today.

I need you to make this call and tell me where to focus.

Of course, you probably already know my preferred choice, especially with everything that’s at stake right now . . . _I want to WIN!_

But I can’t bear to make such a big decision right now without hearing from you first.

So please, **[click here to fill out your _Students for Life Action_ _Supporter Ballot_ right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdhlily-duchtdja-o/)!**

**[And, once you’ve filled it out, please agree to your most generous contribution of $250, $100, $75, or $50 right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdhlily-duchtdja-b/).**

Your advice and a **[generous gift of even $25 or $10](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdhlily-duchtdja-n/)** would mean the world to me.

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

P.S. – I have some very important decisions facing me on where to focus our resources for 2024 – _decisions I can’t make without hearing from you._

So please, **[click here to fill out your _Students for Life Action_ _Supporter Ballot_ right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdhlily-duchtdja-p/)!**

**[And if possible, please agree to your most generous contribution of $250, $100, $75, or $50 right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdhlily-duchtdja-x/).**

Your advice and a **[generous gift of $25 or even $10](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdhlily-duchtdja-m/)** would mean the world to me.

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-sdhlily-026154D2-duchtdja-c) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-u-sdhlily-duchtdja-q/)
**

**
---

If you truly don’t want to see any cuts made, then mark: “RAMP UP ALL OPERATIONS. GO ALL-IN” on your Supporter Ballot, ! Pro-Life Friend, there are no easy choices. With so much on our plates, I’m afraid it will take a massive influx of resources to fully fund even ONE of our major programs. So, I’m counting on you to tell me where to focus, and where you’d have me cut back. As a 100% donor-supported organization, Students for Life Action’s programs are determined by what we can raise. They’re determined by the generosity of good folks like you all over the country. That’s why I’ve decided to come to you for advice today. I need you to make this call and tell me where to focus. Of course, you probably already know my preferred choice, especially with everything that’s at stake right now . . . I want to WIN! But I can’t bear to make such a big decision right now without hearing from you first. So please, ! . Your advice and a would mean the world to me. Thank you for everything you do for Life. For Life, Kristan Hawkins President, Students for Life Action P.S. – I have some very important decisions facing me on where to focus our resources for 2024 – decisions I can’t make without hearing from you. So please, ! . Your advice and a would mean the world to me. Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization. | **

Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDI4LTNjYTA4Y2ZmMTk4YTRiZTA4NWUyZmUwNTgxNjgxZjQwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3dlbGNvbWUuaW1iLm9yZy9wcmF5X2Zvcl9taXNzaW9uYXJ5X2xwLmh0bWw_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1wcmF5X2Zvcl9taXNzaW9uYXJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXRydF9BRV9GQUxSNDU5MzUifQ/snsFn79l4lT38-spZHM9Ig)
---
Dear Fellow Believer,

There are so many challenges that missionaries face today:

Language. Culture. Customs. Finances. Housing. Visas. Homesickness.

But at the top of every missionary’s list when asked how to help is the need for prayer.

“Please pray for us!” is the plea of missionaries all over the world.

That’s because they recognize it is only through God’s power that they can overcome the obstacles they face and break through darkness with the light of the gospel.

Praying for missionaries is one of the best things we can do—not just for their sakes, but for ours. When we pray for missionaries, our thoughts are focused on the spiritual needs of people groups all over the world, and our hearts are aligned with God’s desire to give them abundant life.
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDI4LTNjYTA4Y2ZmMTk4YTRiZTA4NWUyZmUwNTgxNjgxZjQwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3dlbGNvbWUuaW1iLm9yZy9wcmF5X2Zvcl9taXNzaW9uYXJ5X2xwLmh0bWw_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1wcmF5X2Zvcl9taXNzaW9uYXJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXRydF9BRV9GQUxSNDU5MzUifQ/fVm1bHmaw--TcPZNUjWpdA)
---
I’m hoping that by doing so, it will ignite a desire to make it an ongoing habit.

If you can spare a few moments each day for one week to lift up the needs of men and women who are bringing the gospel to unreached areas, we would be so grateful!

For the next seven days, we’ll send you an email telling you about specific missionaries to pray for and the ministry they are doing. Will you help in this way?

**If so, go here to start receiving prayer requests in your inbox for the next seven days:** [https://welcome.imb.org/pray_for_missionary_lp.html](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDI4LTNjYTA4Y2ZmMTk4YTRiZTA4NWUyZmUwNTgxNjgxZjQwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3dlbGNvbWUuaW1iLm9yZy9wcmF5X2Zvcl9taXNzaW9uYXJ5X2xwLmh0bWw_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1wcmF5X2Zvcl9taXNzaW9uYXJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXRydF9BRV9GQUxSNDU5MzUifQ/uVd5H8FodGFpr_qC9bI4Zg)

On behalf of the missionaries that you will be praying for this week, thank you! Your prayers are more valuable than you might realize!

God bless you,

Emily Hall

name: Your America
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39516%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6Uua2qhtHpcwOxjibrEkcA&sysid=1) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39517%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t520Mio%2boerNaMXPrf6X%2fQ&sysid=1)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39517%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t520Mio%2boerNaMXPrf6X%2fQ&sysid=1)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9859%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=jshh6P3O6F4ayS4R08nOXA&sysid=1)

name: American Briefing
subject: Sinners and Saints
body:
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
While in exile, Dante wrote one of the greatest epic poems

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuecrfqverfbou6qgso45rs5nmnpjh9jp6qhoop8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or1cph2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow citizen,
Over 700 years ago, Dante Alighieri was exiled from his beloved Florence. Stripped of his property, he spent the rest of his life as a guest in foreign places.
While in exile, Dante wrote one of the greatest epic poems, _The Divine Comedy_. Taking an imaginary journey through the three realms of the afterlife—Inferno, Purgatory, and Paradise—he encounters old enemies and cherished friends, crooked politicians and great statesmen, infamous sinners, and holy saints.
The result is a profound education in character, as the poet learns how to order his soul to lead a free and happy life. And _The Divine Comedy_ is a delight to read.
**This is why Hillsdale College has produced an online course, “Dante’s _Divine Comedy,_ ” about this monumental work of literature. **
---
| | And now, the course about this timeless masterpiece is available on DVD for your home library, Bible study, or book club.
You can receive the DVD of **“Dante’s _Divine Comedy_ ” **in a handsome box set for a gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale and its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, like free online courses.
We**** produce our free online courses, as we do all of our work, without accepting ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
Our work is entirely dependent on the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0h374ioadgf3e7n2u53j173412gjcar7qpek4m0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or1cph2bs)
---
| | With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of Americans in online courses, as well as reach and teach increasing millions for liberty. Please support Hillsdale’s educational outreach on behalf of liberty and receive your DVD of **“Dante’s _Divine Comedy_ ” **by giving your best tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today using this secure link:
**_[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-dante-divine-comedy-course](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ziddb909bj1kcatv8718q0sphgdic0dr5oct150o_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or1cph2bs)_**
We are deeply grateful for your friendship and support.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgitm1v4qjhkkolr3jb2r90pehacnqbq9lmcol30_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o71c5h2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6u4sjr0iqdqljhaojbspr1q2gfm2u3511ea84tg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o71c5h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2a5da73kjr9qopghg2318l7vundcd64o5dv5gio_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o71c5h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Pro Life Update
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgck9018via5rhchokdhtu3oriddf1c0su2uc2j0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64pj6clhm8oh1k8gn48n24hjm0or1cpie1ob1c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcdd3e157bkn5f1p4i74clcgolsv5hm00nnhf9j8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o71c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq25olv2p4deri9brtp75md04n6qf8e4lnbfeud0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o71c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Moment to talk?
body:
I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjreu9e7dn9pmaa4pmsa0lk9g0hi15jseek873ng_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr2fn7ckd3uflksv77ghcceeffkisav9t969lf9g_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z411arlpiu9dt51p5cr29lhmlfigops3ft6gt6vo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7qes0qiqfg5v4marsjvtlposfgirqqer71q8lvo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5jcilm63ln3sg5dm9fb2r9d2f8s3minrm9j0uk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person _reading this today_ could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpbhk6acp0fl9ldlstpc5j2mfpbaereuj49he350_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z00br2n7ln48ev9uaq81u8bke6tsbbif4kfm5mhg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zesvqmnnss1e56hjb0rk34gjf981trsog6p9lqp0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj29snldtpsk5l56k8jnslm78anfiq6efvok0el0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs "I need your help – starting right now. ")**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9j1bcnokbf8hgi23i91e6kh0nk7909fh0i6otqo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoo9p5q3s5jsjvvsomubpiv7a8bblggf6ifiq008_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdsh3o22ipu6hc2lku5nrea460p4f5pntic6bdug_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0bhdvf9pisa19109sbqceedc55qba67bu7nbnh0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn6t86rr0dsufe3a8a57d6j6m4s7feghbdo8cbs0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkiviovj70ia2b1covuk6sa935q4s48oa5t9sivo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6h061sh4lfj0kk1k7g34t3a36dlv6k7nru8ieug_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs "DONATE")
---
| | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl5pqt5nhi3ju4nvb2rka0f3n32s5sqn21pjctf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs)
---

**By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. [Terms and conditions](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztpmgkfi4jiio2ob3f3g1thl4i38ug2fq5itf320_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs) and [Privacy Policy](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3cv7b68sdsasnje27vga64cupa0fmh16l2jv2hg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs).apply. You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. [Privacy Policy](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zci8vtrci50e55sv860bfakbu1gmv7tmstu98cco_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs). [Terms and conditions](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7vpesjm4m3hoa7kuq1u0c8vlbhd815f3uqd9ek0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69o70sph2bs).

Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals.

Daniel Island, SC 29492

GOP Presidential

name: ICYMI News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8g0frj02ptmnj03gen5qvdr98dvck1n1j3rj9qg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69p70c5h2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuhqensl1lsi0uddifmbbpscevrjlhk4psufodko_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69p70c5h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zueqig4l4ir7fn60fi11ria9ea17u645qhgamadg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69p70c5h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z739kt5a0scgu6l9mfgreo5ci35g7q36qk8rvgcg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69p70c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9j6cpb3cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv4hflaiafkrrn9q0pfv2b7og9knk24vf8snu2g8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69p70c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh8nn0f1pf68n8535kffur5ho3k2e5oln0sobrc8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0cdgmcp74s1gm49fg)
