name: NAVY SEAL
subject: Our homeland is in danger
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
The DSCC has announced an 8 figure spend in Montana and Ohio. I need your support to make sure Schumer can’t buy this seat.

---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhlg510gt7pd1db8tqdtvhkqm84pjtaq426sk02o_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or3c9h2bs)

Fellow Conservative,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv48ie88mfqt71cd24mo4m7h615n1bo1m1ta7d18_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or3c9h2bs)**.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbc1t9maq2mtuu2bs2vr2rfq5f7tavin4iaha1po_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or3c9h2bs)
In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

**[Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj91s1bd8sggnb1mo1j1flvpciikdrv2c22sc16g_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or3c9h2bs)**

_**Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. **_

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3bdfnuq497d55odfpau18lv99gjoh9enk4sa0e8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or3c9h2bs)
[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf5bemb9m1hj78dl3m3oj8ponijssfphff29rllo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or3c9h2bs)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcqrtf5htm6m10m04r7l0m0llav93715hj6oae60_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or3c9h2bs)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3h54jishhmh2c68gel2u4jsc2gf3coh22k4i4bg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or3c9h2bs)

Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

**The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in 2024.**

[**We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2cn5jqanc34njm5v48tqf9r54kqlm37d9n8eh38_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or3c9h2bs)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhf5i4mlllale46dohdap22iha6s0pt164ea4o8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or3c9h2bs)

Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, **I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list.** The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election.

_***If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play.***_

This is my most critical mission to date, and [**I am counting on you to enlist in the fight.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjhe7picm6l9dqjthvn6s7ltgke3ps5cpuohndf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or3c9h2bs)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgg8qsvili9cl42h13380p3k9b8veqlomvckdqd0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or3c9h2bs)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp7hbbf30433umd3a3j6lj1ugr1cnom7bkpm8fno_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5j69or3c9h2bs)

* * *
---

| PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
---

Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh25d5khckt1qgk6rkdcjbagjvm4ad8dvl0nfm3o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0cdgmcp73cdh649fg)

name: Your America
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39514%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AwoineScb5qpvi8U9VPvqQ&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39525%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2KR9lCwC%2f6U%2fGa1mBWmhEg&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39526%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GkeDR6CkXb5MqLZ0B0WQRg&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. Your America News Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kash Patel
subject: Truth about January 6
body:
The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaqbiofnvihifho2k7p59ulhluq09kdh8d72u07g_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj2clh2bs "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

The media lied about January 6th.

The Deep State lied about January 6th.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6th.

The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public, showing an entirely different story from the lies they told.

Now, it's time to hold them accountable. Here's how:

**STEP ONE** \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here's how you can help:

[Can you send an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to the Kash Foundation to support our mission to defeat the Deep State? Click here to donate >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z01f8443mn6lubko8qs36cmjvsie82a7ploaamng_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj2clh2bs "Donate")

Here's why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government...

I've been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage our country. My investigation discovered the FBI's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th.

[Please donate any $250, $100, or any amount today to support our efforts >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcv0l8i72c7aasatnuedo8stdtjgnr2p30nsd55g_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj2clh2bs)

[Donate >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi61orpbrhqvsu3hjq6lusudtcm6scmh7tbig42g_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj2clh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no "deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

This is the battle against the "Lawfare" used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots.

It's time to fight back.

**Help me raise $20,000 this month by contributing any amount you can generously afford today. **

[Donate $10 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc6b2mqglr3gcmqg8rv70h6gkof06g7cbunq74h0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj2clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztbfhpr5v5q4o00l3t6sj2lip561i12sut7m9f8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj2clh2bs)

Kash Patel

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: Can you handle the truth? I think you can.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I’d rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

| |

---
| | | Today, I want to talk to you about the truth.

The unadorned, unvarnished truth.

The truth is important.

_Without the truth, we cannot order society.
Without the truth, we cannot survive as human beings.
Without the truth, we cannot thrive as human beings. _

_**[Can you handle the truth? I think you can.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9bf0952fbneh773mq9g5p9729bci3sktoqifuug_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj6cph2bs "Can you handle the truth? I think you can.")**_

The truth is, I think it's important to speak your mind. So I do. Now, that makes some people mad, but I try not to worry too much about what anyone thinks of me.

This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

**So here 's the truth:** The Democrats are doing EVERYTHING in their power to destroy our country. Whether it's leaving our borders wide open for terrorists and illicit drugs to flow through, attacking parental rights, or outrageous government spending, they will do whatever it takes to undermine the foundations of America. It all goes back to the SPECTACULARLY awful job Joe Biden has done with America.

**Here 's the solution:** We must DEFEAT the Democrats at _**every level**_ of government. This will be the only way we can stop the Democrats' woke agenda and put America back on the path to prosperity.

**Here 's how we'll WIN: **This all starts with YOU, Friend. I am working alongside Majority Leader Scalise to personally ask you to put your money where your mouth is and help House Republicans beat the Democrats. They were outraised last quarter by $12M, so we cannot afford for a single patriot to sideline themselves.

_**[Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi4hp4as788qh55k0q66mmpqgd3gfoutij3rbflg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj6cph2bs "Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now.")**_
---
| | | [INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0puclhddo1v3kd43jq5e41naok14j4vnntcv3oo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj6cph2bs "INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12")
---
Thanks for listening to me, I hope you take what I said to heart and take action right away.

**The future of our country is counting on you. **

Thanks,
John Kennedy
(R-Louisiana)

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlmb25fjoveia9ubufvc4t0afnkiiutjennp08e8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj6cph2bs "John Kennedy")
---

---

I'm launching my brand new _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvei5mtvpcjnjinget83occnuraujnm3gfa8glb0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj6cph2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share with me.

This is very important to me.

---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zltdb74mdcbsohaja5ui87q47s52eqp08u1732so_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj6cph2bs "TAKE THE SURVEY")

Thank you,
Majority Leader Steve Scalise

name: Trump Train News
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zik5515jk1r1rfrfc2cn936kipigmi1d0bd23gjo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj7c5h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfq3bilb18t5emm23jf9nvnbg6n6ltiqq5fdr5vo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj7c5h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjsekilmbclckl0qk8d2ishkbm92du18ptjufsao_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gmcoj7c5h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Moment to talk?
body:
I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682741%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hWM9S0gKNL8IOlI%2batsWNA&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America’s future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682742%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pALZLSjMmLApESxgiUO2AQ&sysid=1 "Once you’ve finished
reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund
my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682741%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hWM9S0gKNL8IOlI%2batsWNA&sysid=1)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family’s business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _“Don’t complain. Do something about it.” _
---
| | | So, that’s exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn’t easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682741%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hWM9S0gKNL8IOlI%2batsWNA&sysid=1)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn’t know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn’t have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the “kick me” sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn’t know what hit them.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682741%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hWM9S0gKNL8IOlI%2batsWNA&sysid=1)
---

Now, I’m running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person _reading this today_ could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>](https://secure.winred.com/team-stand-for-america/support-nikki-now-underdog-tv?sc=PRentalTV&recurring=true&utm_campaign=20240111_WG-AUN2.103067_nikki-haley_t1433358-2667&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=WG-AUN2.103067&utm_content=20240111_moment-to-talk&ex_tid=20240111_WG-AUN2.103067_nikki-haley_t1433358-2667&utm_content=tv-au-20240128&xunv=tv-au-20240128 "It would mean a lot to me
if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help
me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682743%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wfRQ%2bOD8vIsgzN2JucXmOA&sysid=1 "Will you consider making a
one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682744%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vQkzRuHZJYfo4kgfsPvMpg&sysid=1)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I’m hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682855%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xwzKNqerbhc8PZwmN90PPA&sysid=1 "I need your help –
starting right now. ")**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682741%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hWM9S0gKNL8IOlI%2batsWNA&sysid=1)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682856%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q4OM6vWxfiWCFMHm0Cc0Wg&sysid=1)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682857%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qiBFGAIraWmOFB81gS5Lpg&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682858%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=by%2fWevVI4rS3uWeX73Wy7A&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682859%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FsershEBXgjxtQI8I5nCuA&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

clean_body: I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. | | | | | | Friend, Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America’s future. Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family’s business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: “Don’t complain. Do something about it.” | | | So, that’s exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn’t easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn’t know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn’t have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the “kick me” sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn’t know what hit them. | Now, I’m running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>" Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?" | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I’m hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, "I need your help – starting right now. " Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. name: Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: FBI arrests Babylon Bee actor, terrifies his pregnant wife
body:
Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmigljqfob53jdkoqrhdq8f0vo597ip97hv01c20_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gm6o76c5h2bs)
---
| |
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmubroirmtf54e41sbitsh69kkkqh5tt2q7ipsfg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gm6o76c5h2bs)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100 or more right now to help Babylon Bee actor and patriot, Siaka Massaquoi, fight back against Joe Biden's FBI.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7u1pktl6ng7pt5fa9etubeckaqsj7ktk8sq1gh8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gm6o76c5h2bs)**

Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire.

The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant.

**Siaka was arrested because he 's a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day. **

You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he's starred in Babylon Bee's funny series, "Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas") ...

... He's also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country.

Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden's lawless administration.

**So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That 's right, MISDEMEANORS!**

What's more, this isn't the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka's rights, either.

**Over twenty FBI agents raided Siaka 's home with drawn guns on June 10, 2021 at 5:45 AM, and handcuffed him, his best friend, and two other roommates. **

As you can imagine, his best friend's two little children, just three and seven years old, were _terrified._

And here's what happened next:

* The FBI agents refused to let Siaka speak to his lawyer
* The FBI agents refused to show him the arrest warrant
* The FBI agents grilled him and his friends for FIVE HOURS with no lawyers present!
* The FBI confiscated his cell phone, computer and his MAGA hat and has refused ever since to give them back!
* And we have reason to believe that Siaka and the other peaceful J-6 protesters were illegally and unconstitutionally surveilled!

**And because the FBI didn 't arrest or charge Siaka, he had no legal grounds to find out why they raided his home...terrorized him, his friends, his friend's little children... abused his Constitutionally protected rights...and stole his property.**

Can you imagine being abused like this... _as an American citizen in your own country?_

What the FBI did to my peaceful, innocent client in 2021 and just a short time ago is a CRIME.

**That 's why I've filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 46 years.

You've seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

I'm proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton.

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Siaka wants to use this critically important lawsuit to speak up for other patriots, too, because he's alarmed at what Joe Biden and his friends are doing to our country.

He's deeply concerned that our country is going down a very dark road...and I agree.

I want to fix this horrifying situation peacefully and legally in the courts...before it's too late.

**[Patriot, I beg you to help me fight back for Siaka and ALL other January 6 peaceful protesters with your very best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr484mjtcbrr8pi1v46oppca3dpcfd87103psg4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gm6o76c5h2bs)**

**If Joe Biden 's FBI and DOJ get away with crushing the rights and freedoms of Siaka and all the other peaceful patriots of January 6, they WILL come for you, me, our families, and our friends.**

**[So please don't delay - give your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2mhkcrd0qol03o3tfb84s13kb5aqor7a0jvoqm8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gm6o76c5h2bs)**

Thank you so much!

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, the FBI arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, because he 's a political threat to Joe Biden's reelection. **They shamelessly arrested him in front of his pregnant wife, Charlotte. They terrified her and refused to show her the arrest warrant.

If the FBI gets away with this, they WILL be turned on you and me our families next.

**[Please support this critical lawsuit with your best gift of $25, $50, $100 or more immediately.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zelkfrh87ifvm7bv4qd034180rfq8v5np5dq0rdo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gm6o76c5h2bs)**

body:
The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7bblhiskajor6d2i884gt9v3sq1m8emkteg7fj0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gm6o76c5h2bs "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

The media lied about January 6th.

The Deep State lied about January 6th.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6th.

The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public, showing an entirely different story from the lies they told.

Now, it's time to hold them accountable. Here's how:

**STEP ONE** \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here's how you can help:

[Can you send an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to the Kash Foundation to support our mission to defeat the Deep State? Click here to donate >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z10jrd5vulk46j9ab7o5mq41vn0436pp46bhv2h8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gm6o76c5h2bs "Donate")

Here's why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government...

I've been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage our country. My investigation discovered the FBI's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th.

[Please donate any $250, $100, or any amount today to support our efforts >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztffi7i7gp6lk8df0b8td141j6aocsqj611cv8l8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c5gm6o76c5h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no "deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

This is the battle against the "Lawfare" used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots.

It's time to fight back.

name: Ryan Zinke
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end

|
---
| | |
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682877%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mRaKze5uSPqfUtKgFkhT8Q&sysid=1 "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682878%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l4JB31Gs9FPfAVqwd2DGpA&sysid=1 "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation.

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682879%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d8urBhwqupq0u8%2fz3s1Wkw&sysid=1 "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

For Immediate Release: January 25, 2024 | [press@DolanForOhio.com](mailto:press@DolanForOhio.com)

Today in Ohio: Bernie Moreno a Flip-Flopping Puppet, Dolan a Conservative Through & Through

Cleveland, Ohio - In case you missed it, Today in Ohio, the [daily news podcast](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HdEE2yCaD9JXWGjGhrGrvjR9BryRCX4Q5ABl2JuOg1Q4PQd8hBKqKCeZYvBvcFst0UH6JwlnPJbSXOP5x4zYSpP9zocrHYu_PM4tIeHzd1t98bK9yyBWp8h1x6K2oVqganD7W9mB3NOrRN1ZR0iO850rAKsJ9D8XxeuOGMnJwO1jakj1vkQRr0V4m91kKHaZ&c=2ZwG0y7dN91pjWWYrZ3OkvH9OAwKzU-JvcvaZdAn6FDSj6rwEDL3XQ==&ch=ykbCUFl76vk3wH6FYRe6wy2Z9NjWE472C6_5qcoE4QH3neg2u6cKvA==) of Cleveland.com and The Plain Dealer, covered the recent GOP Debate. The pundits excoriated Bernie Moreno for his weak debate performance and lack of consistent issue positions and noted Matt Dolan's consistent conservative record.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HdEE2yCaD9JXWGjGhrGrvjR9BryRCX4Q5ABl2JuOg1Q4PQd8hBKqKCeZYvBvcFstRyD0dU3Lj8X934gnlB6dvIjaJ2Ky-Jm9UzF_uvd5CLgTGZ-lz-jRX3rM5nPEkubBiG8r0-BZ4If6MKV6Lfd-pzV_D8bqdgQL_QsoUZgTd_HY0jy8lCU8QbkU3K1n99fq3wneEzTCZR9SBdWkPi_nNQOE6i2VfVmw4xvIW6fRRzBrhUC7TmsWNaQf9y3skacAPKS-MNAYQplJJ725XwtSMf_lOZHZJexyzYqjik4WZBM=&c=2ZwG0y7dN91pjWWYrZ3OkvH9OAwKzU-JvcvaZdAn6FDSj6rwEDL3XQ==&ch=ykbCUFl76vk3wH6FYRe6wy2Z9NjWE472C6_5qcoE4QH3neg2u6cKvA==)

| [Today in Ohio Podcast](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HdEE2yCaD9JXWGjGhrGrvjR9BryRCX4Q5ABl2JuOg1Q4PQd8hBKqKCeZYvBvcFstRyD0dU3Lj8X934gnlB6dvIjaJ2Ky-Jm9UzF_uvd5CLgTGZ-lz-jRX3rM5nPEkubBiG8r0-BZ4If6MKV6Lfd-pzV_D8bqdgQL_QsoUZgTd_HY0jy8lCU8QbkU3K1n99fq3wneEzTCZR9SBdWkPi_nNQOE6i2VfVmw4xvIW6fRRzBrhUC7TmsWNaQf9y3skacAPKS-MNAYQplJJ725XwtSMf_lOZHZJexyzYqjik4WZBM=&c=2ZwG0y7dN91pjWWYrZ3OkvH9OAwKzU-JvcvaZdAn6FDSj6rwEDL3XQ==&ch=ykbCUFl76vk3wH6FYRe6wy2Z9NjWE472C6_5qcoE4QH3neg2u6cKvA==) | Jan. 23, 2024
---
| Editor Chris Quinn: "If I were Frank LaRose or Matt Dolan, I would do a commercial with Bernie Moreno as Pinocchio saying, 'there are strings on me.' He's basically saying 'look, I'm the Trump puppet. I have no decision making. I don't stand for anything. I will just do what my lord and master Donald Trump tells me to do' ... what kind of campaign is that? I mean who wants to elect somebody who basically says, 'I'm just the pass-through, you will get nothing from me..."
Editorial Board Member Lisa Garvin: "Dolan is not pandering ... As far as Bernie Moreno, he has completely flip-flopped on a lot of his policies, including immigration. So, I think you can look at the track record of Matt Dolan and say he has been a conservative through and through."
Editor Chris Quinn: "Matt Dolan is the same guy he was at the beginning. He stands for stuff. Whether you agree with his politics or not. He doesn't play this game. He certainly doesn't say, 'I'm putting all of my voting decisions in the hands of someone else.' Who wants that?"
Editor Chris Quinn: "Moreno may have some landmines out there. As I understand it, the people in his Leadership Cleveland class from probably a decade ago, are trying to find the emails he was sending to all of them back then in which his positions are 100 percent different than what they are today. It would be very interesting if those do come out to show how he is doing exactly what Matt Dolan says. He's trying to catch the political wind.
Editor Chris Quinn: "LaRose wants to be the puppet, but Donald Trump won't let him."
Listen to the whole podcast episode by [clicking here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HdEE2yCaD9JXWGjGhrGrvjR9BryRCX4Q5ABl2JuOg1Q4PQd8hBKqKCeZYvBvcFstRyD0dU3Lj8X934gnlB6dvIjaJ2Ky-Jm9UzF_uvd5CLgTGZ-lz-jRX3rM5nPEkubBiG8r0-BZ4If6MKV6Lfd-pzV_D8bqdgQL_QsoUZgTd_HY0jy8lCU8QbkU3K1n99fq3wneEzTCZR9SBdWkPi_nNQOE6i2VfVmw4xvIW6fRRzBrhUC7TmsWNaQf9y3skacAPKS-MNAYQplJJ725XwtSMf_lOZHZJexyzYqjik4WZBM=&c=2ZwG0y7dN91pjWWYrZ3OkvH9OAwKzU-JvcvaZdAn6FDSj6rwEDL3XQ==&ch=ykbCUFl76vk3wH6FYRe6wy2Z9NjWE472C6_5qcoE4QH3neg2u6cKvA==).

name: Kash Patel
subject: Truth about January 6
body:
The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39522%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1R1PVNKkjR50bbsSSJr98w&sysid=1 "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

The media lied about January 6th.

The Deep State lied about January 6th.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6th.

The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public, showing an entirely different story from the lies they told.

Now, it’s time to hold them accountable. Here’s how:

**STEP ONE** \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here’s how you can help:

[Can you send an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to the Kash Foundation to support our mission to defeat the Deep State? Click here to donate >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39523%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4rraqh1urgiNm4TLQyCi%2bQ&sysid=1 "Donate")

Here’s why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government...

I’ve been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage our country. My investigation discovered the FBI’s unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It’s why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that’s when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th.

[Please donate any $250, $100, or any amount today to support our efforts >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39524%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fjkbdN4hq%2bNz3ieKOIZi%2bw&sysid=1)

name: Full Mag News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f10f4c8838f647d898ae29a3475c9b10&_e=zVyIPDxADhXoCqg6f2tl6MiaS4KFHdaAxdSN87FdM6gZxhqJg6Do3Vwp5y2U3eV6b28QG6mGWDhUGnMfPujci1EF_MuXUXcxCqoX4zRhcVBMwIH0wsbHgu2f3_EMjfF_5BSqyzN-0DScIRnQF03EgDuGYmt_w-38TzPfFFexXXOVHMmjNL5rSU5hyxh5g4wZ8Toz2EDJh7rA21PFDw2K1c1TVA4Wscnwf_BJOHv2jqaH5YQocbivbJwTL53yo76CC-tQ8hjpmE92hKf_kZ2KFpCZwYY9xul0mhkN960T0h1TsiwuMIuUWYQjg40bjTSfN03I-WuIneyGTkiFdCZ5t2V2PMzk44J1vTldcTVEX2IfoXJCyqJ4pDdQylDLqoLqu5yMgurNqKdi_qVokYI0KQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f10f4c8838f647d898ae29a3475c9b10&_e=zVyIPDxADhXoCqg6f2tl6MiaS4KFHdaAxdSN87FdM6gZxhqJg6Do3Vwp5y2U3eV6b28QG6mGWDhUGnMfPujci1EF_MuXUXcxCqoX4zRhcVBMwIH0wsbHgu2f3_EMjfF_5BSqyzN-0DScIRnQF03EgDuGYmt_w-38TzPfFFexXXOVHMmjNL5rSU5hyxh5g4wZ8Toz2EDJh7rA21PFDw2K1c1TVA4Wscnwf_BJOHv2jqZQfN7GhbBQ2fVbGVYA8dzZ1zhO5pXKOl65JwkgIKNiXrAIEI6rgQplEKZmOjptvlSioSeOMsGtnLZc8gi7pnmgZSilGacBpMfeeVyWkrnZRZkY2-shAIx7mCUX3CKpcRXYTwQ-VH8guUnJl5Wgc5IndASR9d5wxBex9y7sg3jzgw%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f10f4c8838f647d898ae29a3475c9b10&_e=zVyIPDxADhXoCqg6f2tl6MiaS4KFHdaAxdSN87FdM6gZxhqJg6Do3Vwp5y2U3eV6b28QG6mGWDhUGnMfPujci1EF_MuXUXcxCqoX4zRhcVBMwIH0wsbHgu2f3_EMjfF_5BSqyzN-0DScIRnQF03EgDuGYmt_w-38TzPfFFexXXOVHMmjNL5rSU5hyxh5g4wZ8Toz2EDJh7rA21PFDw2K1c1TVA4Wscnwf_BJOHv2jqbb79l-0yUBT4FgruJlQgY4Cuks5Wh9VM0fe5PDbsVnPYeYOijcb9xJaKx18NByOIowFuVOcAxAuhhHYi1kmj6j45hl03bc1Hn8TSS9_oIR7X7tnXguCGA6qgO3-rGLShOK1LOSWjbuY15vsvZTEvbDZ7B8dYzxDrUkkl28fBXbYg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. name: Conservatives Give
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0711bf8d2d8243a59313d85a003bcbc8&_e=SiWKMPk74W4RxA9JIHDJmFODFOnoZIk2FYX6di-oXt9ZGV5shqCv9JtMbaIR9vMLYLhLND4q8Gr-eJ9Iu39tuI8h_vx6yBZXwp0OS8OJcwrmxJYd0DuJFo4Bh7zzrUQHmQhc0BKMwRQyHVjeOORLnrSJKnvKa9GBYjiFxRvwBz0AGhbXcMEiIQwAlzxL4c5ev3ei9bhLh7jufZSg_JvGKwoue_lVv-sqK2HuYnwXb8IRyAthEkFoz7f2-o6zPKtS_auEME87AlxnbTV53M3953xa_y-TdV-PSRLEQJq4CiP8a3Hr1oxYCHJoBfd6Utt_). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0711bf8d2d8243a59313d85a003bcbc8&_e=SiWKMPk74W4RxA9JIHDJmFODFOnoZIk2FYX6di-oXt9ZGV5shqCv9JtMbaIR9vMLYLhLND4q8Gr-eJ9Iu39tuI8h_vx6yBZXwp0OS8OJcwrmxJYd0DuJFo4Bh7zzrUQHmQhc0BKMwRQyHVjeOORLnhsv_nCgsiDzbKE7H97si0ww1ih5iRyBNBycY-C5Ndc2UxCnqqXdAcAAgRhMjY5-O6S_SQH-NiAmOWAtdZ6Yohvd9RpKUtKa6h-7yGZcIfzzbAdoBxc132ViMeObEYQf3Zpyb7wGBdk3ajEyoHQSKAaSMv8F3Z27E6oaZXolNcge) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Why Genesis is important to faith and education
body:
In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b05508fbe2414122ad7fbb05f0a69971&_e=Ep-2xsIxLq3zIfGiyLp8mw3IB9sNxKlw_64rODNeK57zCF8NDRn8L-JvKfECEAX-zHCsAoJip3soHjxuvkq3J6KH54P4tDpG8XWmS3tWRYmFpWVxHC4pcjPlOiJorSA1nzl7rUP87T8qRFMjNJA2-Qb86Wrg_5GrQD-CuCHGKOVpI5xtF8Q4vXTzRY45XXSP5MqSe2dBLlO46PlJFiKVmvY9uQlrLuYsDyjJcvfZ8XF42wXQWVU81SjlZDkNeg43j0gZzb4XU5Ofs9BKTe8Tb3LZybMmcmD729G2D8WweWOiqT1REgV9LgjpDPkV7ql6oaKgc1-MrsBSmpfvWbSysMbhc1xtM5k-cr6k0AoPM4NRNCN-4sj7FCMn-UI-noZZL4ZqhYq2JUeGmxfhSBqKxg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College’s popular online course, **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,”** is available on DVD.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b05508fbe2414122ad7fbb05f0a69971&_e=Ep-2xsIxLq3zIfGiyLp8mw3IB9sNxKlw_64rODNeK57zCF8NDRn8L-JvKfECEAX-zHCsAoJip3soHjxuvkq3J6KH54P4tDpG8XWmS3tWRYmFpWVxHC4pcjPlOiJorSA1nzl7rUP87T8qRFMjNJA2-Qb86Wrg_5GrQD-CuCHGKOVpI5xtF8Q4vXTzRY45XXSP5MqSe2dBLlO46PlJFiKVmvY9uQlrLuYsDyjJcvfZ8XF42wXQWVU81SjlZDkNeg43MrjHDo4uotV1HhtYlxuEC6kmlo3zO5HPpl3lSCOrQhgxzkTlhPxO4NQQkvkEkq36Bft3WGc4GlM5zOXIBXBtrgeqA9tnpyjrjxk25rNIUKhpXZ3s80sbpbZnWbeaICRb81i81rXGZ8hvTHepefgvWA%3D%3D)In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

“The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student’s theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it’s important to both faith and higher education.

Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you’ll receive the DVD as our thank you.**

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b05508fbe2414122ad7fbb05f0a69971&_e=Ep-2xsIxLq3zIfGiyLp8mw3IB9sNxKlw_64rODNeK57zCF8NDRn8L-JvKfECEAX-zHCsAoJip3soHjxuvkq3J6KH54P4tDpG8XWmS3tWRYmFpWVxHC4pcjPlOiJorSA1nzl7rUP87T8qRFMjNJA2-Qb86Wrg_5GrQD-CuCHGKOVpI5xtF8Q4vXTzRY45XXSP5MqSe2dBLlO46PlJFiKVmvY9uQlrLuYsDyjJcvfZ8XF42wXQWVU81SjlZDkNeg43qWOo193Dlkq7DYLz2dJBVmYvUSSI2fNAdgiCaShBPjwKn0fTUjUyxcKiaOfHmIjMW5vCs5WB5DVM4YBlvimteLW3X5r5A-hfJlC1TZyeKzCGG2P1eVdpr2HiK0h26oZ019rVi1ekk2b_qr1Z3Ahc3g%3D%3D)**

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding—even indirectly through student loans and grants. That’s why your support is so crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College’s national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation’s youth. Your gift will also help to:
* Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as “Genesis.”
* Expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Establish and guide classical K-12 schools nationwide and provide, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.
* Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.”**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=b05508fbe2414122ad7fbb05f0a69971&_t=OMbb1bAXiXDn9VpDdmDnRMGsDw_4ZcadHzsU0dmu81N1m-JED0mZNXsT1eyidE0mTdS74u7osmBOccYtP17WeWKuxIIx7K2fP8Jh5RvJu0cCLf4gd_qRYCAH6qXBjxCiz6brHeX5sGG6QEKGNptbRd7YTI8jI8iMfOSTqKgbMhM%3D)

clean_body: In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news. Hillsdale College’s popular online course, “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,” is available on DVD. this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature. “The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student’s theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text. The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it’s important to both faith and higher education. Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation. These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph. This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs. For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you’ll receive the DVD as our thank you. To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding—even indirectly through student loans and grants. That’s why your support is so crucial. Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College’s national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation’s youth. Your gift will also help to: Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as “Genesis.” Expand the readership of Imprimis , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty. Establish and guide classical K-12 schools nationwide and provide, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio. Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.” Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=054c9d42384b4573acd7b17c2c2f5e9a&_e=hTIGOWIInF0Zblnd-pXIrBz6femeF_kJTRg6jLLz0MPs5VvmwNOaXFH3SnsiOc9Ssx-QZ5MF7orEyXg2nYVSRQj0Y3NAtY1nSoqNWiyxVBUc1J8t5nyBp1LFabWj5hDiHly3uapouxK14M1n2SoMhrlKflp3yf2n7f107UyaU362b21t34OnLfuAqbeLZQB8KmHFwdVq9x_5TwwBZs8OMhgoPMhqSiMdy0x0z_iAjroVTVuyHBs_UxQu2GuC-5bsXbBjjH4pxt_sqocvMSjXneTZ8QLZygwTO_MOMdWfyggSHw6--Pqeoh9QeF9GgBUFTBMMSH5Eh8PvP_8SdacCfrPyYa3U4psYj1hD_0EJ4Mau__LGzEYm9shuKMAd2_nUc8Nlunc5RdtuupwpGIGFHgiUEAQCnTnZXfkgfPONmsY%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=054c9d42384b4573acd7b17c2c2f5e9a&_e=hTIGOWIInF0Zblnd-pXIrBz6femeF_kJTRg6jLLz0MPs5VvmwNOaXFH3SnsiOc9Ssx-QZ5MF7orEyXg2nYVSRQj0Y3NAtY1nSoqNWiyxVBUc1J8t5nyBp1LFabWj5hDiHly3uapouxK14M1n2SoMhrlKflp3yf2n7f107UyaU362b21t34OnLfuAqbeLZQB8KmHFwdVq9x_5TwwBZs8OMhgoPMhqSiMdy0x0z_iAjroVTVuyHBs_UxQu2GuC-5bsXbBjjH4pxt_sqocvMSjXnWXoYnMZ8QjyYXtg-2w69T6vZgtdrkdLYqcS8xXndim5yF9V6WeFjyGDpDg5Z9s96UYM6Jj0Z_Lc3_SSI_KILlE6Ly-bmUMTTWovM-z7RTlrfEATp0up9IpP4ERNHvO39JbOkjTq4RlrnXGCU5MN7AU%3D)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**

Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. Friend,

A mandatory teacher training at LA schools says "cis," skinny, straight, white people are oppressors.

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GksNWZXGZOePv9azXxREFQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnmN24P0SSaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubGliZXJ0YXMub3JnL3R1dHRsZXR3aW5zLXBhLWFjdGlvbj91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d29udF9iZWxpZXZlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cmV2c2hhcmUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDAxMjgmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Y2JXA3NwY0IKZbGTPrZlC-pxcFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Teachers should concentrate on improving their students' education -- not on made-up power dynamics. Parents are finally aware of the dangers of indoctrination in schools. I've been ringing the bell on this issue for a decade, and I even know a solution.

We can stop this nonsense. Here's how:

My name is Connor Boyack, the author of _The Tuttle Twins_. A decade ago, I created the Tuttle Twins book series to teach children what they aren't learning in public schools today: the values of liberty, American history, free markets, and limited government.

**[I want to get Tuttle Twins books in front of as many young people as possible, so I set a goal to raise $20,000 before the end of the month. Every $10 we raise allows us to send a copy of a Tuttle Twins book to a school, library, or family.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GksNWZXGZOePv9azXxREFQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnmN24P0SSaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubGliZXJ0YXMub3JnL3R1dHRsZXR3aW5zLXBhLWFjdGlvbj91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d29udF9iZWxpZXZlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cmV2c2hhcmUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDAxMjgmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Y2JXA3NwY0IKZbGTPrZlC-pxcFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

These books are inspiring a new generation of kids to learn and apply the lessons of free markets, individual rights, liberty, true history, and personal responsibility.

Do you remember the story of Jaiden, the kid in Colorado who was kicked out of class for wearing a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack? **The Tuttle Twins books inspired him to stand up for his beliefs and fight back!**

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GksNWZXGZOePv9azXxREFQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnmN24P0SSaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubGliZXJ0YXMub3JnL3R1dHRsZXR3aW5zLXBhLWFjdGlvbj91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d29udF9iZWxpZXZlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cmV2c2hhcmUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDAxMjgmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Y2JXA3NwY0IKZbGTPrZlC-pxcFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

We have already distributed over 5 million copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and children across the country.

subject: BREAKING: FBI arrests Babylon Bee actor, terrifies his pregnant wife
body:
Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

| [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PYyMgsGU5UshiGZK55jaXg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnmOyaP0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlZG9td2F0Y2gucmV2di5jby9mYmktYXJyZXN0cy1hY3Rvci1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZmJpLWFycmVzdHMtYWN0b3ImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMjgmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplsRQ_tmUapHhMUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
