| |
---
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PYyMgsGU5UshiGZK55jaXg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnmOyaP0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlZG9td2F0Y2gucmV2di5jby9mYmktYXJyZXN0cy1hY3Rvci1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZmJpLWFycmVzdHMtYWN0b3ImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMjgmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplsRQ_tmUapHhMUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100 or more right now to help Babylon Bee actor and patriot, Siaka Massaquoi, fight back against Joe Biden's FBI.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PYyMgsGU5UshiGZK55jaXg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnmOyaP0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlZG9td2F0Y2gucmV2di5jby9mYmktYXJyZXN0cy1hY3Rvci1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZmJpLWFycmVzdHMtYWN0b3ImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMjgmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplsRQ_tmUapHhMUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire.

The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant.

**Siaka was arrested because he 's a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day. **

You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he's starred in Babylon Bee's funny series, "Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas") ...

... He's also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country.

Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden's lawless administration.

**So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That 's right, MISDEMEANORS!**

What's more, this isn't the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka's rights, either.

**Over twenty FBI agents raided Siaka 's home with drawn guns on June 10, 2021 at 5:45 AM, and handcuffed him, his best friend, and two other roommates. **

As you can imagine, his best friend's two little children, just three and seven years old, were _terrified._

And here's what happened next:

* The FBI agents refused to let Siaka speak to his lawyer
* The FBI agents refused to show him the arrest warrant
* The FBI agents grilled him and his friends for FIVE HOURS with no lawyers present!
* The FBI confiscated his cell phone, computer and his MAGA hat and has refused ever since to give them back!
* And we have reason to believe that Siaka and the other peaceful J-6 protesters were illegally and unconstitutionally surveilled!

**And because the FBI didn 't arrest or charge Siaka, he had no legal grounds to find out why they raided his home...terrorized him, his friends, his friend's little children... abused his Constitutionally protected rights...and stole his property.**

Can you imagine being abused like this... _as an American citizen in your own country?_

What the FBI did to my peaceful, innocent client in 2021 and just a short time ago is a CRIME.

**That 's why I've filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 46 years.

You've seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

I'm proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton.

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Siaka wants to use this critically important lawsuit to speak up for other patriots, too, because he's alarmed at what Joe Biden and his friends are doing to our country.

He's deeply concerned that our country is going down a very dark road...and I agree.

I want to fix this horrifying situation peacefully and legally in the courts...before it's too late.

**[Patriot, I beg you to help me fight back for Siaka and ALL other January 6 peaceful protesters with your very best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right now.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PYyMgsGU5UshiGZK55jaXg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnmOyaP0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlZG9td2F0Y2gucmV2di5jby9mYmktYXJyZXN0cy1hY3Rvci1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZmJpLWFycmVzdHMtYWN0b3ImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMjgmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplsRQ_tmUapHhMUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

**If Joe Biden 's FBI and DOJ get away with crushing the rights and freedoms of Siaka and all the other peaceful patriots of January 6, they WILL come for you, me, our families, and our friends.**

**[So please don't delay - give your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PYyMgsGU5UshiGZK55jaXg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnmOyaP0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlZG9td2F0Y2gucmV2di5jby9mYmktYXJyZXN0cy1hY3Rvci1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZmJpLWFycmVzdHMtYWN0b3ImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMjgmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplsRQ_tmUapHhMUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

Thank you so much!

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, the FBI arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, because he 's a political threat to Joe Biden's reelection. **They shamelessly arrested him in front of his pregnant wife, Charlotte. They terrified her and refused to show her the arrest warrant.

If the FBI gets away with this, they WILL be turned on you and me our families next.

**[Please support this critical lawsuit with your best gift of $25, $50, $100 or more immediately.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PYyMgsGU5UshiGZK55jaXg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnmOyaP0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlZG9td2F0Y2gucmV2di5jby9mYmktYXJyZXN0cy1hY3Rvci1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZmJpLWFycmVzdHMtYWN0b3ImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMjgmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplsRQ_tmUapHhMUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

Restore Our Nation

body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe1661b21be04497af727fe2ff9c4a40&_e=TJMavM-igVW1v79zpcpunW_VDdcThHs9tAamp9Wmwtb25hsXdWKQSuvhdL2bYBWH_kHsiDQcShW1sGz79z3WfoajOTysf1wX6wEsR6E5TPVA1a13Nj9UlAzKxxJnTQdz-nbdalAWiWwEjBz74HdVOGvAWOKKfAl-ecangxisvwFnHlN5Pshcz_cIfThUBYSWWD_eeuOqfGUzsMp0czq6Q6W--7Drecbj_bj5FDPoAPbgfQowtPss6NisJ9e4TGxwn6NvvU_JDQ_s2QmNGTlEqAjn4OQnE-_eHULNCPO4XJD8yOxfu-sCFnjwZHzCuFa4bIwdqRok0R0HuZH8oSdAHE_vAiHmXbP06RSWz8PiOghve0jk0F6F8NNS7s_UZkcKQ8Kxv-hd3vNGQG0AoKbqxg%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe1661b21be04497af727fe2ff9c4a40&_e=TJMavM-igVW1v79zpcpunW_VDdcThHs9tAamp9Wmwtb25hsXdWKQSuvhdL2bYBWH_kHsiDQcShW1sGz79z3WfoajOTysf1wX6wEsR6E5TPVA1a13Nj9UlAzKxxJnTQdz-nbdalAWiWwEjBz74HdVOGvAWOKKfAl-ecangxisvwFnHlN5Pshcz_cIfThUBYSWWD_eeuOqfGUzsMp0czq6Q6W--7Drecbj_bj5FDPoAPZQr000uklzsSOtrVrWni03cZCGiwKqfIy5_8KgV5Q2FQH_5zfshtJfXRHkuRJjtvfIdqspqhsYe4_e2WdKt5vgvEkAMxE4GpNAwDqgMfKrcWNQZLincboQGbwJN21AQCm3zs3f9Ha17x0F8-yUAOUNqAuCuEV64XieazAzOWoT4A%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe1661b21be04497af727fe2ff9c4a40&_e=TJMavM-igVW1v79zpcpunW_VDdcThHs9tAamp9Wmwtb25hsXdWKQSuvhdL2bYBWH_kHsiDQcShW1sGz79z3WfoajOTysf1wX6wEsR6E5TPVA1a13Nj9UlAzKxxJnTQdz-nbdalAWiWwEjBz74HdVOGvAWOKKfAl-ecangxisvwFnHlN5Pshcz_cIfThUBYSWWD_eeuOqfGUzsMp0czq6Q6W--7Drecbj_bj5FDPoAPaLF1v_NMveMUiGdotfoqkZl55JsZKzcsjOlq4QhzsiRtSQ6YMjwK_wfeTiB2mUd-AcyquEmvcaYshXdX1-DaEZkW4CVQJiYH-t-bNef_VvQLzqV3i6ttYuonVBoMo1UfwP5ibYKNn8nuT_cpIXkb8QFRrhSXVR3VBmmqjJ5yYKKQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservatives Give

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: World War II as you've never seen it before
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history,

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83cd9c970bc249bfa7693965c83b4190&_e=iTx6BE0eXX0gudR7RJwA9Th27fvlaxE1JKGkVX6gY7OjIgIrO5C4L2SQU-8FM8MygEOGbvVvPfW9JcpifZE3xk8Prdu1GCg2VObp-4oS7aUspsRr2XONQqR570P5OzPBZkdoqC0ShN2Lx4Cd4J-PoxLoS4INvyk21Uho8tv44gNKYsNU_WmuYsAbdIID-mplOdKCHUJM6LliUja5agenzYEbPxw3QZ6CsgNKTrQ1XlrXEXyyohvUYVwtAeXSoUqO0Q2hxUchTMuS8-NuA-pxYLzJvxhKka-RNND4b3rYc-pJg69sbQ1DIqiZW6p6FrMoQ0SrbB4RUrnd_MiOHPlyu1Iuyr93F5kt2Pfu9gwJRMlDDJFQsP3JMLuLkNl49KgO061q3wKgUcYJx_TAtOJmiA-sbC2_kPC0HKbFr4Gs9t8%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83cd9c970bc249bfa7693965c83b4190&_e=iTx6BE0eXX0gudR7RJwA9Th27fvlaxE1JKGkVX6gY7OjIgIrO5C4L2SQU-8FM8MygEOGbvVvPfW9JcpifZE3xk8Prdu1GCg2VObp-4oS7aUspsRr2XONQqR570P5OzPBZkdoqC0ShN2Lx4Cd4J-PoxLoS4INvyk21Uho8tv44gNKYsNU_WmuYsAbdIID-mplOdKCHUJM6LliUja5agenzYEbPxw3QZ6CsgNKTrQ1XlrXEXyyohvUYVwtAeXSoUqO0Q2hxUchTMuS8-NuA-pxYApzgjbCFIrSipDYP7WIBvDGPMyisYJSyMN-c8EQ9BkIK48jOP9r8QanseYG6h9MxMpDSIq5d5ERYlb5lgMbivRcuWFsFHYxhdcoMXQN7G47LXxw_qtTPmjrrzirqd-wDad5pGMzjaxYO0qZUMF8f9U%3D) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83cd9c970bc249bfa7693965c83b4190&_e=iTx6BE0eXX0gudR7RJwA9Th27fvlaxE1JKGkVX6gY7OjIgIrO5C4L2SQU-8FM8MygEOGbvVvPfW9JcpifZE3xk8Prdu1GCg2VObp-4oS7aUspsRr2XONQqR570P5OzPBZkdoqC0ShN2Lx4Cd4J-PoxLoS4INvyk21Uho8tv44gNKYsNU_WmuYsAbdIID-mplOdKCHUJM6LliUja5agenzYEbPxw3QZ6CsgNKTrQ1XlrXEXyyohvUYVwtAeXSoUqO0Q2hxUchTMuS8-NuA-pxYEoFqxnJkjWaLfmmxAxRTUpnHYf2RdWNvHXG4ivNdTSNruZ-4FCSJv7RJN2ecskByF7jmL8qT6xLpJAIad6x84i5_4BELqysn1L3RMot33Sr3-3PnOrAU1e7-mJ-dkjiYJzyCZJbWKw1IeBQ73wYg8U%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Moment to talk?
body:
I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=22c1657a29b94a65baccbf0e2f718cda&_e=fosm7tDmTwhdSVcJ9gH8fyPxslBEIu-Sm2Ooey28q6GXeq4DKmga-1frb6dmAFpf5hXTKhctk84KRmNLxTULHsui54weGwqOYhdnfZ4ITnEAnZRoQeYque6vcRbQP8ZxSsQ33zLuCHUTLVIReW2M1PgPHqkpw5DR80FQ-xK-rv6XB1sn1NvE_SQ5bJNxfk_X7IilnNfok9cC-JnkXXVQM_2R4lk6AFhT_SsoOnIUFbZ5IZsHQ4DAohE93LE2nMetjnO05YF0xhBB3ZunikGT1g6BsHlpOKE8k267_Tv3mS0na45RfV_KP7nXFVKKs-GFNTbIOWuoleoZ6kypNVx0qtjqINjbD0QRoPKHPyDsJSmZsU1X3nLKH2MPwNVwT28ntsVXphfqhG4D8TSALOgyh4ePo7m0eV79DWhc6L6M8GQ5cyruHaZr1uCfmw4OMsOIVhUP1PRYuRo8bZt-pJWi885DEP0CN8jc58dUS5CL3_YuDv4F6MEXxSk4q38TKJ_DhOIDDzevpYG6o9KMGd23Q2M6GT-9wkLf8BZOqKPcfWINZPmBYPU1cdSSy-yFBzeQbWO2mfXyFVGQS7qC-puuhgBlnnbe-j-2YhBUkhUtR5mnwhm-ncMPA20W8qZtI2h1)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=22c1657a29b94a65baccbf0e2f718cda&_e=fosm7tDmTwhdSVcJ9gH8fyPxslBEIu-Sm2Ooey28q6GXeq4DKmga-1frb6dmAFpf5hXTKhctk84KRmNLxTULHsui54weGwqOYhdnfZ4ITnEAnZRoQeYque6vcRbQP8ZxSsQ33zLuCHUTLVIReW2M1PgPHqkpw5DR80FQ-xK-rv6XB1sn1NvE_SQ5bJNxfk_X7IilnNfok9cC-JnkXXVQM_2R4lk6AFhT_SsoOnIUFbZ5IZsHQ4DAohE93LE2nMetjnO05YF0xhBB3ZunikGT1g6BsHlpOKE8k267_Tv3mS0na45RfV_KP7nXFVKKs-GFNTbIOWuoleoZ6kypNVx0qtjqINjbD0QRoPKHPyDsJSmZsU1X3nLKH2MPwNVwT28ntsVXphfqhG4D8TSALOgyh4ePo7m0eV79DWhc6L6M8GQ5cyruHaZr1uCfmw4OMsOIVhUP1PRYuRo8bZt-pJWi885DEP0CN8jc58dUS5CL3_bbegzxFlcaknIhIubg7PpgkXvVP18LapeTSNs7UKkdd74DM6IEyb-KPimt7qLwS8ZcdNXT0Bzeo_eX0Ufc_nAi_NtY8Iyo27OWajlqHrqDTlc1vaV28pDpUKl7trbASd6TdO3L4BQ-DBZ29nwb8_3M "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_

| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. | | | | | | Friend, Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future. Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>" Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?" | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, "I need your help – starting right now. " Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: David Hogg
subject: You don’t have to be obsessed with politics to know our country is in a bad place.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Hey Peter, can I get minute of your time today for something important?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d148cf5-a7c2-4d4e-a5d2-58436cba0c7c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Hey, Peter, thanks for opening this email. I know a lot is going on, so I appreciate it. It’s a little long, but it’s from the heart, and it’s important. You don’t have to be obsessed with politics or watching the news 24/7 to know our country is in a bad place. Horrific violence in the Middle East. A Republican Party that has gone so far off the rails they could barely elect a Speaker. The leading Republican candidate for president is Donald Trump! And then we have unspeakable atrocities like the mass shooting in Maine because our “leaders” refuse to act. And many people talk about how Trump is a major threat to democracy and he is — but I believe there is an even greater and more long-term threat \- hopelessness. When I was knocking doors for Leaders We Deserve-endorsed candidate Nadarius Clark for the Virginia elections, the most concerning answer I got when I asked if people were voting was, “No, I don’t believe in voting” or “No all politics is corrupt and my vote doesn’t matter.” This scares me because things can never get better if we continue electing people who say “government doesn't work” who then get elected and make it not work. I’m deeply worried about us. And it’s not because I’m anti-America. It’s because I love this country and I desperately want to see us do better. We’re not going to fix this mess overnight. But we do have a plan. A group of us just launched Leaders We Deserve. We started it because we know that young progressive leaders can change the future of this country for the better by giving us what we need most to get through this moment of democratic backsliding, HOPE. We can elect more young leaders like Nadarius Clark, but we can ONLY do it if enough of us get behind them. For us to give the school shooting generation the hope it needs to secure the future of our democracy and build a more perfect union, we must get to work electing the next generation of morally just leaders who put kids first and the NRA out of business. The truth is that young progressive candidates who are running for office face huge barriers. The average age of our elected officials is astronomical. That’s because our election system favors those who are older, wealthy, and white. In 2020, Millennial and Gen-Z individuals only held 21% of State Legislative seats despite representing 45% of the electorate. We launched Leaders We Deserve specifically to coalesce support from millions of Americans who believe in the promise of this younger generation. Here’s our plan:
* Find young progressives who are willing to run for Congress and state legislatures.
* Equip their campaigns with messaging, scheduling, and budget tools they need to win.
* And most importantly, raise funds from our massive national network (hey, that’s you!) to allow them to go toe-to-toe with their opponents and WIN.

Peter, if we succeed, ten years from now we’ll have shifted the politics of this nation dramatically. Young, progressive leaders will make up their fair share of the legislative and congressional seats, allowing us to right the ship and build the future we deserve. But what we do right now will determine whether or not that vision comes to pass. We can’t just muddle along raising a couple hundred thousand dollars here and there. We’ll actually have to raise tens of millions of dollars from grassroots donors like you to get the breadth and scale we need to win in all corners of the country. Here’s what I need from you for our plan to work. – If you are blessed with the financial ability to make a really big donation (like $500 or more), please do so right now to help us make this vision a reality. [Click here if you are fortunate enough to give $500 or more.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5c4c29a-2d8b-4679-aad2-0bd19d3a9bd8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – If you can give a small donation each month, that makes a big impact too. [Click here if you think you can commit to a $25 monthly donation (or something like that).](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te569121e-96d2-4254-b5fd-e8894f21ed83/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – If you can’t give big and you can’t give monthly, that’s totally OK (most people can’t). [Click here to just give a one time donation of whatever you can afford.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21d1d81c-071a-4a7c-8e8c-c9a66d02f025/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – Last but not least, if you can’t chip in at all, I completely understand. All I ask is that you forward this email to three friends who might be aligned with our cause. I hope this fundraiser is as successful as I know it can be. I hope that we look back at this moment in ten years and say THIS is when everything started to change. If you have any questions at all about Leaders We Deserve, please check out our website or get in touch with us on social media. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for reading today. \- David Hogg

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

clean_body: Hey Peter, can I get minute of your time today for something important? | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | | | | Hey, Peter, thanks for opening this email. I know a lot is going on, so I appreciate it. It’s a little long, but it’s from the heart, and it’s important. You don’t have to be obsessed with politics or watching the news 24/7 to know our country is in a bad place. Horrific violence in the Middle East. A Republican Party that has gone so far off the rails they could barely elect a Speaker. The leading Republican candidate for president is Donald Trump! And then we have unspeakable atrocities like the mass shooting in Maine because our “leaders” refuse to act. And many people talk about how Trump is a major threat to democracy and he is — but I believe there is an even greater and more long-term threat \- hopelessness. When I was knocking doors for Leaders We Deserve-endorsed candidate Nadarius Clark for the Virginia elections, the most concerning answer I got when I asked if people were voting was, “No, I don’t believe in voting” or “No all politics is corrupt and my vote doesn’t matter.” This scares me because things can never get better if we continue electing people who say “government doesn't work” who then get elected and make it not work. I’m deeply worried about us. And it’s not because I’m anti-America. It’s because I love this country and I desperately want to see us do better. We’re not going to fix this mess overnight. But we do have a plan. A group of us just launched Leaders We Deserve. We started it because we know that young progressive leaders can change the future of this country for the better by giving us what we need most to get through this moment of democratic backsliding, HOPE. We can elect more young leaders like Nadarius Clark, but we can ONLY do it if enough of us get behind them. For us to give the school shooting generation the hope it needs to secure the future of our democracy and build a more perfect union, we must get to work electing the next generation of morally just leaders who put kids first and the NRA out of business. The truth is that young progressive candidates who are running for office face huge barriers. The average age of our elected officials is astronomical. That’s because our election system favors those who are older, wealthy, and white. In 2020, Millennial and Gen-Z individuals only held 21% of State Legislative seats despite representing 45% of the electorate. We launched Leaders We Deserve specifically to coalesce support from millions of Americans who believe in the promise of this younger generation. Here’s our plan: Find young progressives who are willing to run for Congress and state legislatures. Equip their campaigns with messaging, scheduling, and budget tools they need to win. And most importantly, raise funds from our massive national network (hey, that’s you!) to allow them to go toe-to-toe with their opponents and WIN. Peter, if we succeed, ten years from now we’ll have shifted the politics of this nation dramatically. Young, progressive leaders will make up their fair share of the legislative and congressional seats, allowing us to right the ship and build the future we deserve. But what we do right now will determine whether or not that vision comes to pass. We can’t just muddle along raising a couple hundred thousand dollars here and there. We’ll actually have to raise tens of millions of dollars from grassroots donors like you to get the breadth and scale we need to win in all corners of the country. Here’s what I need from you for our plan to work. – If you are blessed with the financial ability to make a really big donation (like $500 or more), please do so right now to help us make this vision a reality. – If you can give a small donation each month, that makes a big impact too. – If you can’t give big and you can’t give monthly, that’s totally OK (most people can’t). – Last but not least, if you can’t chip in at all, I completely understand. All I ask is that you forward this email to three friends who might be aligned with our cause. I hope this fundraiser is as successful as I know it can be. I hope that we look back at this moment in ten years and say THIS is when everything started to change. If you have any questions at all about Leaders We Deserve, please check out our website or get in touch with us on social media. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for reading today. \- David Hogg | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5140be60feb04310bb86796653a1d5b2&_e=aNLx_ogjb7fOj2lXsfRcqfDVEOG61nCom1_Pjlz2PhqQKGCHYOWh84f0AplODmSBJtamUQBIuJKOVsge0YAodr1ikUZe6VIG8Md9K67LMGCMca4nTXnlUZLvuzjNBNIxTGeX_433jfJ-d7kFkDPrxiFlpjhk5YjxwhkTirxpmxukUayL8s8q7uI5Q813PmMdczZkEYtjZsxNppXINjir2eI8Ke8votPi2R6t7vN1M0zaUPKXz9eKp8_ylHkRNDma7iGCoV2qN0dyLeBrfG9BYFSxyDeu1qqGDx9yWBm-ltgDH9fbTT3xP4JZxRthsA27ckl_h3PuievZSvKfsi--let4gMllBm_BUM3OBIzE3kpC9xcn6Z0H_K40ZIGDhe8mt-jtaDjR8yBDSIFY_AasPg%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5140be60feb04310bb86796653a1d5b2&_e=aNLx_ogjb7fOj2lXsfRcqfDVEOG61nCom1_Pjlz2PhqQKGCHYOWh84f0AplODmSBJtamUQBIuJKOVsge0YAodr1ikUZe6VIG8Md9K67LMGCMca4nTXnlUZLvuzjNBNIxTGeX_433jfJ-d7kFkDPrxiFlpjhk5YjxwhkTirxpmxukUayL8s8q7uI5Q813PmMdczZkEYtjZsxNppXINjir2eI8Ke8votPi2R6t7vN1M0zQMWNSaqQPGeefIIc5ZPhwoGru-BzUsRl-rSwulGBrAqfGz7sNZ9Aglje4Hwk6vzH0p2BhPcAyXvf7CPHw_7JdDqc2ffDziRJ6-lpKxbjTE6cbLqbFOrFtClhdo6wWgdT8or1MFjwAPy7agBbcKlGCGA3bOzguGbYwbTLbPsB9tw%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5140be60feb04310bb86796653a1d5b2&_e=aNLx_ogjb7fOj2lXsfRcqfDVEOG61nCom1_Pjlz2PhqQKGCHYOWh84f0AplODmSBJtamUQBIuJKOVsge0YAodr1ikUZe6VIG8Md9K67LMGCMca4nTXnlUZLvuzjNBNIxTGeX_433jfJ-d7kFkDPrxiFlpjhk5YjxwhkTirxpmxukUayL8s8q7uI5Q813PmMdczZkEYtjZsxNppXINjir2eI8Ke8votPi2R6t7vN1M0zd_cdR_cS-c_xQ-xp9mYs_B3MpR_KlcgMFHDvcZh0msNhJoXkPscg9Y99W5scrd4TX5aWEiv1NelqJaUllQJ0CjTQywJvf_Kwd1pyjTlL2YTRsJNlhS1XIOB5AJ2xCULcPYrjul43uGnXE82YbpQpIPOefeRiHLxnsJBGgF1FxUg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

clean_body: The survey will only take a few moments of your time This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d48eaad7372b46d1859f0df3c13c9c11&_e=kMxSB1Pc-MAnUy7tZEiWMnzWqnwgS1tG078tOCYCLbFPTxn8XpB5KMK39MyeMV0KYK3i4EcQIERE78gLMsVRqO4-2DRJMim4_8uiRkL7FQm0-4_W2y1zQFDd__ADbjoe-emT5Veps8s9Nun-eXWB9Ecpu_RyBjIK5Qjn4A2KxEW0CnmpVZ-gR5SAPG9aV6LhdcqzRd7DEIbNRaI6G-tyOya-qYGnOEyfqUobSm0nDkjFtLXzSJFJNGXhaEniTRNvemic46kbRYgYGLGxWofWCV6m2YPTPROgAyKRcovwkj8r5tNRRhH82XUcwz-5QXAqahnMwXZgP4LmlYRp1iGYE2d41Gf-0otgoAg63H20gsONpPeNeD2-txmrf-ohrYS8-6LqU7ubuB1pfOuZo0AguA%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d48eaad7372b46d1859f0df3c13c9c11&_e=kMxSB1Pc-MAnUy7tZEiWMnzWqnwgS1tG078tOCYCLbFPTxn8XpB5KMK39MyeMV0KYK3i4EcQIERE78gLMsVRqO4-2DRJMim4_8uiRkL7FQm0-4_W2y1zQFDd__ADbjoe-emT5Veps8s9Nun-eXWB9Ecpu_RyBjIK5Qjn4A2KxEW0CnmpVZ-gR5SAPG9aV6LhdcqzRd7DEIbNRaI6G-tyOya-qYGnOEyfqUobSm0nDkhQ7ZWCtJfHVg_O0DoZuYEHzF9ZqZBi0Ydhy7DhQ_XMZCLAyTd1NUuPCx6-6n6dA1fQN4HRuP8WhD28PNILOwlo8_ybFHg3m_58GEPutamkB1KRQhnuI-FoQRPRAqz_b5P_xDfuqQoj54AdQlTw8ryN6AS4qsB9a25gAgmHr9G8QQ%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d48eaad7372b46d1859f0df3c13c9c11&_e=kMxSB1Pc-MAnUy7tZEiWMnzWqnwgS1tG078tOCYCLbFPTxn8XpB5KMK39MyeMV0KYK3i4EcQIERE78gLMsVRqO4-2DRJMim4_8uiRkL7FQm0-4_W2y1zQFDd__ADbjoe-emT5Veps8s9Nun-eXWB9Ecpu_RyBjIK5Qjn4A2KxEW0CnmpVZ-gR5SAPG9aV6LhdcqzRd7DEIbNRaI6G-tyOya-qYGnOEyfqUobSm0nDkhkM1IWdKUwMG0ZPG98larY-ia3KViL9ynb-DtVhKHFRSeMQ0nJ5v_8tDSZqAFBsUGGLU1OMl6KaogmDCchebslOqlu5lpmQAE00BWufKOkpqLj_vpPY_scQObVVVcmerFkoy11YoLNqOmmEqKSD_E_qd8CUWHZQO1KkEr-ZIE4vg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

---

Conservative Liberty Wire

Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Friend,

As was the case in 2016 and during his entire Presidency, virtually all of the media's coverage of Trump consisted of negativity and criticism. And it didn't go unnoticed by the Media Research Center or President Trump.
_" According to Media Research Center, 89% of the media's coverage of our administration has been negative and purposely negative."_ - President Trump

And it's gotten even worse...

MRC analysts looked at all coverage of the Republican candidates on the ABC, CBS, and NBC evening newscasts from January 1 through December 31, 2023, including weekends.

Here's what we found:

In 2023, evening news viewers heard 1,478 negative statements about Trump, vs. just 143 positive statements. That computes to **a 91% negative spin** , on par with the hostile coverage Trump has historically received from these broadcasts.

The left-wing media is already gearing up to lie to us about the 2024 elections. I do believe they will try stealing the election with their lies and bias.

Media Research Center is working to expose and combat efforts by the Radical Left to manipulate the electoral process through bias, deceit, and other forms of manipulation.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Over 3,000 New Hampshire Signatures in 24 Hours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
This achievement is unprecedented, and cannot be overstated.

|
---
| | | **This achievement is unprecedented, and cannot be overstated.
**
---

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newhamp_1_28_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=1)

---
Dear Peter,
The great untold story coming out of the New Hampshire primary—the story missed by many reporters, the mainstream media, and the Democrats and Republicans—was this:
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. collected over 3,000 signatures from voters in New Hampshire in 24 hours...which means he will appear on the ballot in November.
This achievement is unprecedented, and cannot be overstated.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newhamp_1_28_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2)
With that historic victory in New Hampshire, our campaign presses on to achieve ballot access in all of the other states and the District of Columbia—and for that to happen we need your help.
Please consider supporting Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. for President [with a gift of $5, $10, even $15 or more before midnight on January 31](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newhamp_1_28_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=3).
Your contribution will propel this campaign into the mainstream news cycle, onto the debate stage, on your state ballot, and into the White House in 2025.
Perhaps you are in a position to [give $5, $10, $15, or even $24 a month to help us in our historic effort](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newhamp_1_28_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=4). Any amount is a godsend and greatly appreciated!
Thank you for your consideration and support.
Team Kennedy

subject: a few dollars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:

| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfacc5cce-bb5a-4a6a-ab69-4eed568349c6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | _Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District, and we’re working to support him. I hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and Blue Amp Action._ Hey there Peter, my name is Harry Dunn. 3 years ago as a Capitol Police officer, I defended the U.S. Capitol from insurrectionists. Today, I’m running to be the next Democrat to represent Maryland's 3rd District. [**I'm facing a critical end-of-month deadline on Wednesday, so I'm hoping you can chip in just $5 to me and Blue Amp Action before then >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T106f3463-6ad8-48ac-a87e-94877250cb5e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [CHIP IN TO MY CAMPAIGN](https://default.salsalabs.org/T144594b2-7b28-4b3e-9679-bba69bd3a4ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| On January 6th, I fought on the frontlines to stop Donald Trump and his MAGA mob from overturning a free and fair election. I witnessed my fellow officers be beaten bloody and attacked by people with hate in their heart. I defended members of Congress who invited the violence into the Capitol. I returned to work, despite the trauma, and watched horrified as those same members refused to take action or even denounce the violence. That day showed me just how fragile and precious our democracy is. **We need fighters in Congress who are willing to show up to hold far-right extremists accountable.** I’m running because I’m passionate about this and I’m not going to sit back and wait for someone else to do it. But Trump and his rabid supporters will stop at _NOTHING_ to stop me from winning this open seat. [**I set a huge end-of-month goal of $100,000 and I need your help to crush it and show we've got the grassroots power behind this campaign to win! Can you chip in even just $5 to me and Blue Amp Action to join us in this fight?** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T020dcf37-69cb-410d-8d4a-24937848f206/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e6989d2-87a8-40ce-b721-a2502bee5d51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| With love, Harry
---
| | |
---
|

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Elissa Slotkin for Senate
subject: Emailing for $8
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1072%2E135344%2EGKRrP_)

Hey there -- we're writing to ask you to make an $8 donation today to support Elissa Slotkin’s campaign for Senate in Michigan.
Why $8? Because that’s the cost of a 6-pack of Michigan’s famous Vernors Ginger Ale -- one of the most quintessential Michigan staples known to all residents of our great state. We drink it at barbecues, at the game, and when our kids have a stomach ache.
The truth is that as strange as it sounds, these small dollar donations really do matter. It takes a village to elect a leader like Elissa to the Senate, and it’s so important that we maintain a steady pace of support.
A few months ago, we had our first serious Republican opponent, Mike Rogers, enter the race. One of his recent FEC reports was filled with donations from a bunch of members of Betsy DeVos's family — contributions totaling $46,200 all made on one single day. And there are plenty of other deep-pocketed Republican donors who are backing his campaign because they know that their path to control the Senate runs right through Michigan.
With public polling showing our race in a dead heat, we have to be prepared to match our Republican opponent dollar-for-dollar so we can defend this open seat and protect our slim Democratic Senate majority.
We know that $8 may not sound like a lot on its own. But trust us that we wouldn’t keep asking if it didn’t add up when there are hundreds of people chipping in and showing their support. It’s how we’ve won our past campaigns and it’s how we plan to keep up the momentum to win this race too.
[**If you are able, will you make an $8 contribution to our campaign for Senate today? It’s not as much about how much you give, but how many people are coming together to show their support for Elissa and this campaign.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1405?c0=ebs-em-jan24.WaWPYD&refcode=em240128-1-15&t=2&akid=1072%2E135344%2EGKRrP_)**
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $8](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1403?c0=ebs-em-jan24.veKOFg&refcode=em240128-1-15&t=3&akid=1072%2E135344%2EGKRrP_)**
---
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-jan24.OTW_eo&refcode=em240128-1-15&t=4&akid=1072%2E135344%2EGKRrP_)**
---
Thank you,
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=1072%2E135344%2EGKRrP_).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=1072%2E135344%2EGKRrP_)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

It's Kari Lake, and I'm currently in the fight of my life trying to **save the soul of America in Arizona.**

No matter what happens, I'm never going to give up. I'm in this fight for ALL OF US. I will NEVER SURRENDER.

If Arizona is lost, the country is lost.

We must preserve what we have left and FIGHT to save this state and our conservative values.

We must preserve what we have left and FIGHT to save this state and our conservative values. | Thank you, and God Bless you. Kari Lake Candidate for U.S. Senate in Arizona Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, .
