disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
The DSCC has announced an 8 figure spend in Montana and Ohio. I need your support to make sure Schumer can’t buy this seat. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=5221cd38224648d1b6c172045841f2df&_t=AsMKHDJA42mUOonPLpnBuI86QE8kqngUryhqGy2fIz7vyXynwewhDy06KOPVYQBU-YqG_I9ZB9_GElgfM3YhG5aFJ-ezB85yVT4_v-PD7Gw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=5221cd38224648d1b6c172045841f2df&_t=AsMKHDJA42mUOonPLpnBuI86QE8kqngUryhqGy2fIz7vyXynwewhDy06KOPVYQBU-YqG_I9ZB9_GElgfM3YhG5aFJ-ezB85yVT4_v-PD7Gw%3D)
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5221cd38224648d1b6c172045841f2df&_e=fSfr6TkaAKYWzDXRWTH22Tr-qCH24mdUfIKKy5b_Gut7Lck7e_VP7ppo7RRq_n4dyuAEKAChok2qYbMJ4qWFBin_tTe8o3uJMuDQO5JtNlPJJmoKHOTGzNU5Qs16l1JwHpP-g3KU3evL7vDYorRJCYCla7Tg-FEF4AQQ212iE8rNNBmjT-h97taeRqslHxEx8EQIDa42cCREYFfI0H0h9EQ0V33iT83uYMeTqqZmKgKlqFoPNP-Ok5enA0VKZhCpWCMPFTSaU-jnBGl-c-6Rjsg5ElGubmM-Bt_gBQqIak_hUpeKIDZqMYD6sN_ty66uwdY2K8f6B37Mx6g44k97Gr_YFf-YqHgQodXcRR0QS9QM6IoenV7UiHRbMz1X0VlcucbOptF47QnQYTKUNikb75QH0ht2e5ZCtiCan2hz7MY%3D)

Peter,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5221cd38224648d1b6c172045841f2df&_e=fSfr6TkaAKYWzDXRWTH22Tr-qCH24mdUfIKKy5b_Gut7Lck7e_VP7ppo7RRq_n4dyuAEKAChok2qYbMJ4qWFBin_tTe8o3uJMuDQO5JtNlPJJmoKHOTGzNU5Qs16l1JwHpP-g3KU3evL7vDYorRJCYCla7Tg-FEF4AQQ212iE8rNNBmjT-h97taeRqslHxEx8EQIDa42cCREYFfI0H0h9EQ0V33iT83uYMeTqqZmKgKlqFoPNP-Ok5enA0VKZhCpQ2BtL7Mbdo0_o_9dB3xQ8vPEuiDJlYvCHSrzeeydFQFljx-hirNR5-zTPJbh_lJbPPhtDFmEEUbezaOgDa7qYQuEv6iFCE3zQvY8xk2OQzRGxEOfrkICmivoJBJinmT0EkqcbRNjOJ-89Nfb1DXq_keVQXNlUWAKqfr0rVQSQ58%3D)**.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5221cd38224648d1b6c172045841f2df&_e=fSfr6TkaAKYWzDXRWTH22Tr-qCH24mdUfIKKy5b_Gut7Lck7e_VP7ppo7RRq_n4dyuAEKAChok2qYbMJ4qWFBin_tTe8o3uJMuDQO5JtNlPJJmoKHOTGzNU5Qs16l1JwHpP-g3KU3evL7vDYorRJCYCla7Tg-FEF4AQQ212iE8rNNBmjT-h97taeRqslHxEx8EQIDa42cCREYFfI0H0h9EQ0V33iT83uYMeTqqZmKgKlqFoPNP-Ok5enA0VKZhCpjVXm12nYH4G-AlAVV6-xgulvPs1dywxvuNK7y5jPqjopWoBwKhZsfEFd4vWE1dbBNcPuojTVna6tDYnucOXcavVGrgl99DTYU05uMAuPZ1R36zZBGnhyIRe0fPXBP-r9_XgOynsb1mAK7wKRvCgHu_9GN69rIqCxVOqJ2NtZn8w%3D)
In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

**[Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5221cd38224648d1b6c172045841f2df&_e=fSfr6TkaAKYWzDXRWTH22Tr-qCH24mdUfIKKy5b_Gut7Lck7e_VP7ppo7RRq_n4dyuAEKAChok2qYbMJ4qWFBin_tTe8o3uJMuDQO5JtNlPJJmoKHOTGzNU5Qs16l1JwHpP-g3KU3evL7vDYorRJCYCla7Tg-FEF4AQQ212iE8rNNBmjT-h97taeRqslHxEx8EQIDa42cCREYFfI0H0h9EQ0V33iT83uYMeTqqZmKgKlqFoPNP-Ok5enA0VKZhCp3F41b843Q40QhAXNhmFPscNJRMfHkrde7kNZNgNQ1ws5-HQ6mZIhSlnj0ueWZ9xrfQc_DADeO9JdSJ-Ufwz9wnjna1F-TuzlGmtjZ-E_XRjE14SYl--zNSHywzOxMtPaHVNSbMvxCTWfFPfG0v-pPXlYWdKr1RLgePwQKkgr8uQ%3D)**

_**Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. **_

Peter, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5221cd38224648d1b6c172045841f2df&_e=fSfr6TkaAKYWzDXRWTH22Tr-qCH24mdUfIKKy5b_Gut7Lck7e_VP7ppo7RRq_n4dyuAEKAChok2qYbMJ4qWFBin_tTe8o3uJMuDQO5JtNlPJJmoKHOTGzNU5Qs16l1JwHpP-g3KU3evL7vDYorRJCYCla7Tg-FEF4AQQ212iE8rNNBmjT-h97taeRqslHxEx8EQIDa42cCREYFfI0H0h9EQ0V33iT83uYMeTqqZmKgKlqFoPNP-Ok5enA0VKZhCpM9J8zLVEu8kmE2zq0onZm-dTLEN-40WWU-fI5tZzYH0QrbODjfE6bZCPpTAz5RrekiI9H_a3jpVw-v31pynLKWmDVsR-EDjCBJCwjSSWD3Sin3fM213jnFCiKM7O7yuaJ-XNLkR-ZI2YXtKbE8qnhhYl5P60bvTUP6VJ5Im6hiU%3D)
[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5221cd38224648d1b6c172045841f2df&_e=fSfr6TkaAKYWzDXRWTH22Tr-qCH24mdUfIKKy5b_Gut7Lck7e_VP7ppo7RRq_n4dyuAEKAChok2qYbMJ4qWFBin_tTe8o3uJMuDQO5JtNlPJJmoKHOTGzNU5Qs16l1JwHpP-g3KU3evL7vDYorRJCYCla7Tg-FEF4AQQ212iE8rNNBmjT-h97taeRqslHxEx8EQIDa42cCREYFfI0H0h9EQ0V33iT83uYMeTqqZmKgKlqFoPNP-Ok5enA0VKZhCpbpROsGKE5CCTGWo79f_SFFVODppjWqsHIUnvMWWhCRuk-hOoFl4Zgq5ni1Z2LY6x-_auPdsu4gYd_J0evHCfrysUVluB0FZ7ldqkj8UjIFmrNgq_vGQ012HNCPMjOEjndfwkkpJv7HUHx2w6VA8Hpj3dTl99hi7jvwPEDEMFDHM%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5221cd38224648d1b6c172045841f2df&_e=fSfr6TkaAKYWzDXRWTH22Tr-qCH24mdUfIKKy5b_Gut7Lck7e_VP7ppo7RRq_n4dyuAEKAChok2qYbMJ4qWFBin_tTe8o3uJMuDQO5JtNlPJJmoKHOTGzNU5Qs16l1JwHpP-g3KU3evL7vDYorRJCYCla7Tg-FEF4AQQ212iE8rNNBmjT-h97taeRqslHxEx8EQIDa42cCREYFfI0H0h9EQ0V33iT83uYMeTqqZmKgKlqFoPNP-Ok5enA0VKZhCp6EtjBhmuIvRxM7llh3eD9wJSvexsmua6GijmV7Sh7vCbUMZKAHhG2oCnApSRcX8crzwxM1lvoQ4SrTZbZ2LpQtRh2xTO_4NU4SdlXqPgU6gnXDw2dtS0IoVtavpEXf5h3F6eu74-MV1tI0sIN9tcM7rrWolnw9tk0UEpaCScLqo%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5221cd38224648d1b6c172045841f2df&_e=fSfr6TkaAKYWzDXRWTH22Tr-qCH24mdUfIKKy5b_Gut7Lck7e_VP7ppo7RRq_n4dyuAEKAChok2qYbMJ4qWFBin_tTe8o3uJMuDQO5JtNlPJJmoKHOTGzNU5Qs16l1JwHpP-g3KU3evL7vDYorRJCYCla7Tg-FEF4AQQ212iE8rNNBmjT-h97taeRqslHxEx8EQIDa42cCREYFfI0H0h9EQ0V33iT83uYMeTqqZmKgKlqFoPNP-Ok5enA0VKZhCpe_aWcldPYSuE0XOS23qzMUKpTSfO0MmFv-fsq9xiSxlsuUYj-cS0vb4CHOhuX_02MNJh8nD01hnAZik7V6pK3I5yyWkhRFeLzq04nbjohNk5QemGGlpd1va68oHfmJoolJcdrnvPtDnnuglG4Td25ypCF1h7Lp3cVS4R02KRGDM%3D)

Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

**The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in 2024.**

[**We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington, Peter. I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5221cd38224648d1b6c172045841f2df&_e=fSfr6TkaAKYWzDXRWTH22Tr-qCH24mdUfIKKy5b_Gut7Lck7e_VP7ppo7RRq_n4dyuAEKAChok2qYbMJ4qWFBin_tTe8o3uJMuDQO5JtNlPJJmoKHOTGzNU5Qs16l1JwHpP-g3KU3evL7vDYorRJCYCla7Tg-FEF4AQQ212iE8rNNBmjT-h97taeRqslHxEx8EQIDa42cCREYFfI0H0h9EQ0V33iT83uYMeTqqZmKgKlqFoPNP-Ok5enA0VKZhCp62AAMvDxB0Qpa7UmjM0jJocnTz5oPqJIy-oQiVUDXaTYP8SI4H7SM-L0KK57Ky-S-aohULmj9losHuovUgUcId74xdgUJlqu-V-D6MWCDoKo1JnC_NYwg0RHM1C2iMO0BrWvT5QB7vbQqzDurHgCOVjV9CAutI8MPMWq3G7SGGo%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5221cd38224648d1b6c172045841f2df&_e=fSfr6TkaAKYWzDXRWTH22Tr-qCH24mdUfIKKy5b_Gut7Lck7e_VP7ppo7RRq_n4dyuAEKAChok2qYbMJ4qWFBin_tTe8o3uJMuDQO5JtNlPJJmoKHOTGzNU5Qs16l1JwHpP-g3KU3evL7vDYorRJCYCla7Tg-FEF4AQQ212iE8rNNBmjT-h97taeRqslHxEx8EQIDa42cCREYFfI0H0h9EQ0V33iT83uYMeTqqZmKgKlqFoPNP-Ok5enA0VKZhCpJw7_7cImfncOnoMlE1jgJ8iBAGBAMduzcgWpK1xrPNdGUZBcFM0p-yrj4R-M2rPKH7KfG1rP_1oI8AJUQIIiZF6aXsvzut4UUvO5Puz0eSt2bsFPRaf0HWN3bl_3zEQcfIwnyjxxwPFTM0VFBkf6D7rXUct841fZtG-DZ_8V3zM%3D)

Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, **I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list.** The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election.

_***If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play.***_

clean_body: The DSCC has announced an 8 figure spend in Montana and Ohio. I need your support to make sure Schumer can’t buy this seat. | | Peter, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority. . In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. Peter, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in 2024. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50ab204599fe41e4b967c4c6f2ed9ffb&_e=cCc8KO4QKh0LEYxmjKf3EJABz9q1_GCuA-A5LvJLM03TK2VoursaN2QsYU4f61Y-ZoQbjayID-alWMvKj6vlckNY7sxxZbSjDmPBieAFKDMy9DAMrWUYp9qRojb6xjm4sgIPrqmacXomUFwneL6hWJ4y-wm492cQMKig0EKKdLBhmvzRS4IUen_lwLgCXVqaFhzVtgSs05XJUJ4_Qiun56kB3YPxJ0nolaer1lh-nulwva5Y7w4jAz_D6N7WWbqvtVAbM1yMTok-8911eMhFMH7lVf0UTfbFki00x4iDAM0LyTVGdp82Piykij9eFonF). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50ab204599fe41e4b967c4c6f2ed9ffb&_e=cCc8KO4QKh0LEYxmjKf3EJABz9q1_GCuA-A5LvJLM03TK2VoursaN2QsYU4f61Y-ZoQbjayID-alWMvKj6vlckNY7sxxZbSjDmPBieAFKDMy9DAMrWUYp9qRojb6xjm4sgIPrqmacXomUFwneL6hWJaEKjLqypccD-pqs0AmFd4A9OYumcxKujcPcInq_AUuiiDVDeDCgNIVK4pccNQc80ALD0hCog_cyPQvYOSRaJotTNIxu8NYsNqUDaBGdLWZ63K8hTB8thwckaQyVflFrjO4AOYfN_jwh9t6QOYYc27GkNbkdUuAMsjdUNLLcAQb) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50ab204599fe41e4b967c4c6f2ed9ffb&_e=cCc8KO4QKh0LEYxmjKf3EJABz9q1_GCuA-A5LvJLM03TK2VoursaN2QsYU4f61Y-ZoQbjayID-alWMvKj6vlckNY7sxxZbSjDmPBieAFKDMy9DAMrWUYp9qRojb6xjm4sgIPrqmacXomUFwneL6hWF-eKHHDopz3opxEBtOVS8_azG0MPri6sT2h7bPDQ1R86mT3PvxYIpTfE2rVaJlkytBvuuJ-nqaG_5KFIoO6mDVJNAPrayxfAWaqOyw1Xp4r0R2mfYvKJUA-14QbMJXMqv6oujPlTHhWz8O9C3KewMpZGenkbDszKbj6ahsXdOmW) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

Defend the Constitution

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=50ab204599fe41e4b967c4c6f2ed9ffb&_t=g-UIVPww-ehA8PZFsBYey4qbF72usgA-X-Tq52xvHkiXMcRz3HLJZeCf8iDWqmKzoTw5BVfTwUFgNySyCLIf5nL9dsTQ2WzbzeO4eRgyQbUqeZTC2ALIxq6U-X23yVe_rFPkFudQHraR-_RIivIluGpcseUeldwQwCegR2xWzfs%3D)

name: Harry Dunn
subject: $5 can change the game
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

_"Hi, it's Ruben. My friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District, and we’re working to support him. I hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and mine."
_
* * *

Hey there Peter, my name is Harry Dunn.
3 years ago as a Capitol Police officer, I defended the U.S. Capitol from insurrectionists. Today, I’m running to be the next Democrat to represent Maryland's 3rd District.
**[I'm facing a critical end-of-month deadline on Wednesday, so I'm hoping you can chip in just $5 to me and Ruben Gallego before then >>**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dunn.SH4loA&refcode=em240128-1-120&t=1&akid=1863%2E734936%2Es8jL4H)
[CHIP IN TO MY CAMPAIGN](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dunn.SH4loA&refcode=em240128-1-120&t=2&akid=1863%2E734936%2Es8jL4H)
On January 6th, I fought on the frontlines to stop Donald Trump and his MAGA mob from overturning a free and fair election. I witnessed my fellow officers be beaten bloody and attacked by people with hate in their heart.
I defended members of Congress who invited the violence into the Capitol. I returned to work, despite the trauma, and watched horrified as those same members refused to take action or even denounce the violence.
That day showed me just how fragile and precious our democracy is. **We need fighters in Congress who are willing to show up to hold far-right extremists accountable.**
I’m running because I’m passionate about this and I’m not going to sit back and wait for someone else to do it. But Trump and his rabid supporters will stop at _NOTHING_ to stop me from winning this open seat.
**[I set a huge end-of-month goal of $100,000 and I need your help to crush it and show we've got the grassroots power behind this campaign to win! Can you chip in even just $5 to me and Ruben Gallego to join us in this fight?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dunn.SH4loA&refcode=em240128-1-120&t=3&akid=1863%2E734936%2Es8jL4H)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

It didn’t take long, team: Tammy had barely launched her campaign before the attacks began pouring in. They’re attacks most men will never deal with, but they’re all too familiar to many women. Men in the media are implying that Tammy’s work to solve New Jersey’s maternal and infant mortality crisis — work that addressed systemic racism, improved NJ’s national ranking for maternal deaths from 47th to 27th, and ultimately saved lives — is overblown and unimportant. Opponents are claiming outright that Tammy’s not ready for this fight, despite her six years of statewide leadership and long track record of accomplishments. And nearly everywhere she goes, Tammy’s held to a higher standard and faces tougher questions than most men. _("I'm not sure a male would be asked this question," she recently fired back.)_ But Tammy's not backing down, and neither are we. **Tammy has spent much of her life as the only woman in rooms filled with powerful men, and she’s made a difference every time.** **[If you’re ready to elect Tammy as the first woman Senator in New Jersey’s history, please chip in today to reach our first monthly fundraising goal. | | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=01ef30e002c64e64ad32b2952d484f51&_e=lL2DQgTd-ZKtdanM17sckuq7pucqjzJAvRmbfDWTvRWRnRNhzZDJo1dB7_HWj_pRAwR09UqeH3E9OW-vY9aIlqlj84ftG4enERd_sul1cDNPfZwVGkzXp4-30YkyAH7E82LhWvOvyp4RtHUBWZC3h89DjI40Zjkx6hjuJ0TllDs8B3qUhmbziCctmzYVDHlnS5Ks0zqnWrp96gD3OGISW5dhouOYYdUGxO2sJ-ACzbX8JOfzgjkamZaBwKfAdk9MK5m8DL-7kCBrvAfjRLp_nfwy9qXXWAP5KzwuSyahghfOMiFBjpcLby39itTjwF3Gf8beeSqAB57DqRHTBNZGhk1ccHl6zlJ5qc3yVn1zoZNNSEC0A15mzJfQH9xPHsg8)

| | Peter, I’ve been blessed with so many amazing opportunities. From escaping communist tyranny in Vietnam and coming to America to having the privilege of a lifetime to serve for 25 years in the United States Navy, I am so grateful for the experiences I’ve had because I live in the greatest country on Earth.

That’s why I’m giving 110% to our mission of taking back the U.S. Senate!
_But just because we’re working overtime doesn’t mean victory is guaranteed by any measure._

I’m up against one of the most well-connected politicians in the swamp, and he’s raising millions to not only defeat me but silence me for good.

**And even though he has endless deep pockets, I’ve never been one to shy away from a challenge.**

**[I need 310 conservatives to pitch in before our end-of-month deadline in just THREE DAYS, and I’m counting on you.](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=01ef30e002c64e64ad32b2952d484f51&_e=lL2DQgTd-ZKtdanM17sckuq7pucqjzJAvRmbfDWTvRWRnRNhzZDJo1dB7_HWj_pRAwR09UqeH3E9OW-vY9aIlqlj84ftG4enERd_sul1cDNPfZwVGkzXp4-30YkyAH7E82LhWvOvyp4RtHUBWZC3h89DjI40Zjkx6hjuJ0TllDs8B3qUhmbziCctmzYVDHlnS5Ks0zqnWrp96gD3OGISW5dhouOYYdUGxO2sJ-ACzbXQW0pPYhOO0mhiFEAEEaZynUzbr4x8iTJ2Ny6xdRHzPsbM8Bveq0knjTpDMVNGNOFeczm-HLrpR-bQBYrC0tjIfML84jegeCdeZ2b1kOcjloVK5svjnCLjxaXCh-nKKKZQ3QHXrDyMCCFY5lfYIR2s)**

Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. Now, he’s running for Senate to defend it from the next generation. Hung Cao came to America with little besides the clothes on his back, and after his 25-year career in the Navy, he’s not done fighting for our future. clean_body: | | | | | Peter, I’ve been blessed with so many amazing opportunities. From escaping communist tyranny in Vietnam and coming to America to having the privilege of a lifetime to serve for 25 years in the United States Navy, I am so grateful for the experiences I’ve had because I live in the greatest country on Earth. That’s why I’m giving 110% to our mission of taking back the U.S. Senate! But just because we’re working overtime doesn’t mean victory is guaranteed by any measure. I’m up against one of the most well-connected politicians in the swamp, and he’s raising millions to not only defeat me but silence me for good. And even though he has endless deep pockets, I’ve never been one to shy away from a challenge. This is our FIRST end-of-month deadline of the election year. This campaign is truly grassroots-powered, and I need you in this moment more than ever. Thank you, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 | Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. Now, he’s running for Senate to defend it from the next generation. Hung Cao came to America with little besides the clothes on his back, and after his 25-year career in the Navy, he’s not done fighting for our future. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Dear Friend,
Things are moving fast on Team Daniels, and everyone is pitching-in. First up is petition signature gathering. We have to collect 1,000 signatures from registered Democrats in PA-10 in order to appear on the Democratic Primary ballot. Our team has set a goal of 2,000+ signatures to demonstrate the grassroots strength of our campaign. To get the job done, we're hosting or attending petition signing events in every corner of the district, and we have dozens of volunteers on the streets collecting signatures door to door. In fact everyone is pitching-in, including our youngest and cutest volunteer (at least in my opinion, but I may be biased).
It's also the end of the month, and we are asking you to pitch-in too by making a contribution today. In addition to our normal campaign functions, supporting the efforts of dozens of volunteers is expensive. That means that it's imperative that we meet our January fundraising goal.
CLICK HERE to pitch-in $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or whatever you can afford to make sure we reach our goal before midnight on Wednesday! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Thank you for your continued support!
- Shamaine
Donate Now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]

Daniels For Congress
2018 North 3rd Street
Harrisburg, PA 17102
United States

The Trump campaign just put a statement up on the official Trump website in response to our ad, “Gold Star Parents.”
#
We have absolutely terrified Trump, Derek.
The Trump campaign just put a statement up on the official Trump website in response to our ad, “Gold Star Parents.”
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan24-goldstar.KoowZf&refcode=em240128-1-30&t=1&akid=23671%2E3013755%2El1_1QD)
“Gold Star Parents” hits Trump on ground that he thinks is safe.
It’s a powerful ad because real Gold Star Parents are speaking out against Trump — mothers and fathers who have made a sacrifice for our country that few can imagine.
We’re running it in targeted media markets, in front of Americans who can be persuaded to turn against Trump when they’re faced with the reality of the disparaging comments he’s made about our fallen heroes.
It’s so bad for Trump that his campaign has resorted to attacking those Gold Star Parents — but we have their back.
Now, when you have your opponent on their heels, you don’t pull back.
You advance.
**[So we’re asking you to chip in $5 right away so we can keep the pressure up on Trump. name: Jon Tester
subject: In a minute
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I need to be brutally honest, Peter, we’re just not on track.
**[So in a minute, I’ll ask you to pitch in a split donation between my campaign and Bob Casey to help us reach our first end-of-month goal of 2024.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240128-1?refcode=em20240128-1&refcode2=1829_552475_O9yKoe&akid=1829%2E552475%2EO9yKoe)** But first, let me explain why I even have to ask.
**[Become a 2024 Founding Donor »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240128-1?refcode=em20240128-1&refcode2=1829_552475_O9yKoe&akid=1829%2E552475%2EO9yKoe)**
I’m reaching out today because fundraising is a necessary part of running a grassroots campaign, **and this is our first monthly deadline of 2024.**
In short, if we don’t hit this goal, national Republicans will think this seat is ripe for the taking and could increase their spending tenfold. That means more misinformation, baseless attacks, and dark money will flood our state.
With all of this in mind, I hope you don’t mind when I ask:
**[Will you split a donation between my reelection campaign and Bob Casey today so we can close the gap on this critical deadline and show my opponents that this team means business? **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240128-1?refcode=em20240128-1&refcode2=1829_552475_O9yKoe&akid=1829%2E552475%2EO9yKoe)** Every dollar you give brings us one step closer to winning this thing come Election Day. Thanks for whatever you’re able to pitch in, Jon

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=1829%2E552475%2EO9yKoe)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1829%2E552475%2EO9yKoe)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102 Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com) PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

With all of this in mind, I hope you don’t mind when I ask: Every dollar you give brings us one step closer to winning this thing come Election Day. Thanks for whatever you’re able to pitch in, Jon

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Lucas isn’t running to make a point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This is a race we can win.
#
Peter,
Josh Hawley has spent his career using his position and power to ban abortion in our country. But now that abortion rights are going on the ballot in Missouri — the same year of Hawley’s first re-election campaign — he suddenly “defers to the voters.”
**So let’s just review what Missouri voters have accomplished over the last several years — and why Hawley is terrified about what could happen this November.**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43221?refcode=em20240128-4694&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4694%2E614464%2EAjacfA)**
**2018 —** Missourians rejected an anti-union “Right-to-Work” law and voted to raise the minimum wage from $7.85 to $12.00 with HUGE statewide margins.
**2020 —** Voters approved Medicaid expansion in Missouri.
**2022 —** Missouri voters legalized recreational weed.
**Missourians have broken with Josh Hawley on all these issues because they’re tired of corrupt politicians like him trying to control their lives.**
That means our campaign to replace Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate isn’t just about making a point — **this is a race we can win.**
**But we need your help to do it, Peter.** GOP mega-donors are already dumping money into our race hoping it’ll slow down our record-breaking grassroots movement. They even put over $1 MILLION into a Super PAC to attack Lucas early in this race. So now we have to ask:
**[If you’re ready to help Missourians take back their power one more time by defeating Josh Hawley and protecting abortion access this year, will you add a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43221?refcode=em20240128-4694&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4694%2E614464%2EAjacfA)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43222?refcode=em20240128-4694&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=4694%2E614464%2EAjacfA) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43222?refcode=em20240128-4694&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=4694%2E614464%2EAjacfA) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43222?refcode=em20240128-4694&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=4694%2E614464%2EAjacfA) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43222?refcode=em20240128-4694&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=4694%2E614464%2EAjacfA) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43222?refcode=em20240128-4694&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=4694%2E614464%2EAjacfA) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43222?refcode=em20240128-4694&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=4694%2E614464%2EAjacfA) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43221?refcode=em20240128-4694&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=4694%2E614464%2EAjacfA)

name: Team Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: We’re just a few days away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
We can’t take our rights for granted in 2024. |
#
---
We hate to reach out on a Sunday, team, especially before the big game (go Lions!!), but we wouldn’t do this if it wasn’t so important. We’re just a few days away from our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2024. We want to take a moment to explain in more detail why your support is so important — **[but before we do, can you chip in to Team Fight Like Hell PAC today to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77894112/451823567/232286791?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240128_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTdlOTVhMmMtZjJiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gselJNjcTwxVJx8uLgXFyNbts7yF_kdIlM6i72Rc9mI=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77894117/451823570/232286791?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240128_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTdlOTVhMmMtZjJiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gselJNjcTwxVJx8uLgXFyNbts7yF_kdIlM6i72Rc9mI=)
---
Governor Gretchen Whitmer promised voters that she would protect our fundamental rights in Michigan — and that’s exactly what she’s done.
**But let’s be clear about the stakes in this year’s election: if we lose, an extremist Republican-led national abortion ban would eliminate the right to an abortion in all 50 states, including in Michigan.**
That’s why we can’t take this for granted.

clean_body: We can’t take our rights for granted in 2024. | We hate to reach out on a Sunday, team, especially before the big game (go Lions!!), but we wouldn’t do this if it wasn’t so important. We’re just a few days away from our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2024. We want to take a moment to explain in more detail why your support is so important — = | = Governor Gretchen Whitmer promised voters that she would protect our fundamental rights in Michigan — and that’s exactly what she’s done. But let’s be clear about the stakes in this year’s election: if we lose, an extremist Republican-led national abortion ban would eliminate the right to an abortion in all 50 states, including in Michigan. That’s why we can’t take this for granted. Governor Whitmer has spent this month traveling throughout the state and speaking to voters about the dangers that far-right Republicans pose to our fundamental freedoms. But to continue the conversation and keep mobilizing voters, we’ll need your support to fuel this grassroots effort. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Extreme Republicans are very clear about their plans to pass a national abortion ban. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsVOlT-iNh

ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osVOlT-iNh

Fellow
American,

There is
a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me
worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the
Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and
signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only
intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Are you
concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our
founding-Religious Liberty?

In
addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous
examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v.
BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL
RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few
examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to
faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to
their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act,
brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal
Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and
organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex
marriage failed.

This has
the potential to only intensify legal persecution against
individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to
faith-based values.

The
American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to
preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation
for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty,
Community, and Life.

Whether
it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield
after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a
cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I
am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?

Please
share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning
religious liberty in America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62734938:sVOlT-iNh:m:3:2532013465:CA04CCAE22E28FE1C376322286F59166:r

Thank you
for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isVOlT-iNh

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osVOlT-iNh

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-73956228654-echo3-12B863F3046627098BB377C7D15FDE88@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: An update on Josh Hawley’s mission to criminalize abortion nationwide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Peter,

From overturning _Roe_ to banning abortion drugs, Josh Hawley turned his mission to criminalize abortion nationwide into a family business — and he’s abused his power to do it. **Please let me explain:**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77894942/451826146/-524863724?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240128_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmODRhOWRjLWYyYmQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QK9qVXJtfG-eHWItMXleAq1Gh1FPYmMp0klzmuk8I_Q=) | ****[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77894943/451826151/-524863724?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240128_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmODRhOWRjLWYyYmQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QK9qVXJtfG-eHWItMXleAq1Gh1FPYmMp0klzmuk8I_Q=)****
---

**IN 2017:** Matt Kacsmaryk was nominated to be a federal judge for the north Texas district court.

His confirmation stalled for years. We learned he even lied to hide just how bizarre his obsession with controlling people’s bodies really is:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77894944/451826152/-524863724?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240128_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmODRhOWRjLWYyYmQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QK9qVXJtfG-eHWItMXleAq1Gh1FPYmMp0klzmuk8I_Q=)
**IN 2018:** While his nomination languished in the Senate, Kacsmaryk made an investment in his future.

So he became a campaign donor to Josh Hawley, a fellow member of the Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs.

**IN 2019:** Now a U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley decided to make Kacsmaryk, his campaign donor, a federal judge.

Hawley confirmed Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court — despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms.

**IN 2022:** A lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court by activist lawyers seeking to ban an abortion pill that millions have used safely. Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions.

**Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77894945/451826153/-524863724?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240128_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmODRhOWRjLWYyYmQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QK9qVXJtfG-eHWItMXleAq1Gh1FPYmMp0klzmuk8I_Q=)
**APRIL 2023:** Hawley’s donor judge ruled in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s wife, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill mifepristone in all 50 states.

**This was the first time a judge has ever unilaterally tried to take a drug off the market against FDA objections.**

Then, in his official capacity as U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley submitted an amicus brief demanding that the Supreme Court end a temporary injunction blocking the ruling (in his wife's lawsuit) by a judge (his campaign donor) to ban America's most commonly-used abortion medication.

**AND NOW: We’ve learned that the mifepristone case (led by Hawley’s wife) is being reviewed by the Supreme Court.**

But this is hardly the first time that the Hawley family business has made it all the way to the Supreme Court:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77894946/451826154/-524863724?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240128_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmODRhOWRjLWYyYmQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QK9qVXJtfG-eHWItMXleAq1Gh1FPYmMp0klzmuk8I_Q=)
**This is what corruption looks like — and in 2024, we’re going to make Hawley own it.** [So if you’re ready to end these Big Brother attacks on abortion and send a real warrior for working people to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate, please split a donation of $15 or whatever you can afford between my grassroots campaign and Defeat Republicans right now. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77894947/451826155/-524863724?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240128_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmODRhOWRjLWYyYmQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QK9qVXJtfG-eHWItMXleAq1Gh1FPYmMp0klzmuk8I_Q=)

**[Other Amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77894952/451826160/-524863724?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240128_1_1&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmODRhOWRjLWYyYmQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QK9qVXJtfG-eHWItMXleAq1Gh1FPYmMp0klzmuk8I_Q=)**

Senators shouldn’t be in the business of using their position to benefit their family’s legal careers and activism — especially if there’s financial incentive to do so. And there shouldn’t even be a _hint_ of campaign donations impacting who, when, and how a judge gets on a court.

When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll vote to restore _Roe v. Wade._ But I’ll also fight to end corruption like this by:

1\. Barring Senators from voting on judicial nominees who’ve given to their campaigns.

2\. Barring Senators from lobbying any court to benefit an immediate relative.

**Everyday Missourians deserve a Senator who will stand up and fight for their personal freedoms — not another corrupt politician obsessed with controlling our bodies, families, and lives — and I’m ready to serve.**

[If you’re with me, please split a donation of $15 or whatever you can afford between our grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and Defeat Republicans today. Real people like you are the only folks I ever want to be accountable to in the U.S. Senate, so your support means the world to me. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77894953/451826161/-524863724?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240128_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmODRhOWRjLWYyYmQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QK9qVXJtfG-eHWItMXleAq1Gh1FPYmMp0klzmuk8I_Q=)

name: Hill's iPhone
subject: back on my phone
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20240128&t=1&akid=903%2E62735%2EbFfJ5k)
Hey there Peter, it’s Hill! Sorry to bother you on a weekend like this but I wanted to share a few quick thoughts.
We’ve only got 3 days left of January and we’re *just* past the halfway point of raising towards our $10,000 end of month goal.
Now more than ever, we need to work together to take our work to the next level in 2024. We don’t have time to slow down.
With everything I do in life — from giving back to my community, raising my son Pierce, being on set, managing my small business, or running for Senate — I approach with passion and without holding back.
I hope that our supporters can echo that same sentiment as we come together to grow this movement into one powerful enough that we can change Michigan for the better.
All the effort and work that we put into our movement right now will reflect come election day.
That’s why I’m personally asking you to chip in right here, right now:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240128?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240128??amount=5&refcode=em20240128-903)
Have a great rest of your Sunday,
Hill 💙
Sent from my iPhone
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20240128&t=2&refcode2=903_62735_bFfJ5k&akid=903%2E62735%2EbFfJ5k)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Hill Harper for Michigan

Lansing, MI 48901

name: Conservative Broadcast
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Tl17BAPPqHzpX6SLFxVypA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnmRX4P0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtQ0ItMjAyNDAxMjhXA3NwY0IKZbHTdrZlCgEMx1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Tl17BAPPqHzpX6SLFxVypA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnmRX4P0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtQ0ItMjAyNDAxMjhXA3NwY0IKZbHTdrZlCgEMx1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Tl17BAPPqHzpX6SLFxVypA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnmRX4P0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtQ0ItMjAyNDAxMjhXA3NwY0IKZbHTdrZlCgEMx1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservative Broadcast

clean_body: The survey will only take a few moments of your time This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College ~ Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: ~ The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ~** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~~ | ~~

body:
Finstad for Congress

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDkzNzQwNzIS1&r=MTYyNDE1OTk1MzM1OAS2&j=MjYyMzEzMTI5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0).

| | Friend - A couple weeks ago, I asked you and other supporters to let me know which issue you care about most. And unsurprisingly, the top issue is: **Agriculture**. Whether agriculture got your vote or not, I am grateful for your participation, and as your voice in Congress, I take that responsibility very seriously. People across southern Minnesota expect me to fight for pro-ag policies in D.C. because the farms here that raise corn, soybeans, sugar beets, cattle, hogs, and everything else sustain our way of life. They create jobs and opportunities, and they feed the world. My wife Jackie and I help operate the same family farm I grew up on in Brown County, and agriculture issues have long been the focus of my career in public policy. But no matter what you’re concerned about ... no matter what’s on your mind, and no matter what kind of question you may have about what’s going on in D.C., please know I prioritize constituent services and truly listening to the great people I proudly represent. So please continue to stay in touch, and if you can, I hope you’ll also [**_chip in a special campaign gift_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/e3PbSeGLq3M7/elBJV2Jlb2ZjUURkNFg3b0VaMG1mOHRlNFk3UUlIcUMxbDdVd0lmM3E1cEh2WGNpbzI0OVlJbEZ0eXJpVExLcjhFT01TbXJaTk1qVzNUM1JWaDFkRjVZcmFYekQxWkw5ZVlXWkZlR0lMSzRMMENOZDhpSHVZQT09S0/) as we head deeper into the election year.
Sincerely, Brad Finstad

name: Samantha Meadows for Congress
subject: Exciting news from Samantha Meadows!
body:
Ohio Democrats have endorsed candidates in key races. Yesterday, the Ohio Democratic party voted to endorse me as candidate Ohio’s 2nd Congressional District in the US House. I am thrilled to accept t | | | [](https://mgcp01.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65b67c3000c5c903eadf5af8&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.votemeadows.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D65b669db2c7b332e799c289b%26ss_email_id%3D65b67c3000c5c903eadf5af8%26ss_campaign_name%3DExciting%2Bnews%2Bfrom%2BSamantha%2BMeadows%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-01-28T16%253A09%253A31Z&w=62c5aeb3c6d0a664c2a6cece&c=b_65b669db2c7b332e799c289b&l=en-US&s=b4iXsFFHEyQ3I7WT_vPkXf5KBt8%3D)
---
| |
---
## Ohio Democrats have endorsed candidates in key races.
Yesterday, the Ohio Democratic party voted to endorse me as candidate Ohio’s 2nd Congressional District in the US House. I am thrilled to accept this endorsement! This is going to be a big year for democrats!
---
> **“Ohio Dems are fired up to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2024 and help support key ballot issues that matter most to working families in our state. We’re not taking a single community for granted as we spend the next 10 months meeting voters where they are and showing them that Ohio Democrats are on their side”** _-Elizabeth Walters, Ohio Democratic Party Chair_
---
Other endorsed candidates include:Matt Diemer - Ohio’s 7th Congressional DistrictAmy Cox- Ohio’s 10th Congressional DistrictAdam Miller- Ohio’s 15th Congressional DistrictJustices Melody Stewart, Michael Donnelly, and Judge Lisa Forbes- Ohio Supreme Court
---
---
|
---
### Get a Samantha Meadows yard sign!

If you would like to put up a yard sign to show your support for my campaign, please respond to this email. Someone will reach out to you.
---
There are several events happening around the district before the primary election. Find an event near you with the button below, and be informed before you vote!
---
[_ _ Events _ _](https://mgcp01.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65b67c3000c5c903eadf5af8&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.votemeadows.com%2Fupcoming-events%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D65b669db2c7b332e799c289b%26ss_email_id%3D65b67c3000c5c903eadf5af8%26ss_campaign_name%3DExciting%2Bnews%2Bfrom%2BSamantha%2BMeadows%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-01-28T16%253A09%253A31Z&w=62c5aeb3c6d0a664c2a6cece&c=b_65b669db2c7b332e799c289b&l=en-US&s=S5EU1ZB-E4VJkevLs3Fiphsl2Ro%3D)
---
### 12 Republicans are raising millions right now to try to win this seat. Can you chip in to help my campaign?
---
[_ _**Donate** _ _](https://mgcp01.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65b67c3000c5c903eadf5af8&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fsamantha-meadows-committee-to-elect-for-congress-1&w=62c5aeb3c6d0a664c2a6cece&c=b_65b669db2c7b332e799c289b&l=en-US&s=u56LmpB98KgfRg6KJB-VHLP570o%3D)
---
Thank you all so much for your continued support!
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: our deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Right now, pundits on CNN, MSNBC, and Fox News are talking about Donald Trump
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5243%2E5257348%2EFDuFLd)
Hey Derek — My first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the year is coming up in a few days, and **[I’m hoping you can pitch in a few dollars to help us hit this critical goal.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240128_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5243%2E5257348%2EFDuFLd)**
Right now, pundits on _CNN_ , _MSNBC_ , and _Fox News_ are talking about Donald Trump and the Republican primary, where it’s looking like he’ll emerge victorious.
For years, I’ve worked relentlessly to hold Trump accountable for his lies and his disdain for our Constitution.
And I’ll continue to defend our democracy against Trump and his cronies in MAGA world.
While Trump is but one person, his reactionary agenda and bigoted brand of politics has made its way into all corners of the GOP.
In fact, some of Donald Trump’s biggest enablers are sitting in the United States Senate.
**Which is a big reason why I’m running for U.S. Senate — to take on the likes of Ted Cruz, Lindsay Graham, Tommy Tuberville, and Josh Hawley — and hold them accountable.**
And more than that, to rebuild the guardrails of our democracy, abolish the filibuster and deliver for the American people. Affordable housing. Universal healthcare. Common sense gun safety legislation. And so much more.
**[Derek, please help me make it to the U.S. Senate by pitching in $10 or any amount you can spare before midnight tonight.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240128_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=5&akid=5243%2E5257348%2EFDuFLd)**

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77899580/451839708/-1807168276?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240128_cd_veterans&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGY3MGY0Ny1mOWJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2AR80-QRheGskI-mrshDuzyTEmsiHw-sDeIc3OpgYFc=)

**There's no other way for me to say this, Derek. The way extremist politicians have treated veterans is B.S. and a total betrayal. ** As a former U.S. Navy officer, I know what it's like to dedicate my life to this country. Like millions of other veterans, I raised my right hand to serve in uniform and protect the United States above all else. On the campaign trail, I talk to veterans and military families here in Western PA about their experiences in and out of uniform. Too often, I hear about the uncertainty that they feel seeing extremist politicians play politics with their hard-earned benefits. **During my first year in Congress, House Republicans proposed massive cuts to the VA and veteran services.** They claim to be on the side of veterans while being willing to slash the very services and funding we rely on. name: Kash Patel
subject: Truth about January 6
body:
The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98066ae12d8f4deda49fb92069545940&_e=sOGnJH_74Cj5PZxu2H9VSl7QKNvMdrW0-v4TPkAm1nwCpzoThRJQpFMf5IzAuFCJtAlKu7hmEpexfoDoq_EWtZ6K2j-CUiozQ3-ZOuvFv1uSFR9hZycEQVUqwnB1p8kvoiTuZas3FDii5oD1tbDI7yU_PkJI9VeugIu4tZZ2Y8hLNFQK1WxdNoFSQzrBYcPCI17xMq-MGarvoOLZwdVkDa1QkC8qTTi79JMp1GosMEhkW1qR5APBXgTv5uHcPvLZ "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

The media lied about January 6th.

The Deep State lied about January 6th.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6th.

The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public, showing an entirely different story from the lies they told.

Now, it's time to hold them accountable. Here's how:

**STEP ONE** \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here's how you can help:

[Can you send an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to the Kash Foundation to support our mission to defeat the Deep State? Click here to donate >>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98066ae12d8f4deda49fb92069545940&_e=sOGnJH_74Cj5PZxu2H9VSl7QKNvMdrW0-v4TPkAm1nwCpzoThRJQpFMf5IzAuFCJtAlKu7hmEpexfoDoq_EWtZ6K2j-CUiozQ3-ZOuvFv1vuhVeO6ki_W1q7AvrSuK9t_XMoaaYdPw-YwVMUoEJtC_-lIacm0MfMBiTJM-xLoPJ1faTWCk-esigBMQhiTEnn55YIz_Cn-XFrKg88dryYIqfNttykCmdajCU2y2fi_ZCM--etxX0jeVEx0BypMTGD "Donate")

Here's why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government...

I've been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage our country. My investigation discovered the FBI's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th.

[Please donate any $250, $100, or any amount today to support our efforts >>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98066ae12d8f4deda49fb92069545940&_e=sOGnJH_74Cj5PZxu2H9VSl7QKNvMdrW0-v4TPkAm1nwCpzoThRJQpFMf5IzAuFCJtAlKu7hmEpexfoDoq_EWtZ6K2j-CUiozQ3-ZOuvFv1snvIFvHxhv3liSwR5Q5UH2OM99voSDet6sdom6xmdMsInH3fOXNfEGS4R2AqvgpsH_4p0xo2ubCUxr5CoSsZL9RNcsR1S-oS4q9HClLkUmmEqigCTC_LTPpJv0Do_k33AsdR5i6RraElw8mW9QPdJN)

[Donate >>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98066ae12d8f4deda49fb92069545940&_e=sOGnJH_74Cj5PZxu2H9VSl7QKNvMdrW0-v4TPkAm1nwCpzoThRJQpFMf5IzAuFCJtAlKu7hmEpexfoDoq_EWtZ6K2j-CUiozQ3-ZOuvFv1uDHlH2tIEvusxKffyGs9m-Fvk5usUycIox5le0uqW2TL_bz4n3Y37nLRyIWGOTsAGzGDuLjTFx7Z538MyiHIjyDa9qFz-nWGvWeDLmbChAxXi8kXKj1TwOxctjEvPt8iXRY-J154_JMykDDdxuJR7L)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no "deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

This is the battle against the "Lawfare" used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots.

It's time to fight back.

| | Dear Fellow American, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.
---

| | **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5aaf0e0b579644e4b43fd895f2075024&_e=o88v9eRYcPt4gOGhzCZY7RhTwsG-A_lW37tcz43bio_hSRHT9fIY9D2C3mAxu-Lyi5i3iq_D8Z_VDgZ3bVmaxmiyUUfaNhZcHAe9GtANizRWkCtbnZ_zRrjU3AdXrYpcMUhu4YG7R2euhEJZUR5KxrC50WhmodkouDnEwRuRDVsCpTfajYdrsdH6Hy8mjv_DM-C2PeIHnWlmXFuAb0Ve-PohZH7kWnq44pLmm2mA_y8x2t7oatkGu3NsI-9QUP8Jtm75VwVPTzS6Td8N7J0FASQQKX463u7YYGqtoGxtNxLJAUKI_a33EuWZEAYnCfb-wIUFFFbd-fK7Vuo4z4DKbdUcT7XHP9z9n9xQk12A7VKKVwwGRa2WeHB_DxtqagPPGaWx72Nu2svNc1ttGZtq6w%3D%3D)** Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. **We Republicans pulled our country out of the 1970 's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. **[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $15 or more today?**](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5aaf0e0b579644e4b43fd895f2075024&_e=o88v9eRYcPt4gOGhzCZY7RhTwsG-A_lW37tcz43bio_hSRHT9fIY9D2C3mAxu-Lyi5i3iq_D8Z_VDgZ3bVmaxmiyUUfaNhZcHAe9GtANizRWkCtbnZ_zRrjU3AdXrYpcMUhu4YG7R2euhEJZUR5KxrC50WhmodkouDnEwRuRDVsCpTfajYdrsdH6Hy8mjv_DM-C2PeIHnWlmXFuAb0Ve-PohZH7kWnq44pLmm2mA_y_3QjN3QeRyHDKNLbFup1qFEu3qzpU9ULWTpcMONE0EtiRwLawDrmglolL5O3gxm8NEZyUw45pN72LGzj8eKisojuaz6ujPGgnmJTyqJKrXbTtALTXFrsUYJH5sRKX7YbGAGwGf0FQZ37Uu6EfRLrYLBXogVXJOITMM2tTV_q1Z8Q%3D%3D)** The California primary is coming up in fast on March 5th and I need to have as many conservative Republican's like you on my side as possible. In California's primary the top two vote-getters make it to the general election. And right now the polls show Adam Schiff polling at #1 and I'm hot on his heels at #2. Once we're passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him in November. Why? First... I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a **Republican win**. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... **...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,

I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. Thank you and God Bless, | | Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE 9070 Irvine Center Drive, Suite 150 Irvine, CA 92618 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails ****_ |

Friend, Yesterday, I joined Rep. Cori Bush to launch her re-election campaign for 2024. And this week, Rep. Jamaal Bowman also officially kicked off his re-election campaign. **Cori Bush introduced the Ceasefire Now Resolution in Congress, and she and Jamaal Bowman have been outspoken advocates for Palestinians’ rights and dignity.** Even when it makes them targets, they continue to call out the U.S. government’s complicity in ethnic cleansing and war crimes. Now, they’re facing pro-war primary challengers, in addition to attack ads from anti-Palestinian group AIPAC. AIPAC plans to spend $100 million to try to defeat us in this year’s elections. Not enough of our colleagues in Congress see Palestinians as human beings. Too many are disconnected from the vast majority of Americans, who are crying out for a ceasefire now.
Many Americans don’t feel like Congress speaks for them, and that gap is especially evident right now.
That’s why more than ever, we need to support members of Congress who are actually in step with their constituents and with the American people.
Jamaal, Cori, and I are deeply rooted in our communities, where we’ve organized across differences for the dignity of all people. Our campaigns are powered by grassroots donations, not corporate PAC money.
