Friend,
Today, I’m joining my sister-in-service Cori Bush in Missouri to kick off her re-election campaign. This week, Jamaal Bowman just kicked off his re-election campaign in New York.
**Because of Cori and Jamaal’s advocacy for Palestinians’ human rights, anti-Palestinian AIPAC recruited candidates to run against them in this year’s Democratic primary.**
Now, they’re facing primary challengers who decided to run because of different views on Israel and Palestine.
Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and I won’t back down or stay silent**.** We will continue demanding an end to ethnic cleansing, and condemning the U.S. government’s role in it.
[**Please split a donation to Jamaal Bowman’s, Cori Bush’s, and my campaigns today, so we can withstand $100 million in AIPAC attacks and continue demanding a ceasefire now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKuxxxGNCMufLZFZwalOj6rC6XVLQhPsD7GvZzHpBSRF_kux_-s8eUEzdiWVoRuoT60Mio-68ZItbsS1hz4MiOaGur0Lp73mEXpmF1YVjDnwH2evsz6yxGt1Ix5WbfqpDC-p-GEG7C6uZXdSx3CIeUv0qTaN9kc1RbNbF1LhYh9zLjH2Mr-ke_K1-wp5v6DrjpvJy_vNdf64sDIw1alFK0XUz3mRSFvbx03BeanKm5xMThABxX_RIJU9DcndqSEYBa0pmOwh8n9sRkTF14Qwj6rVBkzosBFLWegzSZm85x2Zy2ZYM8voRD0BQCLj_R-EhcEycuRh2FnVYBSeu3uaiAKQ/43d/kZCh_6zLTUGkOmT65ngTtQ/h10/-WI45FlVi7F2MfBYAwRN0gxSfy7Itnnt5CzQEB0qOEA)

In 2022’s elections, AIPAC and its network of PACs spent $40 million against Black and brown progressives. Most of the funds came from Republican donors who’ve supported Trump.
Now, AIPAC plans to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat me, Cori, and Jamaal in this year’s elections.
They’re targeting candidates of color representing working class districts, whose campaigns are powered by grassroots donations rather than corporate PAC money.
Like me, Jamaal and Cori are deeply rooted in their communities, with experience organizing across differences for the dignity of all people.
We’re listening to and representing our constituents—unlike many of our colleagues in Congress, who are disconnected from the American people on this and other issues.
We urgently need more elected officials who recognize our shared humanity, and who act accordingly.
[**I need Reps. Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush by my side. Please split a donation of $5 or more between our campaigns today so we can stay in Congress defending human rights together.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKuxxxGNCMufLZFZwalOj6rC6XVLQhPsD7GvZzHpBSRF9umXn5JizM0NJ2AWovLCIN-aNS1JV14Quia_zisrohZPj-Gp1680VCilwh_VyKrGFqygnJQc4ZHTv7FWDQBdNRLNz_FFn3grVGR8L7bmOrNBM5iAI41yPFn5d42r4jYyrJHsxaLw9tEOgyGCMelZMVH1JmxZe1CpqNfI1mqqtVULaVXydNNOHxKfeTP49v1iom17dOgtL7DEuaNS3zVZez7M0JH8RiJNAo21XhXOU9ln8Xi0Twy05nwfqMQStRHFYLeROBL1vQ5JQ4feZFCFU0LCtojceela0D6CulD2Kj5g/43d/kZCh_6zLTUGkOmT65ngTtQ/h12/WmJ2GtricvNcBYcsJBS-Bn0fue9pTFvj2_brxOR-MeE)

clean_body: Our campaigns are powered by grassroots donations, not corporate PAC money. | | | Friend, Yesterday, I joined Rep. Cori Bush to launch her re-election campaign for 2024. And this week, Rep. Jamaal Bowman also officially kicked off his re-election campaign. Cori Bush introduced the Ceasefire Now Resolution in Congress, and she and Jamaal Bowman have been outspoken advocates for Palestinians’ rights and dignity. Even when it makes them targets, they continue to call out the U.S. government’s complicity in ethnic cleansing and war crimes. Now, they’re facing pro-war primary challengers, in addition to attack ads from anti-Palestinian group AIPAC. AIPAC plans to spend $100 million to try to defeat us in this year’s elections. | Not enough of our colleagues in Congress see Palestinians as human beings. Too many are disconnected from the vast majority of Americans, who are crying out for a ceasefire now. Many Americans don’t feel like Congress speaks for them, and that gap is especially evident right now. That’s why more than ever, we need to support members of Congress who are actually in step with their constituents and with the American people. Jamaal, Cori, and I are deeply rooted in our communities, where we’ve organized across differences for the dignity of all people. Our campaigns are powered by grassroots donations, not corporate PAC money. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Today, I’m joining my sister-in-service Cori Bush in Missouri to kick off her re-election campaign. This week, Jamaal Bowman just kicked off his re-election campaign in New York. Because of Cori and Jamaal’s advocacy for Palestinians’ human rights, anti-Palestinian AIPAC recruited candidates to run against them in this year’s Democratic primary. Now, they’re facing primary challengers who decided to run because of different views on Israel and Palestine. Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and I won’t back down or stay silent. We will continue demanding an end to ethnic cleansing, and condemning the U.S. government’s role in it. In 2022’s elections, AIPAC and its network of PACs spent $40 million against Black and brown progressives. Most of the funds came from Republican donors who’ve supported Trump. Now, AIPAC plans to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat me, Cori, and Jamaal in this year’s elections. They’re targeting candidates of color representing working class districts, whose campaigns are powered by grassroots donations rather than corporate PAC money. Like me, Jamaal and Cori are deeply rooted in their communities, with experience organizing across differences for the dignity of all people. We’re listening to and representing our constituents—unlike many of our colleagues in Congress, who are disconnected from the American people on this and other issues. We urgently need more elected officials who recognize our shared humanity, and who act accordingly. body:
#
$3.
That's what we are asking for today. $3.
$3 to become a part of a people-powered movement that will bring young people, people of color, LGBTQ+ people, and working-class people the representation they deserve in our democracy.
$3 to empower and fund candidates who will ensure future generations receive equal opportunities, regardless of their zip code — candidates who will fight for our progressive values.
$3 to ensure The Long Run can impact races up and down the ballot this November.
$3 to help us flip the Wisconsin State Legislature blue.
$3 to help us support candidates who will protect the Democratic Senate majority and take back the House.
That’s all we’re asking for. $3.
[**So please: Can you contribute $3 to the Long Run today? Every donation will help us support change-making candidates across the country.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jan24.Ibl7yb&refcode=em240128-1-t1&t=1&akid=5173%2E196590%2EFSnYR-)

body:
If you stand with us, please chip in $ today to help our fight to protect and re-elect Pramila.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240128-3442-footer&t=1&akid=3442%2E420207%2E0qpgf_)
Peter,
We’re buckling down on our fundraising to make sure that we can keep up our momentum _no matter what our opposition throws our way._
**To maintain our grassroots power, we’ve set a goal to raise 950 contributions** **by midnight on Wednesday.**
[**Can we count on you to show up for Pramila and our campaign by kicking off our end-of-January fundraising with a donation of any amount?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240128.I6a9Cb&refcode=em20240128-3442&t=2&akid=3442%2E420207%2E0qpgf_)
The GOP is willing to try every tactic in their playbook — think: filibuster, government shutdown, and dark money Super PACs — to push their cruel and extremist agenda and strip away our rights.
**But Pramila knows how important it is to keep our eye on the prize amidst the Republican-led chaos in Congress — and she won’t back down.**
**[Can we count on you to show up for Pramila and our campaign by kicking off our end-of-January fundraising with a donation of any amount?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240128.I6a9Cb&refcode=em20240128-3442&t=3&akid=3442%2E420207%2E0qpgf_)**

name: Team Ritchie
subject: 3 reasons to support Ritchie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
shortest email you’ll read today:

| Peter, we’ll make it simple for you. Here are 3 reasons to support Ritchie Torres' campaign for re-election!
1. As the first openly LGBTQ+ Afro-Latino man in Congress, and a product of public housing in the Bronx, **Ritchie’s greatest asset that he brings to Washington is the wisdom of _lived experience._**

2. Ritchie is **advocating tirelessly for Social Security & Medicare, affordable housing, and LGBTQ+ rights** and fighting for our communities!

3. Ritchie vowed to never give up on these fights **so that more folks like him can have a seat at the table** — _but he can’t do it alone._

**That’s why we’re _power-fundraising_ to ward off hateful MAGA attacks and keep Ritchie in Congress!**

[**Peter, can we count on you to chip in $3 towards our $10,000 January goal to protect a strong progressive and unique voice in Congress, Ritchie Torres? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77902371/451844077/-866719404?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240128_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FiNDRhMS1mY2JkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NSPNleC1qsqdGyqc-wQ7qm0rFOMCVDb5ziGdxpecatg=) | [$10,000 JANUARY GOAL: CHIP IN $3 TO RE-ELECT RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77902372/451844078/-866719404?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240128_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FiNDRhMS1mY2JkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NSPNleC1qsqdGyqc-wQ7qm0rFOMCVDb5ziGdxpecatg=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: AIPAC rewarded this Republican
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

While AIPAC spends $100 million in attempts to unseat progressive Squad
members in their Democratic primaries this year, the anti-Palestinian
lobby group is also rewarding Republicans for funding the ongoing genocide
in Gaza.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240128.BAUg9_&refcode=em20240128-33042&t=1001&akid=33042%2E1203867%2E0bgX26 ]The Intercept: After House Speaker Mike Johnson pushed through Israel
aid package, AIPAC cash came flowing in. The pro-Israel lobby donated
around $95,000 to Johnson after he led the House passage of an extra $14
billion for Israel.

A new report from The Intercept reports that AIPAC was GOP House Speaker
Mike Johnson’s biggest donor in 2023. After he led the passage of $14
billion in additional aid to Israel, Johnson received a $95,000 campaign
contribution from AIPAC last November.

AIPAC is using their money and influence to play both sides in Washington:
they’re giving money to right-wing extremists like Johnson while
simultaneously trying to shape Democratic primary elections by running
moderates against progressive incumbents who refuse to do their bidding.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240128.BAUg9_&refcode=em20240128-33042&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=33042%2E1203867%2E0bgX26 ]We’ve taken them on and won before, and we need to do it again. Will
you make a grassroots donation of $3 or more to help
Justice Democrats fight back against AIPAC’s attacks and re-elect the
Squad this year?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240128.BAUg9_&refcode=em20240128-33042&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=33042%2E1203867%2E0bgX26 ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=33042%2E1203867%2E0bgX26 ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=33042%2E1203867%2E0bgX26 ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240128-33042-footer&t=1024&refcode2=33042_1203867_0bgX26&akid=33042%2E1203867%2E0bgX26

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=33042%2E1203867%2E0bgX26

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Shelby County Republican Party
subject: Fwd: Shelby County Republican Party Primary Election News
body:
>
> Hello Shelby County Republicans (and like-minded Unaffiliated voters):
>
>
> The biggest news of the day is the upcoming Presidential Primary Election on March 19th.
>
>
> Many Ohioans don’t realize that the way you “officially” affiliate yourself with one party or another in Ohio is by asking for that Party’s ballot at a Primary Election. Republicans will need to ask for a Republican ballot when they go to the polls (or when they request an absentee ballot) for the March 19th Primary.
>
>
> There will be 5 “contested” Republican races on the ballot in Shelby County. I’ve attached a list of Republicans on the ballot all across the county.
>
>
> * Two Commissioner’s Races will be decided at the March Primary. There are no Democrat or Independent candidates for these two races, so whomever we Republicans choose in March will be our next County Commissioners. Please see the attached invitation for a Meet the Candidates Night we are hosting on February 15th. All sorts of election-related material will be available at this event, so please join us if you can.
> *
>
> * Republican State Central Committee (Man) will be contested on the ballot. The Republican State Central Committee is made up of one man and one woman from each of the 33 Senate Districts in Ohio. This group of 66 men and women are responsible for the operation and direction of the Ohio Republican Party (ORP). For Republicans from all across the state who are displeased with the current operation and direction of the ORP, these seats may very well be the most important seats on the ballot. Attached is a letter I sent to this group ahead of a meeting they had this past Saturday. I’m happy to report they did not endorse any Blue-22 candidates.
> *
>
> * We currently have 3 US Senate contenders to be our Republican candidate on the ballot in November to challenge Sherrod Brown. This is one of the most important US Senate races in the nation, so you won’t want to miss voting on this one.
> *
>
> * And then, of course, we will be choosing our nominee to represent Republicans in the race for President of the United States in November.
>

>
>
> As the Primary Election season heats up, you will be hearing more from us. Please let us know if you have any questions, concerns, or suggestions.
>
>
> Cheers...Dan Cecil
> Shelby County GOP Chair
> (937) 206-2970
> [cecilda.usaf@gmail.com](mailto:cecilda.usaf@gmail.com)
>
>
>
>
>
>
>
>

Republicans will need to ask for a Republican ballot when they go to the polls (or when they request an absentee ballot) for the March 19th Primary. There will be 5 “contested” Republican races on the ballot in Shelby County. I’ve attached a list of Republicans on the ballot all across the county. Two Commissioner’s Races will be decided at the March Primary. There are no Democrat or Independent candidates for these two races, so whomever we Republicans choose in March will be our next County Commissioners. We currently have 3 US Senate contenders to be our Republican candidate on the ballot in November to challenge Sherrod Brown. This is one of the most important US Senate races in the nation, so you won’t want to miss voting on this one. * And then, of course, we will be choosing our nominee to represent Republicans in the race for President of the United States in November. As the Primary Election season heats up, you will be hearing more from us. Please let us know if you have any questions, concerns, or suggestions. Peter, the next few days will be critical.

Our first monthly deadline of the year is just three days away — and we hate to say it, but our fundraising numbers are lower than we expected.

That’s why we’re coming to our top supporters (like you, Peter) for help before it’s too late.

[**With so much on the line in this ultra-competitive district, we can’t afford to fall short now — or else extreme Republicans will take it as a sign to pour more cash into this race to defeat Emilia. We know it might seem early to be worrying about fundraising numbers and deadlines, Peter.

But think about it this way: **There are just ten monthly deadlines left before Election Day — _and this Wednesday is one of them._**

We can’t afford to kick off this historic election year by missing our first major fundraising deadline. _We need to roll up our sleeves and get to work, now and every day until we win this election for the people of Northeast Ohio._

**There’s still time to close the gap and meet this critical goal, Peter — but only with support from grassroots champions like you.**

[**So please, can we count on you to rush in $5, $10, or whatever you can chip in before our deadline expires?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77903343/451846473/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.28_b1_davte_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzk1NTFiZC1mZWJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bpJ9V1XkL4GD0e1-s63rL5k41storNY70Fofsn--tkE=)

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: 4 states, 4 newsrooms
body:
Florida, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Virginia are home to critically important races this year.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77903468/451846624/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA5NTUxYmQtZmViZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OaDP8RjICnLPq8Zbsx_gm0IHYXIcAXa3tr5l6HwFurc=&emci=6d2272db-90bc-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=b09551bd-febd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=14016711)
Peter —
With the White House, Congress, and dozens of state legislatures and governor’s offices across the country up for grabs, 2024 looks to be another historically consequential election year.
With so much at stake (and, let’s face it, Donald Trump at the top of the Republican ticket), access to trustworthy, local news has never been more important. **But for too many Americans, that access just isn’t possible right now.**
Instead, their social media feeds, inboxes, and even local television stations are full of right-wing propaganda, conspiracy theories, and outright lies.
**It’s this reality that led us to launch Courier Newsroom, Peter**. Right now, our journalists in 10 2024 battleground states are on the ground debunking right-wing misinformation and providing critical local news coverage to communities without access to trustworthy news.
And in order to keep our journalism accessible to the communities who need it most, _none_ of our stories are locked behind paywalls or subscription fees. All of our news is free to read in the online spaces where right-wing lies spread.
**But in order to keep providing this service, we rely on the generous support of donors like you. That’s why we’re reaching out to ask you to participate in our Sponsor A 2024 Battleground Newsroom Project:**
Peter, you’ve been chosen to sponsor our local news teams! Your donation will support newsrooms in four critical battleground states: **Florida, Michigan, Pennsylvania** , and **Virginia**. These will be some of the most competitive 2024 battlegrounds. With presidential candidates bearing down on each of these states while important Senate and House races play out as well, making sure our newsrooms in these states are well-resourced will be _**critically**_ important this year. **Will you chip in $5 before midnight Wednesday to help us reach our $15,000 end-of-month fundraising goal and keep up our work in these states?** **[Donate $5 Now ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77903487/451846645/1040647753?refcode=em20240128&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA5NTUxYmQtZmViZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OaDP8RjICnLPq8Zbsx_gm0IHYXIcAXa3tr5l6HwFurc=)**
---
Donald Trump won Pennsylvania and Michigan in 2016 before Joe Biden flipped them blue in 2020. They’ll be hotly contested at the presidential level once again this November, while Senator Bob Casey (D-PA) also faces re-election and Michigan is set to elect a new senator as well following Debbie Stabenow’s (D-MI) retirement.
Florida and Virginia will also feature important Senate races that could decide control of the chamber, as both Rick Scott (R-FL) and Tim Kaine (D-VA) face re-election.
Ensuring our newsrooms in each of these states have the resources they need to hire journalists and report on the stories that matter will be critically important this year. And with the 2024 cycle already ramping up, there’s no time to waste.
[**So, can we count on you to pitch in $5 today to help us keep fighting bad information and providing high-quality journalism in battleground states across the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77903492/451846656/-927058155?refcode=em20240128&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA5NTUxYmQtZmViZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OaDP8RjICnLPq8Zbsx_gm0IHYXIcAXa3tr5l6HwFurc=)
**[Donate $5 Now ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77903498/451846660/1040647753?refcode=em20240128&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA5NTUxYmQtZmViZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OaDP8RjICnLPq8Zbsx_gm0IHYXIcAXa3tr5l6HwFurc=)**
Thank you for your support!
— Courier Newsroom
* * *
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
[**Become a member! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77903503/451846665/1028889122?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA5NTUxYmQtZmViZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OaDP8RjICnLPq8Zbsx_gm0IHYXIcAXa3tr5l6HwFurc=&emci=6d2272db-90bc-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=b09551bd-febd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=14016711)
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77903508/451846669/1416945388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA5NTUxYmQtZmViZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OaDP8RjICnLPq8Zbsx_gm0IHYXIcAXa3tr5l6HwFurc=&emci=6d2272db-90bc-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=b09551bd-febd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=14016711)
[**Update Your Information**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77903512/451846674/1324474970?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA5NTUxYmQtZmViZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OaDP8RjICnLPq8Zbsx_gm0IHYXIcAXa3tr5l6HwFurc=&emci=6d2272db-90bc-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=b09551bd-febd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=14016711)
**[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XCUEQN0BTUWWQ1xBmQeS9g2?unsubscribedata=GglVFDyzJFN1O5qMCcErTM3uNMBO3fyZpTdF0Y8igsu7uj9IwHDUIV6W9wxUgqQ9nRtrUY11omAnyhe2fA3jvgKvsdOoWFDDiwhSf06V5WjGrBvI5609m2hHKuvQJbXPDUNUd9tChyxNviRVRFsoICTQSoNwVsoooyfyYN0PfnK76mciGDCAdZpdfGIxE55T27gy4yjX7E76rutw%2FFApPzFAKdQbPAliVlv1g7PwsOrDg40BFw8PqQnaH4lkMpQsCIfXv6Jn41uHJ6NJyqP%2BEzxieL0ea5SQZ6Lmh5fcSX2JoCQlRMsHgifCvW1LxMtoFGYQ8BGVMR0sW1u5EiZxaxtxDlggWDZyOW%2BmUuof%2FPdVc58ECW7R6hry%2F0jjOh0dOgCbUhIPZIEUU%2Bfg%2Fff0fRcofBez%2FVZkjGfK7v8gF63u3e%2BCiyEObXMah2B%2F4iMI)**

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: I’m humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kristen for Michigan
body:
Just a few weeks ago, I launched my campaign for Congress here in Michigan’s 8th District

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77904809/451850107/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDkzNDU5NS1mZmJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5NzjQNfzGZAasvU98Spxx6US3NdO621YVDXlwah_oGw=) Just a few weeks ago, I launched my campaign for Congress here in Michigan’s 8th District. Since then, the outpouring of support has been incredible. **But now we’re facing our first major test: our first close-of-month fundraising deadline on January 31st.** This race is a pure tossup, and it could very well determine which party controls Congress. Each month, we close our books and make decisions about what investments our campaign can afford to make. With so much at stake, we can’t afford to miss a single one of our fundraising deadlines, especially early on in this campaign. [_**So, I’m humbly asking you today: will you donate to my campaign for Congress today and help us hit our very first monthly fundraising deadline? body:
Here’s what we are missing

|
---
Friend!

I don’t know what to say.......but this could be the last email of my campaign.

Each month, my team sets fundraising goals in order to keep the lights on for my campaign. Unfortunately, each and every month, we keep falling short of these goals. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. [**_Will you help me keep my campaign going?_**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=15f99800a98d40bcb252acc534cb348d&_e=GZH7Qjpd2OxraQPQzPH17aBNdOmU0Vtb6fjp9yjoDawSNzBvFLoOcVVQnBSrmoB68IF9Dd2_XztNJ6uyKdIBAOy6QMGAZb7zrb4OGaXpw8ot53oAxeZtQDx0SX1P5FhzBwFdlgMJO63kY3zb5QfvxHqx7p3sklVpRVV0-IZuaNAtn8BP6VlbE_EuTphDJLxElQ-11x1TN9Z17mPYjIqQMVhgA_o3BpRzpquF3xRAKZrSdW3tFL4FzGBpVeziZ9yukocRJmYWI3F1Syxp7S1EyKSvnTvMg5FWC-2uehmRWKcN1roZhqMGBtFA3Euix0doGwjXfPz94CFg9K71tQ5faVS_2UGxpLPJ_cSHTOLzOFXczIEVMoQqTXlAtn1gsdNO)

**_What’s missing here in Michigan and in our nation is leadership._** The people are tired of elected officials serving the wants of their party over the needs of the people. My opponents do a lot of talking but don’t back up their talk with action.

[**I lead from the front, but I need to know you are with me in this fight. My team just activated 25X impact for the next 2 hours. Rush your immediate support to claim this special offer.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=15f99800a98d40bcb252acc534cb348d&_e=GZH7Qjpd2OxraQPQzPH17aBNdOmU0Vtb6fjp9yjoDawSNzBvFLoOcVVQnBSrmoB68IF9Dd2_XztNJ6uyKdIBAOy6QMGAZb7zrb4OGaXpw8ot53oAxeZtQDx0SX1P5FhzBwFdlgMJO63kY3zb5QfvxHqx7p3sklVpRVV0-IZuaNAtn8BP6VlbE_EuTphDJLxElQ-11x1TN9Z17mPYjIqQMVhgA_o3BpRzpquF3xRAKZpmqTV5R8C5CMcSG_aKhukqhJuWtWpQ5mm4Uzhs7WGU3FPVr0X0r509PLiCyHQRGO6wTI6LgUvlqtG7HlaSs2iEA7FpobiO47FWkkhwTwctpxt4Dzjx7YhqdwkWZ_Jhppq9czagX5r_DPq0Z_ckgqsd)

clean_body: We’ve defeated Trump before, and we can do it again -- but not without your help. | | | Peter -- we promise to be quick. In fact, by the time you finish reading this email, another supporter will have They’re hoping you do, too. Here’s why: Democracy is on the ballot this November. In and out of the White House, Donald Trump has made clear he’ll do whatever it takes to grab more power for himself -- even if it means undermining the core values and institutions that our nation was founded on. We’ve defeated him before, and we can do it again -- but not without your help. We’re running a grassroots campaign that relies on contributions from folks like you to reach voters, fuel organizing programs, and, essentially, build the critical infrastructure Joe and Kamala need to win nationwide. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for being part of this movement. We can’t win without you. Team Biden-Harris

Friend,

**It’s critical you read this before 10:00 p.m.
**
It’s Jim Jordan with a message about a couple of things I know to be true:

1. We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it

2. Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1

That’s why I’m reaching out today. The stakes are as high now as they were in 2022, **yet 40% of our supporters who gave then aren’t giving now.**

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Tina Smith
subject: How we’re going to elect Democrats this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I’m humbly asking for your support before our very first end-of-month deadline of the election year. |
#
Folks, I mean it when I say that this grassroots team has the power to truly make an impact. Together, we’ve built a movement of folks who know that our nation deserves better than what MAGA Republicans have to offer — and who won’t stop fighting to enact our shared vision for progress. I won’t sugarcoat it: we’re at the beginning of a tough election year. Republicans are likely to do anything and everything they can to take back Senate control. We have our work cut out for us, but this grassroots team always comes through. Grassroots power is how we won in 2022, and it’s how we’re going to help Democrats up and down the ballot in Minnesota and across the country win this year. That’s why I’m humbly asking for your support before our very first end-of-month deadline of the election year. **[Will you pitch in any amount you can spare to help my team and me reach voters across Minnesota this year? name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a391c4764038487a80e8d531382c22ca&_e=Bd_ZlBKwVLoDwC2dBQklbyg60FwgkSBljZNRGFO2oKKD1AgOsHmdhmjxoaWO-SRUoxfTkeZr4LtPmr4qbTWmfea_lbxmX4KJ8GVboIrB8EWgTWYjhWNMcMDkjfksU8EFYJTdWV0UeAQJVa5l-AIteweSiDcEf3icjTDp6ucl5nsPafVvlkzq8fwwgtc0uHw37xBQVttk9ClPHk60ndVT_ZsfiJYrqPH9UiF11_KP778lyBNcFu3Npq0HgqE7Jq_i7qH56BVaTovlAbuw4A4bopX71OWxVxX_saPjZP-alXmcHmicdEUckpOMVIwysqMJGCuhFYXKOUYTn-KQGkMN-HurPCjHQq9X-XK89_8yDebY7VR2TACuWiat8kRCgaMMUhz90cxOGgLn6NEXIaRSxe6pkE7jB5witzvN-OSq3Z0%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a391c4764038487a80e8d531382c22ca&_e=Bd_ZlBKwVLoDwC2dBQklbyg60FwgkSBljZNRGFO2oKKD1AgOsHmdhmjxoaWO-SRUoxfTkeZr4LtPmr4qbTWmfea_lbxmX4KJ8GVboIrB8EWgTWYjhWNMcMDkjfksU8EFYJTdWV0UeAQJVa5l-AIteweSiDcEf3icjTDp6ucl5nsPafVvlkzq8fwwgtc0uHw37xBQVttk9ClPHk60ndVT_ZsfiJYrqPH9UiF11_KP778lyBNcFu3Npq0HgqE7Jq_i7qH56BVaTovlAbuw4A4bohIcoWIoiWnz04uKpKR0F_dpI6e2xd1hXFEB-U53Dhl8cI-Yy0RrUj0DZu2V3ZhFAzs4F7I2Cjbn1MBCSb-OMVqJFqONWCi8DEQ2HBu9WYUvUWAg8JKkqMP1pUzvN0XAe1Wn71tJ8Uzjv8P77uTOP9A%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a391c4764038487a80e8d531382c22ca&_e=Bd_ZlBKwVLoDwC2dBQklbyg60FwgkSBljZNRGFO2oKKD1AgOsHmdhmjxoaWO-SRUoxfTkeZr4LtPmr4qbTWmfea_lbxmX4KJ8GVboIrB8EWgTWYjhWNMcMDkjfksU8EFYJTdWV0UeAQJVa5l-AIteweSiDcEf3icjTDp6ucl5nsPafVvlkzq8fwwgtc0uHw37xBQVttk9ClPHk60ndVT_ZsfiJYrqPH9UiF11_KP778lyBNcFu3Npq0HgqE7Jq_i7qH56BVaTovlAbuw4A4boo-t8U8bWGVLtmBFx1F5EOyoVeWEa8p05SFP3JmiYmOvOAb9Xw3U5zOQSVJkHV3guHwIPDuk4LAALPHGcAoliNEzHJH2ahUC0FvSb9_c56Ka6aim0hm16X7C0G4rLHitzBbEnDGpVftaH7xMhqKTbGc%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

clean_body: My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Initiatives update
body:
Given the certification of all six initiatives, we want to highlight our recent interview with Let's Go Washington founder, Brian Heywood. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62741749:sLCnk-iNk:m:1:2610672541:2666162F5BCC44DA22C4BE9A6F954A8E:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

The 2024 legislative session is continues with big news on the Let's Go Washington initiatives! And, as we continue delivering the latest news coming out of Olympia, we hope to keep you up-to-date with an item or two of interest last week from your own backyard. Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
Given the certification of all six initiatives, we want to highlight our recent interview with Let's Go Washington founder, Brian Heywood. In his interview, Heywood discusses his organization's initiatives to remove unreasonable restrictions on police pursuit, repeal the expensive carbon tax which has already raised gas prices 45 cents a gallon, allow Washington residents to "opt-out" of the state's Long-Term Care payroll tax and plan, repeal the state's Capital Gains Income tax, prohibit the state and any local government from imposing an income tax, and establish parents as the primary stakeholders in a child's upbringing (parents bill of rights). [Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62741750:sLCnk-iNk:m:1:2610672541:2666162F5BCC44DA22C4BE9A6F954A8E:r).

**This week 's top story...**
The recent survey conducted by Stuart Elway anticipates a highly partisan gubernatorial campaign this year. Despite the lack of enthusiasm among respondents, only 24% of registered voters have chosen a candidate they intend to vote for, according to the poll. Elway attributes the expected partisan nature to factors such as party identification or ideology, mentioned by 22% of respondents, and an equal emphasis on indicating someone they will not vote for as someone they will or could vote for. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62741751:sLCnk-iNk:m:1:2610672541:2666162F5BCC44DA22C4BE9A6F954A8E:r).

**In case you missed it ...**
Democrats in Washington are pushing another terrible proposal, and this time it's about banning what they call "hostile architecture" in public spaces to prevent homeless camping. According to KIRO Newsradio, the ban specifically targets design elements that hinder activities like skateboarding but doesn't mind those aimed at disrupting a homeless person's sleep. The reasoning? Well, it's to avoid restricting the use of public spaces by those experiencing homelessness. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62741752:sLCnk-iNk:m:1:2610672541:2666162F5BCC44DA22C4BE9A6F954A8E:r).

**Your bit of inspiration for the week ...**
Enjoy the beauty of the Willamette Valley, as photographed by former U.S. Rep. Rod Chandler.

| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62741753:sLCnk-iNk:m:1:2610672541:2666162F5BCC44DA22C4BE9A6F954A8E:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14406868&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osLCnk-iNk).
---

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: Are you ignoring me?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
On Sunday, I sent you an email detailing how we needed to raise $999. We missed our goal. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.justandfreegop.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_s=b30c6c98e0d14d04a547e3bf084dfe2c&_t=H-AFZZv34JPTfd5RcUgrAzTj3F612dLFAIyNmH4EidJLK25N3VliW3Z8PMTP_7IMP2UINLsbgsZLDgE87xNOjpQOQj1ZGqOn8nYBOCCSIq0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.justandfreegop.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_s=b30c6c98e0d14d04a547e3bf084dfe2c&_t=H-AFZZv34JPTfd5RcUgrAzTj3F612dLFAIyNmH4EidJLK25N3VliW3Z8PMTP_7IMP2UINLsbgsZLDgE87xNOjpQOQj1ZGqOn8nYBOCCSIq0%3D)
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b30c6c98e0d14d04a547e3bf084dfe2c&_e=Odgm7kigHaTNDOKcXUwoY-vd_vQRsb8-UtN-BGzQ6gR7IRD0l7hYbRGiU9C5PtPj__C2AeOPFV0oxB_yql8TE-ZS4pBrzCj1r-_Lo1MyzaYW8jKtaqlm2SDVcZ8GZsBO-hg_fF65it7hSqgfiZPWNylq6EPjt-_2oA8iZwA9mJM-BZJ-DZJ5GSl_sCCqgM2X0dtP6je9PbdDT-Zd-4ivbEBv15TLND1qTs5dUgKJI2OimQY8MOX6dKN1WQxl3LxDKtI8e1QA3NSUVCNj5Eu_cfvxCdgDT3VXQsQ3g1pjNcdm7-ept6IueZY-WAVR1mEUyRb9fwjE48oOPuyIDAz_rwrvILSqSD_zHwB21xpqdgYOFfNIZ-xMhHXo_hrg_iJSklaw5UvAbkXfU47FZFYITg%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been in this race for seven months, and **[I’m still trying to wrap my head around what it takes to raise money online](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b30c6c98e0d14d04a547e3bf084dfe2c&_e=Odgm7kigHaTNDOKcXUwoY-vd_vQRsb8-UtN-BGzQ6gR7IRD0l7hYbRGiU9C5PtPj__C2AeOPFV0oxB_yql8TE-ZS4pBrzCj1r-_Lo1MyzaYW8jKtaqlm2SDVcZ8GZsBO-hg_fF65it7hSqgfiZPWNylq6EPjt-_2oA8iZwA9mJM-BZJ-DZJ5GSl_sCCqgM2X0dtP6je9PbdDT-Zd-4ivbEBv15TLND1qTs5dUgKJI2OimQY8MOX6dKN1WQxl3LxD90AtBvkvRnbRjLGpeslgRYXFdCm8nNcdsDm-34KQr1bthfcyIjFyNJNvxa2ybJHnZTSC9ygyrbZbwO1-WcXV8B9kYxMb8GNfeav_GQNeRat1H657KNOhrJsMp2zR8kxe4dOIw2UKwkKtqMrJJmbOvw%3D%3D)**.

I’ve shared my life story and explained why I’m running for the United States Senate.

And I believe I have done a good job detailing why my Senate race in Montana is the most important in the country (**it will be the one to decide which party controls the Senate**).

Yet, my pleas for help has gone unnoticed. **I didn’t think setting a goal of raising $1,000 on Sunday was particularly high, yet we still couldn’t cobble together the money.**

[**HELP TIM WIN
CHIP IN NOW->** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b30c6c98e0d14d04a547e3bf084dfe2c&_e=Odgm7kigHaTNDOKcXUwoY-vd_vQRsb8-UtN-BGzQ6gR7IRD0l7hYbRGiU9C5PtPj__C2AeOPFV0oxB_yql8TE-ZS4pBrzCj1r-_Lo1MyzaYW8jKtaqlm2SDVcZ8GZsBO-hg_fF65it7hSqgfiZPWNylq6EPjt-_2oA8iZwA9mJM-BZJ-DZJ5GSl_sCCqgM2X0dtP6je9PbdDT-Zd-4ivbEBv15TLND1qTs5dUgKJI2OimQY8MOX6dKN1WQxl3LxDG9gYymHcGTHTAVDpj2cx6eEC1IB5gE8zgaCuNv4Fird9yzeO5fjiAvffFE7spyF2kLR0f0UEHMNM2ucnrsP-q4fGQkIm0rPwC0E-PmFVz7rFt8tv1ZIgd17NMAVb-17hRzBIBG9hoV7cj0OfwoNwvQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, you may not know me well, if at all, but I’m telling you that I’m the one person in the way of Democrats controlling the Senate. Please trust me when I say they are preparing to make this the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history.

clean_body: On Sunday, I sent you an email detailing how we needed to raise $999. We missed our goal. | | Fellow Conservative, I’ve been in this race for seven months, and . I’ve shared my life story and explained why I’m running for the United States Senate. And I believe I have done a good job detailing why my Senate race in Montana is the most important in the country (it will be the one to decide which party controls the Senate). Yet, my pleas for help has gone unnoticed. I didn’t think setting a goal of raising $1,000 on Sunday was particularly high, yet we still couldn’t cobble together the money. Fellow Conservative, you may not know me well, if at all, but I’m telling you that I’m the one person in the way of Democrats controlling the Senate. Please trust me when I say they are preparing to make this the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history. Right now, in January, Dems are spending against me at the rate of $1 million per month. Soon, it’s likely to be $1 million per week. So when I say, it’s not a lie. Please to help me make up the difference from missing our goal on Sunday. name: Katie Porter
subject: We should ask every single candidate why they want power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37063%2E3422442%2EM2KS-q)
Derek,
Here’s a naked and sometimes uncomfortable truth about every single candidate emailing you for $5 to help them get elected: they want power.
I’m not excluded from that statement. But what we should ask every single candidate, every day, is what they will do with that power.
Prior to Trump being elected, I never considered running for office. I didn’t work my way up to Congress or serve in student government. **I was a law professor and consumer protection advocate who studied and saw how big corporations were cheating the rest of us**. When I first ran for office in 2018, I was (and still am!) a single mom of three school age kids who drives a minivan.
**Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I want the power to go after the corrupt special interests that are making it difficult for families to get ahead.** Oil companies need to be held accountable for their messes. Health insurance and pharmaceutical companies need to be held accountable for breaking laws, and for lobbying for a healthcare system that exists to serve their bottom lines. And corporations and the ultra-wealthy need to be held accountable when they cheat on their taxes.
**Our current system is not good enough, and it’s not going to be “good enough” to just go back to the way things were before Donald Trump.** I’ve never taken a dime from corporate PACs and I don’t take money from federal lobbyists—you can always count on me to fight for working people and shake up the status quo.
My mentor and former law professor Elizabeth Warren taught me that nobody gets elected alone. It’s true! I can’t do this without you. [**Right now, we’re being outspent on TV ads by millions of dollars. With just five weeks until Election day, we urgently need to catch up. Can you chip in today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240128-1?refcode=em20240128-37063&refcode2=37063_3422442_M2KS-q&akid=37063%2E3422442%2EM2KS-q)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240128-1?refcode=em20240128-37063&refcode2=37063_3422442_M2KS-q&akid=37063%2E3422442%2EM2KS-q)
Thanks so much for being a part of our campaign.
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240128-37063&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37063_3422442_M2KS-q&akid=37063%2E3422442%2EM2KS-q)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=37063%2E3422442%2EM2KS-q)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=37063%2E3422442%2EM2KS-q)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

_**PREVIOUS EMAIL**_ BIG NEWS: Giffords, the gun violence prevention organization founded by former Congresswoman Gabrielle Giffords, just endorsed our campaign for Congress! [_**Voting starts in 11 days, and we need to get the word out about this endorsement immediately — chip in $25 or any amount to fuel our campaign and elect a gun reform champion in CA-30 →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77907332/451858270/1971937322?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.01.28_B1_Giffords2_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzY2YzY4YjgtMDViZS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jJJxzP2rIaBczm1v7EB9rWi2TSmCyPSP_hvEBh1tw6A=) _**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77907333/451858271/1971937322?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.01.28_B1_Giffords2_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzY2YzY4YjgtMDViZS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jJJxzP2rIaBczm1v7EB9rWi2TSmCyPSP_hvEBh1tw6A=)**_ This endorsement is particularly meaningful for me. I’ve made preventing gun violence a priority throughout my career. Our country’s gun violence crisis is an outrage. But we aren’t helpless. We can do something about it. I’ve been honored to work with former Congresswoman Gabrielle Giffords and her extraordinary organization for many years. She understands that saving lives from gun violence can’t wait. We agree that gun violence is not just one on a list of issues but _**an urgent public health and safety crisis.**_ I’ve written first-in-the-nation gun safety legislation, worked to disarm domestic abusers, co-founded the nation’s first prosecutors coalition to combat gun violence, and much more. clean_body: Friend, did you see the news? Mike Feuer for Congress | Friend, did you see the news? FIRST: Giffords, the national gun reform organization founded by former Congresswoman Gabrielle Giffords, endorsed Mike for Congress —and former Congresswoman Giffords herself issued her strong personal endorsement of Mike! THEN: Mike got the enthusiastic endorsement of the Beverly Press/Park La Brea News! NOW: Mike has an unmatched record of accomplishment — but with 10 days left until voting starts, we urgently need to raise the funds to get that information to every voter. Time is running out. Please use this link to rush a donation to help Mike win this crowded, critical race:= Thank you so much, — Skyler and the whole team at Mike Feuer for Congress P.S. Check out the full Beverly Press/Park La Brea News endorsement PREVIOUS EMAIL BIG NEWS: Giffords, the gun violence prevention organization founded by former Congresswoman Gabrielle Giffords, just endorsed our campaign for Congress! = = This endorsement is particularly meaningful for me. I’ve made preventing gun violence a priority throughout my career. Our country’s gun violence crisis is an outrage. But we aren’t helpless. We can do something about it. I’ve been honored to work with former Congresswoman Gabrielle Giffords and her extraordinary organization for many years. She understands that saving lives from gun violence can’t wait. We agree that gun violence is not just one on a list of issues but an urgent public health and safety crisis. I’ve written first-in-the-nation gun safety legislation, worked to disarm domestic abusers, co-founded the nation’s first prosecutors coalition to combat gun violence, and much more. I won’t rest until we pass lifesaving legislation in Washington to tackle our nation’s gun violence emergency. But first, we must win this crowded, critical race for Congress — and we’re running out of time to make our case to every voter. Can you rush $25 or any amount now to fuel our campaign?** If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you so much, — Mike = | | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MIKE FEUER FOR CONGRESS Mike Feuer for Congress 16633 Ventura Blvd Suite 1008 Encino, CA 91436 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . name: Fetterman HQ
subject: Just a littttlleee more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek, we had to reach out.
Let’s start with some sweet sweet flattery. You’re the best part of our job, Derek. No, seriously, you are just as much a part of Team Fetterman as those of us working full-time behind the scenes to power this movement.
**We can’t do any of our work without your support.** From the moment you decided to support us by keeping up with John and joining our email list for updates, you’ve made an impact. It may not seem like much, but every single person we add to the team makes a difference!
**That’s why we’re calling on you again today.** We’ve done the math and we need 3 more people from 18326 to chip in today for us to be on track for our January fundraising goal.
**[Can we ask you to chip in anything now-- even $3 -- to help us check off 1 out of the 3 supporters we need from 18326 today? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240128-1?refcode=em20240128-1-8768&refcode2=8768_434096_Av0msl&akid=8768%2E434096%2EAv0msl)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240128-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240128-8768&refcode2=8768_434096_Av0msl&akid=8768%2E434096%2EAv0msl)**
Thank you!!!!
-- Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240128-8768-footer&t=1&refcode2=8768_434096_Av0msl&akid=8768%2E434096%2EAv0msl)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Peter,

EMILYs List began in 1985 when several dozen women pooled their resources to support Democratic pro-choice women running for elected office. Since then, this community has grown exponentially, and supporters like _you_ have helped change the face of American politics.

2024 is an unprecedented presidential election year for our community. In this post-_Roe v. Wade_ America, _every_ race counts in the fight to protect and restore abortion access for millions.

So, as we head into this monumental election year for abortion access, we're doing things a little differently. **Instead of setting a typical January End-of-Month dollar amount goal, our team has set a new type of goal: we want to receive 7,500 contributions from supporters like you, Peter, before midnight on January 31. **

The best way to prove that our pro-choice movement is united, motivated, and stronger than ever is by showcasing the power of our grassroots community. Democratic pro-choice women have defeated anti-choice extremism at the ballot box in some of the toughest races thanks to the support of this community — and this year they'll need our help more than ever.

[**This is the fight EMILYs List was built for, Peter. Peter, I’ll make this quick. I just got out of a budget meeting with my finance team, and I wanted to pull back the curtain for you as one of our strongest supporters: | **2024 Budget Items:**
* * *
$15 - 2 new yard signs 🪧
$27 - 100 door hangers for canvassing 🚪
$50 - 250 hits on digital ads 📲
$250 - 500 postcards 📫
$500 - pays one youth organizer for a week 🕺
---
The only way we win is by reaching voters and spreading our message throughout the district. _These_ are the tools that make it all possible.

None of these budget items are negotiable, Peter, so if we want to _fully_ fund our campaign, we’re going to need strong grassroots support. **If we fall short on fundraising, we will have to cut our budget, which means we _risk losing this election._**
[**_I’m personally asking you, Peter. Can you step up and make your first donation to our campaign so we can fully fund this budget and run a winning campaign? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/UY_72R0JISdDLf5mOL_cAQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnmRzMP0TIaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDEyOF9lbV9mcl9iMV9idWRnZXRfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MmJWVDBQNkZMbTI0aXd4b1k3R0ozWTU3WjhBJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJiVlQwUDZGTG0yNGl3eG9ZN0dKM1k1N1o4QSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yYlZUMFA2RkxtMjRpd3hvWTdHSjNZNTdaOEFXA3NwY0IKZbHMl7ZlPk9KsFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/katieporteroc/p/an-oversight-win?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)

Big Tax Prep companies have been taking advantage of Americans for years. In fact, the average American spends 13 hours and $240 every year just to file their taxes.
**That 's BS, because for most taxpayers, the IRS already has all of the information it needs to calculate tax liabilities and refunds.** TurboTax is only so involved in the process because their army of lobbyists have successfully lobbied for it to be that way, even supporting legislation to ban the IRS from developing its own filing tools. While these companies overcharged taxpayers and wasted their time, Intuit (TurboTax's parent company) made billions each year.
But some accountability is happening!
This year, many Californians and folks in several other states will be eligible to file for free, directly with the IRS--you can learn more about how to do so [here.](https://substack.com/redirect/4f6cf6c9-9685-4c81-bd62-c559ece10d73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) This pilot program is an exciting first step.
The free tool is something I've been pushing for throughout my time in Congress. I'll keep pushing to expand this tool nationwide, and to make sure these big corporations don't find a way to drag us backwards.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b776333d-bc3d-4907-8297-bbf84070556d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And in additional positive news, the Federal Trade Commission is calling out TurboTax for their deceptive advertising. **While TurboTax advertised "free" services and claimed 70% of people were eligible, the reality was that only 3% of taxpayers really were**. I sounded the alarm about this in 2022, and I'm glad to see TurboxTax held accountable.
As a consumer protection attorney, I see TurboTax as a perfect example of why we need strong government oversight and a Congress that isn't beholden to corporate special interests.
Onward,
Katie

body:
Do you know about the two cases being heard by the Supreme Court that could put even more power into the hands of the corrupt and unaccountable judicial branch?| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77909134/451862156/444630146?refcode=1-28-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllY2Y2NGYxLTA4YmUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=S4TD75B5il29TJ-WcnhwHcXpElBmEVPPBUvZzQYrx94=)

| | Friend, Do you know about the two cases being heard by the Supreme Court that could put _even more power_ into the hands of the corrupt and unaccountable judicial branch? The Court is hearing _Relentless Inc. v. U.S. Department of Commerce_ and _Loper Bright Enterprises v. Raimondo_ , two cases that have the potential to undermine, or even overturn, the _Chevron_ doctrine.____Overturning the _Chevron_ doctrine would strip crucial federal agencies of the ability to interpret and execute laws passed by Congress, giving that ability to the judiciary. We know how corrupt and irresponsible MAGA judges are, and the results of these cases could take away power from the people’s elected representatives in Congress and give the MAGA majority more control over all aspects of our government._**[These two cases are just another example of this extremist rightwing Supreme Court trying to take more power and shows clearly how rampant the corruption in our judicial system is and how much of a danger it poses to our future. We need to keep working to root out judicial corruption at every level before they take away even more of Americans’ freedoms, so please, chip in $10 now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77909135/451862157/444630146?refcode=1-28-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllY2Y2NGYxLTA4YmUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=S4TD75B5il29TJ-WcnhwHcXpElBmEVPPBUvZzQYrx94=)** ** With how corrupt and unaccountable the MAGA Supreme Court is, we cannot afford for them to have any more control over the government than they do right now. Federal agencies and the experts that work there need to be the ones to carry out the laws passed by Congress, not unelected judges. The MAGA Justices are not experts in those fields and do not have the capacity or expertise to carry out the critical functions of every single federal agency. [**_Relentless_****and**** _Loper_****are two cases that have the ability to take away more power from the American people and put more power than ever in the hands of the rightwing Supreme Court Justices. With all the evidence of corruption on the Court, we cannot afford for them to take power from the people’s representatives and the experts at federal agencies. Please contribute $10 today so we can keep fighting for Supreme Court ethics reform- we desperately need it.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77909136/451862158/444630146?refcode=1-28-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllY2Y2NGYxLTA4YmUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=S4TD75B5il29TJ-WcnhwHcXpElBmEVPPBUvZzQYrx94=)**_****_** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

We’re counting on the support of this team to help power our candidate to victory, defend our majority in Pennsylvania, and crush our January fundraising goal. | | |

| |

**Next month, we’re facing a special election that will make or break our majority in the Pennsylvania House. Here’s the situation:** 👉 **Democrats won control of the PA House in the 2022 midterms** – _and since then we’ve defended our majority in five special elections._
**👉 The PA House is a key target chamber for state Republicans.** This special election isn’t _just_ an opportunity for Democrats to defend our majority, it’s an opportunity for Republicans to FLIP one of their target chambers ahead of November.
👉**S****pecial elections are notoriously underfunded, and results can come down to less than a dozen votes.** We need grassroots supporters like you, to give state Democrats the boost necessary to compete before Wednesday’s January fundraising deadline. **We’re counting on the support of this team to help power our candidate to victory and defend our majority in Pennsylvania.** [Will you pitch in a 3X-matched gift of $7 right now to help defeat the GOP and WIN in states like Pennsylvania and beyond? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLQ3EA7aKEp9AQVgSTemxe_UPBjxhifgVrdnjOvcivNVQd18bcdNDDYlmAaisXqPXHpozVFYBQSPt8xM7TrcKBtAyJ-5R46vbN2UYxYbpAVvQxSrcuPTzpQDaEwNc7NXAwCP9QPWSBQBm9ZD73OW0WWgIiZ_Cm8iiLNxw0AhJQikmX8A89i-VNp_NNeskisI-HgRw8OfNwxilJUTIAWF3374KF8REZTwEg6hcCdlNdRAh1WLtiUMnrcfxvfgHR-lNrp9c59fLWlOSPzR2ezpzEwQyBbtRVq9na6a3Lv0hCrs5n2K9pLhKFCd7eHRtpFGewBZ7p_bvyNhlT5w5yXMbZnS29OX4Ms3vHMj_3V8s8HvG2Lt_mExCOZo5qzshtZDwdxDq8e2Md5FqvdwNh89EJ7wRgIqbz_21iIel0Kgsd2uZXRNRFedCcWzIxlrhxasBtJENIUZstuG4IDnC1JKrP-ENCHZ-iMKyQpJxL1af135kO2koNM47a3NV47wYq4971ve1qiNVewWR_pr1BV9rZjA/43d/Ctjzo5ctSfSrgrewFdDMLg/h0/jyJBgLxuA3BkNZlNfpeevzliNMJKFYRtEAJJMP_ALfU) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: We’re counting on the support of this team to help power our candidate to victory, defend our majority in Pennsylvania, and crush our January fundraising goal. | | | | | ---|--- Next month, we’re facing a special election that will make or break our majority in the Pennsylvania House. Here’s the situation: 👉 Democrats won control of the PA House in the 2022 midterms – and since then we’ve defended our majority in five special elections. 👉 The PA House is a key target chamber for state Republicans. This special election isn’t just an opportunity for Democrats to defend our majority, it’s an opportunity for Republicans to FLIP one of their target chambers ahead of November. 👉Special elections are notoriously underfunded, and results can come down to less than a dozen votes. We need grassroots supporters like you, to give state Democrats the boost necessary to compete before Wednesday’s January fundraising deadline. We’re counting on the support of this team to help power our candidate to victory and defend our majority in Pennsylvania. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Let's do this. name: Mike Rogers
subject: How about them Lions?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
They’re counting us out, but they’ve got another thing coming.| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=8c07ba0ccbc94eb284274560a0d56ba6&_e=9ucceBYbs9fATEKaSBX9b7cXTZojmYz3uklE-EwG8OtHapTkpkqi6ueL6g7mxWDjvQArgtSDcczwNtpEojnK4o6m0dhfsG8tuzZAjRupPLTxuJqx4jkmLS4IKCK1lzCTyV_iGSoao5LSiC2eS8AJjxD0janPXEHRouTmTPboEQs4dlbxSm82BwsBRXhnBrZYs6XXTtriSAGLjtngFCpvgb7lAw8jl2yjE174aRqBkqsd1egHHj0766Q3N0pHpjdhEBeHaTr6vWWXTEjmTRCxTLei3bD9KUHJmgjlXkHgVrDDiMD2vJSF7GUKU_8kB_7dF3kbU5b_HYGiZNAMgAxCzPT4eJy_XyTANZWPLA3qLzmjP_Lqn3EK78SmRbfIaiGoaTvXPF3nklEuBX_yfpwSws39MoDztaFiBbP07HFoLJw%3D)
---
Friend,
Right now, the Detroit Lions are getting ready to take the field against the San Francisco 49ers. At the beginning of this season, the idea of the Lions playing for championships was treated like a joke. Nobody expected them to even make the NFC Championship, let alone have a chance at the Super Bowl. But they beat the odds, and regardless of whether they win tonight, they’ve made Michigan proud. **[Friend, the Detroit Lions shocked the world and defied the “experts” and we can too!](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=8c07ba0ccbc94eb284274560a0d56ba6&_e=9ucceBYbs9fATEKaSBX9b7cXTZojmYz3uklE-EwG8OtHapTkpkqi6ueL6g7mxWDjvQArgtSDcczwNtpEojnK4o6m0dhfsG8tuzZAjRupPLTxuJqx4jkmLS4IKCK1lzCTyV_iGSoao5LSiC2eS8AJjxD0janPXEHRouTmTPboEQs4dlbxSm82BwsBRXhnBrZYs6XXTtriSAGLjtngFCpvgb7lAw8jl2yjE174aRqBkqsd1egHHj0766Q3N0pHpjdhEBeHaTr6vWWXTEjmTRCxTLRFmGGud-yvl1gHBcXOblW8-vnzDdXdufCLMp1eaxzqS5PGCgR1Ww9lkygFRXn5GGY7E0gXOk5L3sQtQ3sD3qeOt5DL0K9HOQs4tXqSe-ZCBJoUOm-G13kmAx1iGOibZEtjxA4hymIOqs2-31BuSoA%3D)** If you told me as a kid that I’d be running for the U.S. Senate, I would’ve called you crazy. In fact, I still find it surreal when I think about the over 30,000 Michiganders who had enough faith in me to sign the petition to get my name on the ballot. >From the Army to the FBI to Washington, this has been an **incredible** journey for all of us–and it’s far from over. My opponent and her left-wing buddies have amassed a **multimillion-dollar** war chest and they’re ready to spend every single dime to keep me from getting to Washington. This is a true battle of David vs. Goliath. Just like the Detroit Lions, I’m not certain we’ll win, but I know that with your support and enough grit, nothing will be impossible. Friend, your donation might not get the Lions to the Super Bowl, but it will make sure our movement to continue the fight against the far left continues to have momentum. **[**Can I count on you to contribute any amount**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=8c07ba0ccbc94eb284274560a0d56ba6&_e=9ucceBYbs9fATEKaSBX9b7cXTZojmYz3uklE-EwG8OtHapTkpkqi6ueL6g7mxWDjvQArgtSDcczwNtpEojnK4o6m0dhfsG8tuzZAjRupPLTxuJqx4jkmLS4IKCK1lzCTyV_iGSoao5LSiC2eS8AJjxD0janPXEHRouTmTPboEQs4dlbxSm82BwsBRXhnBrZYs6XXTtriSAGLjtngFCpvgb7lAw8jl2yjE174aRqBkqsd1egHHj0766Q3N0pHpjdhEBeHaTr6vWWXTEjmTRCxTLhc4YTbTeWk9RNnfxxehLHEz-7qgJX7JYEKO6PRj0Gg8Bgrf4j4oSPHj5Hcc8U41tSAkT43fOLXZrnc6WtpThFjEO-6l8nHjxfP-Q2tmTqDCZJn1CWn2L6wrgVSpQWS7TDb2rhKzlvEL9HEzUZ8BHs%3D)** to help us step up to this tremendous challenge? Thanks for your help, and Go Lions!!! Sincerely, Mike Rogers
---

clean_body: This is how we defend our chances for the House Peter: we're barely into 2024, and Roll Call is already predicting a possible Republican sweep. Recently, Donald Trump once again called for the repeal of the Affordable Care Act, while extreme House Republicans have continued to call for a national abortion ban. If Republicans have their way in this election, they will have full authority to enact their radical agenda, hurting millions of Americans. That's why we can't allow their dream to become our reality. To prepare for our toughest election yet, we've set a goal to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fight back against Republicans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Kim Rep. body:
this team will flip Florida blue this year
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77910971/451864852/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk721-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVkNTQyMDQtMGNiZS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A-VNS-exC1ZJZU-DVOSLvB733I_VuMMyU2SqXymtLCY=)
_**Humbled and inspired.**_
Friend, those are the best words to describe the whirlwind of emotions I’m feeling as I look back on everything we've already accomplished in the first month of 2024. I can't describe how moving it's been to watch Democrats from every corner of America chip in to help us defeat Sen. Rick Scott and pave the way for a brighter future in Florida.
I feel more confident than ever before that this team will flip Florida blue this year. I've spent the last several months meeting voters up and down this state. And folks everywhere are ready to say goodbye to Rick Scott's extremism and division — and replace it with the kind, unifying leadership that our communities deserve. **But don't just take it from me: Polling data shows that Rick Scott's approval ratings are tanking _AND_ that this race is statistically tied!**
That's not all: Experts from _CNN_ agree that Florida is one of the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip this year. This is what the beginning of a winning campaign looks like, friend. **But Rick Scott and I both know that he can shell out millions at the drop of a hat to retake the lead. That's exactly what he did last time around, when he spent $64 million to _buy_ this seat.**
**We can't let that happen again, friend.[That’s why I’m humbly asking: Please, will you chip in $5 to help me defeat Rick Scott and flip Florida blue? We're running out of time to build a strong war chest before the first month of the election year ends, so I'm really counting on you to step up.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77910973/451864853/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk721-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVkNTQyMDQtMGNiZS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A-VNS-exC1ZJZU-DVOSLvB733I_VuMMyU2SqXymtLCY=)**

clean_body: this team will flip Florida blue this year | | | = Humbled and inspired. Friend, those are the best words to describe the whirlwind of emotions I’m feeling as I look back on everything we've already accomplished in the first month of 2024. I can't describe how moving it's been to watch Democrats from every corner of America chip in to help us defeat Sen. Rick Scott and pave the way for a brighter future in Florida. I feel more confident than ever before that this team will flip Florida blue this year. I've spent the last several months meeting voters up and down this state. And folks everywhere are ready to say goodbye to Rick Scott's extremism and division — and replace it with the kind, unifying leadership that our communities deserve. But don't just take it from me: Polling data shows that Rick Scott's approval ratings are tanking AND that this race is statistically tied! That's not all: Experts from CNN agree that Florida is one of the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip this year. This is what the beginning of a winning campaign looks like, friend. But Rick Scott and I both know that he can shell out millions at the drop of a hat to retake the lead. That's exactly what he did last time around, when he spent $64 million to buy this seat. We can't let that happen again, friend.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With immense gratitude for you and all that you do, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: I don’t have time for this - do YOU?
body:
Peter, I admitted a hard truth the other day to a group of conservative patriots. I'm going to tell you exactly what I told them.

Politicians from both parties - including Republicans - have been lying to us for a long time. They say one thing to us when they want our votes but become complacent in Washington.

Here's the truth: Republicans who are complacent are complicit in the problem.

I'm 36 years old. I love my country, but our border is being overrun. Our cost-of-living is unaffordable. Our national debt is in a tailspin.

I'm sorry, but I don't have time to be complacent.

Do you?

I'm running for Congress because I believe our Republican leaders need to act with URGENCY and BOLDNESS in everything they do!

We need more America First patriots in Washington willing to stand up and say enough is enough.

If you agree that we need new leadership, I have just one request for you:

ADD YOUR NAME and ENDORSE my campaign for Congress and join our movement to bring America First leadership to Washington! (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Complacent_Endorse_12724)

ENDORSE MAX FOR CONGRESS (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Complacent_Endorse_12724)
There are just 41 days until the March 5 Primary Election. We need to know we have as many conservative patriots standing with us as possible.

Thank you and God bless America,

Max Ukropina

Hi friend,

Jena Griswold here – Colorado Secretary of State and Chair of the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State (DASS).

Once again, enforcing laws and protecting our democracy is being met with threats of violence by the far-right.
* In Maine, Secretary of State Shenna Bellows was targeted by a ‘swatting’ call.

* Within a three week period, I received _64 death threats_. More have come in, but I’ve stopped keeping track.

**Know this, friend: I will not be intimidated. This work has never been easy, but democracy and peace _will_ triumph over tyranny and violence.**

[We are heading into an unprecedented election year, and our Secretaries of State need help standing up to extremism.
