name: Briana Sewell
subject: I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRIANA SEWELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’m launching my campaign to succeed Rep. Abigail Spanberger in Virginia’s 7th Congressional District — one of the most important battleground races in the country.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77912060/451867380/-1514006159?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzgwZjM1ZS0wZmJlLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aq0lhlmCyAU3D5DsJTLXvZE3SjK3EoQtP9MwCNtIDbo=) Hi, my name is Briana Sewell. I’m a member of the Virginia House of Delegates, one of the youngest women ever elected to state office, and I’m a proud Prince William County native.

**I'm running for Congress to succeed Rep. Abigail Spanberger in Virginia’s 7th Congressional District — one of the most important battleground races in the country.

[I want to tell you all about who I am and why I’m running for Congress. But first, I hope you’ll watch this video and become a supporter of this campaign. Our district has been home to some of the most competitive races in the last few elections, and this race could decide who controls Congress after 2024 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77912061/451867381/1811085973?refcode=email_012824_launch-resend&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzgwZjM1ZS0wZmJlLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aq0lhlmCyAU3D5DsJTLXvZE3SjK3EoQtP9MwCNtIDbo=)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77912062/451867382/773960429?refcode=email_012824_launch-resend&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzgwZjM1ZS0wZmJlLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aq0lhlmCyAU3D5DsJTLXvZE3SjK3EoQtP9MwCNtIDbo=)** | | [Watch & Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77912063/451867383/1811085973?refcode=email_012824_launch-resend&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzgwZjM1ZS0wZmJlLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aq0lhlmCyAU3D5DsJTLXvZE3SjK3EoQtP9MwCNtIDbo=)
---
When I think about all we’re living through right now, I think about what my grandmother saw, organizing in Selma, Alabama as a foot soldier in the civil rights movement.

I think about what my mother saw when she joined the Air Force after college. She worked so hard and rose to the rank of Lieutenant Colonel.

**The women in my family showed me the meaning of strength. They showed me what it means to serve a greater good, and what it means to fight for what you believe in.**

That’s why I ran for the House of Delegates. I was proud to pass laws to increase support for military families and veterans, add more teachers to the classroom, and expand protections for child victims of sexual assault here in Virginia.

**But today, Congress is broken. And women like my mother and grandmother – and folks across our community – have worked too hard and lived too much history to watch everything we care about slip away.**

I’m running for Congress because Virginians deserve someone who will fight for what’s right, who knows how hard it is to make ends meet, and who won’t let Congress take away our freedom to make decisions about our own bodies.

**[But getting to Congress won’t be easy, and with control of Congress up for grabs, I’m going to need your support throughout this race. Will you chip in today to support this campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77912064/451867384/1811085973?refcode=email_012824_launch-resend&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzgwZjM1ZS0wZmJlLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aq0lhlmCyAU3D5DsJTLXvZE3SjK3EoQtP9MwCNtIDbo=)**

clean_body: I’m launching my campaign to succeed Rep. Abigail Spanberger in Virginia’s 7th Congressional District — one of the most important battleground races in the country. = Hi, my name is Briana Sewell. I’m a member of the Virginia House of Delegates, one of the youngest women ever elected to state office, and I’m a proud Prince William County native. I'm running for Congress to succeed Rep. Abigail Spanberger in Virginia’s 7th Congressional District — one of the most important battleground races in the country. = = | | = When I think about all we’re living through right now, I think about what my grandmother saw, organizing in Selma, Alabama as a foot soldier in the civil rights movement. I think about what my mother saw when she joined the Air Force after college. She worked so hard and rose to the rank of Lieutenant Colonel. The women in my family showed me the meaning of strength. They showed me what it means to serve a greater good, and what it means to fight for what you believe in. That’s why I ran for the House of Delegates. I was proud to pass laws to increase support for military families and veterans, add more teachers to the classroom, and expand protections for child victims of sexual assault here in Virginia. But today, Congress is broken. And women like my mother and grandmother – and folks across our community – have worked too hard and lived too much history to watch everything we care about slip away. I’m running for Congress because Virginians deserve someone who will fight for what’s right, who knows how hard it is to make ends meet, and who won’t let Congress take away our freedom to make decisions about our own bodies. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Briana = | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. subject: White House Touts Support Of Confrontational Enviro Group That Harassed Admin Officials, Dems
body:

It’s important that we as Americans understand the kind of horror that took place in Uvalde.
Right here in my backyard — down the road from my home — 21 people lost their lives in a school shooting that could have been prevented.
It’s something those poor families will have to relive for the rest of their lives — all because politicians like Ted Cruz were too cowardly to actually do something about our country’s gun violence epidemic.
It’s time for politicians to stop being cowards. And I’m committed to bringing back bold, courageous leadership to Texas, but I need your help to get the job done. So can I count on you to join me in this fight with $10 or more straight away? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-cnn2]

So together, let's bring a new generation of leadership to Washington. Leadership that is ready to roll up their sleeves and get to work tackling pressing issues like housing costs, climate change, and funding our schools. CA-30 is ready for real, lasting change and I plan to take bold action on behalf of all of us — but with just under two months until Election Day, we need your help getting our message out to as many voters as possible. = More soon, Nick Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

subject: My investigation is a serious risk

body:
They want to shut it down in the blink of an eye
| | [ ](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fb1396be3a9143f798d3cc7e37177a09&_e=eqk0iqDbL9_O9wBSWxnSHsjPt6kVVzIx3UNdv5z7dvHe4StLXR6maU6dh2X_n4WlV7At-9NbxzjR9hVLhWW3Tjpn5KyBkQuwD5_GNU5ku6-9Xv29VxBvANUyl36QPufKX7cm9exn62NimKBRGbcSjnofNadxrCz56evUq8XCayszxUXsyx1GUjzqwdk4PZ_QZL8x0Jil2Q32fNzNPNtHMmExtApPl2AAFGPx5jfRVUISymtIR-SzuzEiQEx26gPWq2EEAX4AnUd6B9n1RqbmJu87jNBGTRmiHcZm8tn0DhH93bXLaiemumSEJvyCEt0w)

Fellow American, I received some concerning news, and I'm asking you to read this entire memo about the state of my re-election campaign. My Democrat opponent just filed to run against me in Kentucky's first congressional district and it is alarming.
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fb1396be3a9143f798d3cc7e37177a09&_e=eqk0iqDbL9_O9wBSWxnSHsjPt6kVVzIx3UNdv5z7dvHe4StLXR6maU6dh2X_n4WlV7At-9NbxzjR9hVLhWW3Tjpn5KyBkQuwD5_GNU5ku6-9Xv29VxBvANUyl36QPufKX7cm9exn62NimKBRGbcSjnofNadxrCz56evUq8XCaytqcUM1HScjNwrDip9_sVVcIUog_xBuK0i9PHR_mDGe6g7nwQSj3aEZVAqSJL4N78T97Wo9Zi-tG16p1lGSXMNyuIBNRNsg5zIiV7BXnenhqmAcBktqnyXFo4Xdl_iZQnHWbKXTADfLdn8Rac8ZT5Es)
---
My opponent is a Far-Left activist who worked for the Hillary Clinton campaign, and she's already raising tons of money on ActBlue from liberal online donors around the country. She is determined to defeat me and end my investigation once and for all. **You and I both know we can 't let that happen.** But it's not only that. She's hired Amy McGrath's campaign manager. You may not remember Amy McGrath, but I sure do. McGrath raised $88 Million dollars in her 2020 campaign for Kentucky Senate. **$88,000,000!**
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fb1396be3a9143f798d3cc7e37177a09&_e=eqk0iqDbL9_O9wBSWxnSHsjPt6kVVzIx3UNdv5z7dvHe4StLXR6maU6dh2X_n4WlV7At-9NbxzjR9hVLhWW3Tjpn5KyBkQuwD5_GNU5ku6-9Xv29VxBvANUyl36QPufKX7cm9exn62NimKBRGbcSjnofNadxrCz56evUq8XCayuvTh3F5d9rNxRMdZBJfZiMPL8F8eX_DHWbqn2TnA0Wb3kR0Cxtd4H0HcHST3eXVU8NbPN-bQf_GqcCiG6G-G8giChOS4K8Mtb4pMPRbo_sL0Yy44o5nDT3xrcWsfvBLmnk6L03xVn-kbTum1JN4lLs)
---
That's an astounding amount of money, and her campaign manager's rolodex is stuffed to the brim with democrat mega-donors chomping at the bit to take me down. They know their investment in the Biden administration is at serious risk due to the findings of my investigation, and they will do whatever it takes to defeat me in November and end my inquiry into the Biden Family's corruption racket and cover-up. I'm asking everyone who reads this memo to stand with me today as my 2024 campaign kicks off in earnest. We must show national Democrats that our campaign is strong enough to weather anything... _or this campaign could get really rough for me in the fall._ If you're able, I'd love to have your renewed support. Thank you for everything, James Comer
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fb1396be3a9143f798d3cc7e37177a09&_e=eqk0iqDbL9_O9wBSWxnSHsjPt6kVVzIx3UNdv5z7dvHe4StLXR6maU6dh2X_n4WlV7At-9NbxzjR9hVLhWW3Tjpn5KyBkQuwD5_GNU5ku6-9Xv29VxBvANUyl36QPufKX7cm9exn62NimKBRGbcSjnofNadxrCz56evUq8XCaytSxWW33eZ_zAu6WIeCNRz4A2VfyZWti2-lSVAFsaOu5yc0TLhU5EqFAIAWb3IwUAzw8XRQMK8C9E71d3-MactOqzAYCJWio7Q2hOJw7nroN-GiOrG9jBijntSg3UxTEn9SvBSYdDJn7HZP1FMFi-ZA)

The only way that we’re going to defy expectations and defend our House majority is if we have the right people in place leading up to November. _**[For us to be successful, that means we need conservatives like YOU on our team.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=924641ce9d154eb484876e9ab59ed0bc&_e=7Hk-kdSKQ-F6H36cj9YhZwXbi9PN7pzeSnavlUnT3Fvh5TuAQK57t2hXDeFrOlEYrhovVMEnonRDZtWZ3GnghiTYhOLaAQ1_zw0ENz7IbT8C0l4AeCbs_zMyTcoS6fC09H8kANRz80TysUBbv2qPSQjjF_3DqblDqkl-Z1tWBTq0rdK9Tr25zrlXznvmqp7gbxNTp9z7YxfZLiM01FMEHyfkGorUC1SUn3oYLTa2kVL3yXhgo5WgnaGWvH_ThEOJxIp7fiZQYHwqk9LyeSbSe2L8SvCNsMfUIReiftKQz11QMpyswpYO_VvEaDM7u22TJ-8nRCuxAfhV0DGMmYPXWlGsKAb9sFke_lWyNZZllU-3D0qj0-FsJhoEc8YhhNWdKzHi3BWk-k19KqieoIm8E-H1JCqW3Ahv6oh5ycfRBXy7rbHXeA_lbK_yIU2rPKGsdfbAi755SIFLdFZAKx_HdpCslrZjGKLMWky0zcucDSXuuFmHGoboWoAXvd2iomzE1Fw2EuUAoMuh7J_RonulZu8Yc7G_V6zUaf4op80pUNE%3D)**_

Fellow Conservative,

Republicans are the only thing stopping President Biden and Chuck Schumer from bankrupting our country.

This isn’t just political hyperbole. It’s as real as it gets!

It’s our Republican majority that allows us to hold them accountable. Without it, we would effectively be relegated to “sitting on the sidelines” and watching as:
* The Biden Administration does nothing to address the growing border crisis,

* **Crime continues to rise, and dangerous drugs pour into our country,**

* The Washington swamp holds critical funds hostage in order to send more untracked American tax dollars to Ukraine, and

* Liberals try to protect their political power by brazenly opposing election integrity measures ... _**even going as far as trying to keep President Trump off the ballot!**_****

But thankfully, our majority acts as a backstop against Democrats running roughshod over our values, our wallets, our country, and our constitution.
**_
But Fellow Conservative,...all that goes away if we lose our majority in November’s election...and I would be lying to you if I told you that wasn’t a real possibility._**

As we head into the most important election in recent memory, our majority has recently shrunk from four to TWO.

**How did this happen?** Over the past couple of months there have been several Republican members of Congress who resigned or retired. Having such a slim majority puts us in a very precarious position going into an election year –and to be honest, we’re in real trouble right now, which is why I’m reaching out today.

It’s anyone’s guess right now as to how things will play out, but if I can tell you one thing it’s this: **if we lose control of the House and fail to retake the Senate, Republicans won’t be able to block Democrats from crushing our economy, diverting taxpayer money to their pet projects or stop them from prosecuting political opponents who dare to speak the truth!**

I’m certain Democrats will have all the money they’ll need in the fight to flip the House. But will Republicans? Democrats will turn in big numbers. That’s why we’re beginning the long, arduous process of identifying conservatives to help us hold onto our slim majority now.

Time is of the essence, and **[we need to know whether you’re on our team.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=924641ce9d154eb484876e9ab59ed0bc&_e=7Hk-kdSKQ-F6H36cj9YhZwXbi9PN7pzeSnavlUnT3Fvh5TuAQK57t2hXDeFrOlEYrhovVMEnonRDZtWZ3GnghiTYhOLaAQ1_zw0ENz7IbT8C0l4AeCbs_zMyTcoS6fC09H8kANRz80TysUBbv2qPSQjjF_3DqblDqkl-Z1tWBTq0rdK9Tr25zrlXznvmqp7gbxNTp9z7YxfZLiM01FMEHyfkGorUC1SUn3oYLTa2kVL3yXhgo5WgnaGWvH_ThEOJxIp7fiZQYHwqk9LyeSbSe2L8SvCNsMfUIReiftKQz11QMpyswpYO_VvEaDM7u22TJ-8nRCuxAfhV0DGMmYPXWlGsKAb9sFke_lWyNZZllU-3D0qj0-FsJhoEc8YhhNWdKzHi3BWk-k19KqieoIm8EzwsfDRes4ctPr2ehm-T2lwc5wPO9hNc8raA0WjKP54iIjSSiX0xyxjRavK9L2MLSkK9P_Qkc491H0F0AwqQGmmr4sOJyLg9vOkLJQlFQtW6EjHUijRr7AAzECDhPgOLYYAsYoNKNbbwwBlb9lJz3WE%3D)**

We hope you will be among the first to **[sign up and signal your commitment](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=924641ce9d154eb484876e9ab59ed0bc&_e=7Hk-kdSKQ-F6H36cj9YhZwXbi9PN7pzeSnavlUnT3Fvh5TuAQK57t2hXDeFrOlEYrhovVMEnonRDZtWZ3GnghiTYhOLaAQ1_zw0ENz7IbT8C0l4AeCbs_zMyTcoS6fC09H8kANRz80TysUBbv2qPSQjjF_3DqblDqkl-Z1tWBTq0rdK9Tr25zrlXznvmqp7gbxNTp9z7YxfZLiM01FMEHyfkGorUC1SUn3oYLTa2kVL3yXhgo5WgnaGWvH_ThEOJxIp7fiZQYHwqk9LyeSbSe2L8SvCNsMfUIReiftKQz11QMpyswpYO_VvEaDM7u22TJ-8nRCuxAfhV0DGMmYPXWlGsKAb9sFke_lWyNZZllU-3D0qj0-FsJhoEc8YhhNWdKzHi3BWk-k19KqieoIm8E-1BYqjJTML1RB4PjTou8gxyd8qY5BnPA1dTGzF_KJiht-797ycLBjGcFtC8rot2E3hD7XS1mMqBuKkacHYF_cREyJdjKsCavVNKgUd3-QHrmrdvOpPYLhqZ9l8FfwpK0U1j127iuNtLx1uDsXLXxoo%3D)** to holding onto our Republican majority in the House.

clean_body: We could lose the House, and I haven't heard from you. This isn’t just political hyperbole. It’s as real as it gets! We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd. Don't want to receive our emails? | HOLD THE HOUSE PETITION: With recent retirements and resignations, our Republican House majority has shrunk from four to two. The only way that we’re going to defy expectations and defend our House majority is if we have the right people in place leading up to November. We’re laying the groundwork now, and that’s why I’m asking for you to sign up to be a member of my 2024 House Majority Taskforce. . Fellow Conservative, Republicans are the only thing stopping President Biden and Chuck Schumer from bankrupting our country. This isn’t just political hyperbole. It’s as real as it gets! It’s our Republican majority that allows us to hold them accountable. Without it, we would effectively be relegated to “sitting on the sidelines” and watching as: The Biden Administration does nothing to address the growing border crisis, Crime continues to rise, and dangerous drugs pour into our country, The Washington swamp holds critical funds hostage in order to send more untracked American tax dollars to Ukraine, and Liberals try to protect their political power by brazenly opposing election integrity measures ... even going as far as trying to keep President Trump off the ballot!** But thankfully, our majority acts as a backstop against Democrats running roughshod over our values, our wallets, our country, and our constitution. But Fellow Conservative,...all that goes away if we lose our majority in November’s election...and I would be lying to you if I told you that wasn’t a real possibility. As we head into the most important election in recent memory, our majority has recently shrunk from four to TWO. How did this happen? Over the past couple of months there have been several Republican members of Congress who resigned or retired. Having such a slim majority puts us in a very precarious position going into an election year –and to be honest, we’re in real trouble right now, which is why I’m reaching out today. It’s anyone’s guess right now as to how things will play out, but if I can tell you one thing it’s this: if we lose control of the House and fail to retake the Senate, Republicans won’t be able to block Democrats from crushing our economy, diverting taxpayer money to their pet projects or stop them from prosecuting political opponents who dare to speak the truth! I’m certain Democrats will have all the money they’ll need in the fight to flip the House. But will Republicans? Democrats will turn in big numbers. That’s why we’re beginning the long, arduous process of identifying conservatives to help us hold onto our slim majority now. Time is of the essence, and We hope you will be among the first to ** to holding onto our Republican majority in the House. For Liberty, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77918325/451880110/-1849040369?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.01.28_B1_EOM1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM3MGFmNDktMTliZS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=08429g5aCGS7J4OXCTq-8sX5Unbpu10NQA4C1JNXGpk=) Peter, sorry to be bothering you on a Sunday, but this couldn't wait. At the start of each month, my finance team and I get together to go over fundraising progress and set projections. This month, we set our sights higher as it's the first of 2024, making it critical that we have a strong showing. Now, **we're falling behind on projections,** so I'm launching a $15,000 end-of-month goal to help us keep pace. [**Do you think you could take a moment to chip in any amount you can to help us reach our goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77918326/451880111/-1849040369?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.01.28_B1_EOM1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM3MGFmNDktMTliZS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=08429g5aCGS7J4OXCTq-8sX5Unbpu10NQA4C1JNXGpk=) [CHIP IN →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77918327/451880112/-1849040369?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.01.28_B1_EOM1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM3MGFmNDktMTliZS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=08429g5aCGS7J4OXCTq-8sX5Unbpu10NQA4C1JNXGpk=) This end-of-month goal is a must-reach for our campaign, not just to hit projections, but to ensure that we're staying even with Nancy Mace's mega-donors and cash from DC insiders. clean_body: | = Peter, sorry to be bothering you on a Sunday, but this couldn't wait. At the start of each month, my finance team and I get together to go over fundraising progress and set projections. This month, we set our sights higher as it's the first of 2024, making it critical that we have a strong showing. Now, we're falling behind on projections, so I'm launching a $15,000 end-of-month goal to help us keep pace. = = This end-of-month goal is a must-reach for our campaign, not just to hit projections, but to ensure that we're staying even with Nancy Mace's mega-donors and cash from DC insiders. Nancy is in a rush to raise as much as she possibly can (see her constant television appearances) because she knows just how strong our campaign is. She and the GOP are terrified that we're going to win this election and be the seat that takes back the House Majority. I know we can pull off this win, Peter, but it starts with reaching this goal. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for reading, \- Michael = | | Paid for by Michael B. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A January I won’t forget
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
If we’re going to beat Kari Lake at the voting booth this November, we need to beat her fundraising every single month.
#

What a month, Peter.
We put out our 2023 FEC numbers earlier this month and put Kari Lake to shame.
We remembered the anniversary of January 6th.
We celebrated the one year anniversary of launching this campaign together.
And today we are starting the fundraising drive to our end-of-month deadline on January 31st.
This is the first major fundraising deadline of the year, and we need it to be a big one. Because if we’re going to beat Kari Lake at the voting booth this November, we need to beat her fundraising every single month of the year.
We need to raise enough resources to fight off anything that comes our way — and with an opponent like Kari Lake, there’s no telling what that might be.
[**To do that, we need you to make your first online donation. Make it for $3, make it for whatever you can. But please, just make that donation.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240128-2-120-t3&t=1&akid=1880%2E734936%2EBduoZR)

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: It's important that we hear from you soon, Peter -- it's about your membership
body:
For a limited time, your support goes three times as far.

MEMBERSHIP DRIVE 2024
TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE

Peter - we're following up as part of our annual Membership Drive.

Your membership matters. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_ LCV's annual Membership Drive determines the resources we have, and how hard we can fight for our environment and democracy, throughout the year. That's why it's so important that we hear from you.

Your support is critical right now. House Republicans led by "MAGA Mike" Johnson are conspiring to shut down important parts of the federal government in order to force through new oil and gas drilling on public lands, among other attacks on our environment and communities. Their proposals would gut clean energy investments and end almost all attempts to address environmental injustice. They would slash EPA's enforcement and public health protections, which would lead to dirtier air and water.

Our movement is what's stopping polluters and fossil fuel companies from getting their way - but we need more resources to keep our campaigns going in this critical election year.

The best thing you can do right now is to help fund our hard-hitting environmental campaigns. Renew your LCV membership today. For a limited time, every contribution will be TRIPLE MATCHED. Even $5 can make a difference >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/9zEZM8vq7~

---
League of Conservation Voters
2024 Membership Drive

Supporter Record: Peter Willis
Match Status: TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE https://links.messages.lcv.

Deadline: 11:59 pm, January 31, 2024
Fundraising Goal: $50,000

Member Status: Renew your membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.
---

Right now, we're fighting on multiple fronts for healthier communities and a better future for our planet. We can't afford to lose ANY of these fights. Here are just a few reasons to support LCV's work for the environment this year:
- Because MAGA Republicans are pushing even harder to slash clean energy investments, zero out funding for environmental justice, cut clean air and water enforcement, and mandate more dirty drilling leases. LCV is organizing quickly to mobilize grassroots pressure on Congress to reject reckless anti-environment proposals. But at the end of the day, the impact we can have will depend on our members. https://links.messages.lcv.
- Because anti-environment legislators are trying to stop important protections for the Arctic. Republicans' extreme legislation would put the Arctic at risk of more oil and gas drilling and threaten species like caribou. The environmental movement CANNOT sit this fight out. We need you, Peter. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/WabwQxjY_0C_
- Because LCV is campaigning hard for the Biden administration to propose new protections that reduce pollution and promote healthy communities. We have a real chance to pressure the White House to go big for the sake of our climate and our health. Your support makes that happen. Renew your membership today >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/YYbZByD-
- Because a group of donors is triple-matching every contribution this month. Bottom line, your contribution goes further to win environmental progress if you give now. Triple your impact now >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/gryxfjb~

It's important that we hear from you, Peter. Please, renew your LCV membership for just $5 today while it will be triple matched >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_

Onward,

LCV Membership Team

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10517298&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkwMDUxNzU5OAS2&spReportId=MTkwMDUxNzU5OAS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10517298&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkwMDUxNzU5OAS2&spReportId=MTkwMDUxNzU5OAS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683
https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ecw~

Hi folks, I have a personal request this afternoon: **[Can you chip in $20 or more to my campaign today? I’ll explain why I’m asking in a moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77919047/451881399/1042890097?amount=20&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240128_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTUzYTUxNC0xY2JlLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4x3ZD3VWOHsX8OOX9sJVGcdbewSsuZrRDaTAYduWLsY=)** | ****[CHIP IN $20](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77919048/451881400/-1000696272?amount=20&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240128_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTUzYTUxNC0xY2JlLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4x3ZD3VWOHsX8OOX9sJVGcdbewSsuZrRDaTAYduWLsY=)****

Listen, my top priorities in Congress are simple: working across the aisle to pass commonsense legislation to help move communities across our country forward.
In Congress, I’m fighting every day to protect and expand our healthcare, improve access and funding for public education, increase economic opportunity, and more — all while putting the families in IL-13 first.
I want to make sure that our seniors do not live in poverty or with a lack of economic security, and I want to protect Social Security for the next generation.
Folks in Central and Southern Illinois and across the country have made it clear that they are ready for changes like these.
They want a representative who will work for them and prioritize getting things done.
They’re sick and tired of the partisan bickering in Washington that only serves to further divide us.
Working together, we can protect our healthcare, expand our economic opportunity, and ensure a better future for all.
I’m more fired up than ever to continue getting things done in Washington — but I need your help to make that a reality.
**[I’m humbly asking for your support today. Can I count on you to help keep my campaign running by chipping in before Wednesday’s end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77919050/451881401/1042890097?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240128_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTUzYTUxNC0xY2JlLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4x3ZD3VWOHsX8OOX9sJVGcdbewSsuZrRDaTAYduWLsY=)**

clean_body: | Hi folks, I have a personal request this afternoon: = | **= Listen, my top priorities in Congress are simple: working across the aisle to pass commonsense legislation to help move communities across our country forward. In Congress, I’m fighting every day to protect and expand our healthcare, improve access and funding for public education, increase economic opportunity, and more — all while putting the families in IL-13 first. I want to make sure that our seniors do not live in poverty or with a lack of economic security, and I want to protect Social Security for the next generation. Folks in Central and Southern Illinois and across the country have made it clear that they are ready for changes like these. They want a representative who will work for them and prioritize getting things done. They’re sick and tired of the partisan bickering in Washington that only serves to further divide us. Working together, we can protect our healthcare, expand our economic opportunity, and ensure a better future for all. I’m more fired up than ever to continue getting things done in Washington — but I need your help to make that a reality. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ** **= | = ** **= | = ** **= ** Thank you for always standing with me. — Nikki ** ** **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

body:
It’s time for Congress to get to work for Oregon families.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77920395/451882867/476240478?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.27_b1_tb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzlhMGVlMjctMWZiZS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7cjh0wT_dD_1h5aK37itzF5yiMe2XJ3Bc6zncdbsGCk=)
Friend, It’s been just over a year since Republicans took over the House Majority and since then, it’s been the _**least productive Congress in decades**_. Instead of addressing the critical issues facing working families, the chaos and dysfunction in Washington has brought Congress to a standstill. But while Members of Congress stall progress in D.C., **countless families in our community are still struggling to make ends meet**. These days, it feels nearly impossible to get ahead. That’s why it’s more important than ever for our leaders to work to create good jobs, support small businesses, and bring down the high cost of living. I’m running for Congress because I believe we deserve better, friend. If we haven’t already met, I’m the Finance Director for Raul Ruiz for Congress. **Can I show you something real quick?** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77920729/451883430/-686654137?amount=10&refcode=RRFC_20240128_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjYyOGNhNDUtMjBiZS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eS97cgOPfD6R7DG5LKYemdzCcVwlG9_BVjVmI0rwD5w=) **Those are our real time fundraising numbers.** And I have to be honest, friend – _they’re starting to worry me._

Right now, we’re nowhere close to our **[$15,000 pre-primary goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77920730/451883431/-686654137?amount=10&refcode=RRFC_20240128_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjYyOGNhNDUtMjBiZS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eS97cgOPfD6R7DG5LKYemdzCcVwlG9_BVjVmI0rwD5w=)** , and to make things even worse, we’re alarmingly off-track in our fight to reach it.

**I’ll cut to the chase, team:** Without your support, we’ll be forced to make dramatic cutbacks on the critical campaign resources, and we’ll jeopardize our ability to defend this critical blue seat.

**[So I’m counting on you here! If you’re with us in the fight to take back the House, will you chip in just $10? name: Emma via Team Andrei
subject: Let's talk about yard signs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona** | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U
body:
Yard signs are an essential and expensive part of running any political campaign. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77920817/451883560/-1448738720?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240128_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkZWYzNjktMjBiZS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AFmA5cjK-BTYe4-dcXy-xIKWeiovLvR6W62mgSYitNM=)
---
Hi Peter, Andrei’s campaign manager, Emma, here! Yard signs are an essential and _expensive_ part of running any political campaign. This is especially true in a state like Arizona, where we can’t have volunteers standing outside all day in the heat. Yard signs are a proven way to get the word out about Andrei’s people-powered campaign across our district. **Andrei’s campaign isn’t taking a dime from corporate PACs, so we’re counting on your grassroots support to help us fund our first order of yard signs.[Peter, will you chip in $25 or more ahead of the end of the month to help us fill the district with Andrei Cherny for Congress yard signs? The more we raise from emails like this, the more yard signs we can order for AZ-01.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77920818/451883568/-677050522?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240128_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkZWYzNjktMjBiZS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AFmA5cjK-BTYe4-dcXy-xIKWeiovLvR6W62mgSYitNM=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77920819/451883576/-677050522?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240128_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkZWYzNjktMjBiZS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AFmA5cjK-BTYe4-dcXy-xIKWeiovLvR6W62mgSYitNM=)
---
It’s not an exaggeration to say that yard signs can help make or break a campaign.
Increasing name recognition is a big part of beating an incumbent, and it’s what we’re planning to do with Andrei’s name, one yard sign at a time, to defeat extremist Republican David Schweikert.
Any amount you’re able to give today will help us order yard signs for our neighbors in AZ-01. [**Will you pitch in today to help cover the cost of yard signs?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77920820/451883583/-677050522?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240128_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkZWYzNjktMjBiZS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AFmA5cjK-BTYe4-dcXy-xIKWeiovLvR6W62mgSYitNM=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Yard signs are an essential and expensive part of running any political campaign. | = Hi Peter, Andrei’s campaign manager, Emma, here! Yard signs are an essential and expensive part of running any political campaign. This is especially true in a state like Arizona, where we can’t have volunteers standing outside all day in the heat. Yard signs are a proven way to get the word out about Andrei’s people-powered campaign across our district. Andrei’s campaign isn’t taking a dime from corporate PACs, so we’re counting on your grassroots support to help us fund our first order of yard signs.= | = It’s not an exaggeration to say that yard signs can help make or break a campaign. Increasing name recognition is a big part of beating an incumbent, and it’s what we’re planning to do with Andrei’s name, one yard sign at a time, to defeat extremist Republican David Schweikert. Any amount you’re able to give today will help us order yard signs for our neighbors in AZ-01. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, and enjoy the rest of your Sunday! Emma Campaign Manager, Andrei for Arizona Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States ** | mailto:info@andreiforarizona.com | Paid for by Andrei for Arizona | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U.S. Navy Reserves. subject: There’s too much at stake.

body:
Let’s break it down.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77920958/451884048/1328794144?refcode=ea.13bdb992-20be-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.13bdb992-20be-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzYmRiOTkyLTIwYmUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=m1BzrtcSW3e10wOecP6ae31vdSa9GExIOhoiAKFAgTg=&emci=17ab1a8c-20be-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=13bdb992-20be-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4823105)
---
Friend — we’re in a critical moment for our planet, and the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is right at the forefront of this battle. **Our Mission:** To elect leaders up and down the ballot who will fearlessly confront the fossil fuel industry and champion our planet. **Why This Matters:** The fossil fuel industry has had a stranglehold on our government for far too long. Despite the urgency of the climate crisis and the overwhelming public support for green policies, we've seen time and again how powerful fossil fuel interests block progress. That's where we step in. Jane PAC is dedicated to breaking this stranglehold by supporting candidates who prioritize the planet over profit. Period. **Our Achievements:** Your support has so far helped elect climate champions across the country — from school boards to city councils, all the way up to the halls of Congress. They're making a real difference, but we need more like them in 2024 (and beyond). **_[To continue our momentum, we set a goal to raise $25,000 by January 31st. And your contribution can make a huge difference. clean_body: Let’s break it down. | Friend — we’re in a critical moment for our planet, and the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is right at the forefront of this battle. Our Mission: To elect leaders up and down the ballot who will fearlessly confront the fossil fuel industry and champion our planet. Why This Matters: The fossil fuel industry has had a stranglehold on our government for far too long. Despite the urgency of the climate crisis and the overwhelming public support for green policies, we've seen time and again how powerful fossil fuel interests block progress. That's where we step in. Jane PAC is dedicated to breaking this stranglehold by supporting candidates who prioritize the planet over profit. Period. Our Achievements: Your support has so far helped elect climate champions across the country — from school boards to city councils, all the way up to the halls of Congress. clean_body: | | | Lawless Republican governors like Greg Abbott are harming the nation. Not one, not two, but twenty-five Republican governors are supporting GOP Gov. Greg Abbott's blatant defiance of the U.S. Supreme Court and our Constitution. Gov. Abbott, who said the state isn't shooting people who illegally cross the border because the Biden administration would charge officials with murder, is now refusing to comply with the Supreme Court’s order to remove deadly razor wire installed along the United States-Mexico border. Friend, make no mistake, cruelty is the point. **** | Earlier this month, at Abbott’s direction, Texas troops prevented border agents from responding as a mother and her two children drowned in the Rio Grande as they tried to make their way across the border. Republicans are too afraid to stand up to Trump, so at his directive, they have walked away from immigration legislation that could address the immigration situation at our southern border. These cowards are undermining our democracy and decency. The Texas governor is now invoking the same legal theory that slave states used to justify secession before the Civil War. Abbott's abhorrent policies and defiance pose the biggest threat to federal authority since the South's 'massive resistance' to the Supreme Court's integration ruling in the 1950s and '60s. **** ****We’ll say it again. Cruelty is their point. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. body:
We simply cannot afford to let the GOP gain control of the Senate
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77921588/451885326/-862660935?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4766-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzQ2ODRhYi0yMWJlLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yvROMBcsIZs94vUgwKzY3UwynenYHEIo7w4beUgOGlg=)
Friend, it's Gov. Gavin Newsom. I'm fighting every day to win progress for families here in California. But to move our entire country forward and defeat the GOP extremists who are pushing us backward, we _need_ a strong Democratic majority in the Senate.
The truth is, I'm seriously concerned that we're about to hand control of the Senate to Mitch McConnell. **That's why I'm reaching out today to personally ask you to make a donation to help my friend Kirsten Gillibrand defend her must-win Senate seat. [_Please, will you donate now to help Kirsten save our Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77921589/451885327/-862660935?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4766-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzQ2ODRhYi0yMWJlLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yvROMBcsIZs94vUgwKzY3UwynenYHEIo7w4beUgOGlg=)**
If you've read almost anything about the 2024 elections, you know that Senate Democrats are facing an uphill battle.
**We have to defend a massive 23 seats across the country this fall — nearly half of the entire Democratic caucus. _Republicans, on the other hand, only have to defend 11._** Our resources are going to be spread incredibly thin. That alone puts us at a massive fundraising disadvantage — not to mention the GOP's army of megadonors waiting in the wings. It's no wonder why election experts have called the Senate map a "GOP dream."
Listen, if Republicans retake power, everything that we care about will be at risk. We already know that key leaders within the GOP want to ban abortion nationwide, cut Social Security and Medicare, undo critical gun safety reforms, give ultra-wealthy Americans another massive tax break, and weaken our democracy even further. _And that's only what they've admitted out loud._
We simply cannot afford to let the GOP gain control of the Senate. But Kirsten is facing a tough battle. **Some might think New York is a safe blue state, but in 2022, Republicans nearly flipped the governorship in a damaging red wave. Now, following their best election cycle in decades, Republicans have their sights set on Kirsten's vital Senate seat.**
Friend, Kirsten isn't just my friend — she's a relentless leader for progress. We need her voice in the Senate.**And if she were to lose, it would almost certainly hand control of the Senate to Mitch McConnell.** **[_So please, will you rush a donation right now to power Kirsten's grassroots campaign and defend our Democratic Senate majority? I'm really counting on your support here._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77921590/451885328/-862660935?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4766-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzQ2ODRhYi0yMWJlLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yvROMBcsIZs94vUgwKzY3UwynenYHEIo7w4beUgOGlg=)**

As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. name: Katie Porter HQ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Our average contribution this month is just $26–so every donation makes a difference.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37007%2E3422442%2EKjGfxO)
Derek, there are three things we need you to know right now.
1) **Katie is currently being outspent 8:1 on TV ads**. Our opponent has spent more than $16M on TV ads across the state, and we’re still six weeks from the election. We’re at risk of being drowned out on the airwaves.
2) **Katie is the only candidate in this race who has never taken a dime from corporate PACs,** and will truly stand up to the corporate interests that run Washington.
3) **Because of California’s “jungle primary” system, the top two candidates, regardless of party, will advance from the Primary to the General Election**. Katie is at risk of being kept out of the general because a celebrity Republican is surging in the polls.
We won’t B.S. you, we’re being heavily outspent so we need your financial support. Our average contribution this month is just $26–so every donation makes a difference.
**[Will you contribute $5 right now to help us reach our critical $275,000 end of month fundraising goal so we can keep Katie’s voice in Congress?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240128-2?refcode=em20240128-37007&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37007_3422442_KjGfxO&akid=37007%2E3422442%2EKjGfxO)**
Imagine Congress without Katie or her whiteboard holding corporations accountable. We can’t lose Katie’s voice.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240128-2?refcode=em20240128-37007&refcode2=37007_3422442_KjGfxO&akid=37007%2E3422442%2EKjGfxO)
As always, thank you so much for your support,
Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. clean_body: Our average contribution this month is just $26–so every donation makes a difference. Derek, there are three things we need you to know right now. 1) Katie is currently being outspent 8:1 on TV ads. Our opponent has spent more than $16M on TV ads across the state, and we’re still six weeks from the election. We’re at risk of being drowned out on the airwaves. 2) Katie is the only candidate in this race who has never taken a dime from corporate PACs, and will truly stand up to the corporate interests that run Washington. 3) Because of California’s “jungle primary” system, the top two candidates, regardless of party, will advance from the Primary to the General Election. Katie is at risk of being kept out of the general because a celebrity Republican is surging in the polls. We won’t B.S. you, we’re being heavily outspent so we need your financial support. Our average contribution this month is just $26–so every donation makes a difference. Imagine Congress without Katie or her whiteboard holding corporations accountable. We can’t lose Katie’s voice. As always, thank you so much for your support, Team Porter Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Russian collusion
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5245%2E5257348%2EFZ-ZEr ]Adam Schiff for Senate

I’ve been called “shifty Schiff,” “pencil neck,” a “scum socialist,” and a
whole lot worse,
Derek.

And on Monday night, in the U.S. Senate debate, Republican Steve Garvey
called me a liar for investigating the connections between Trump’s
presidential campaign and the Russian government. And now Garvey is
appearing on Fox, echoing the same smears.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240128_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1004&akid=5245%2E5257348%2EFZ-ZEr ]I need your help to make sure we set the record straight, stand up to
Steve Garvey’s false smears, and reach undecided voters in California
before they head to the polls. Please chip in
$10 or any
amount you can spare today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240128_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1009&akid=5245%2E5257348%2EFZ-ZEr ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240128_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=5245%2E5257348%2EFZ-ZEr ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Steve Garvey voted for Donald Trump twice. He even called him the best
person for the job. And he is blowing a whole bunch of dog whistles for
the MAGA crowd, even as he pretends to be a moderate.

No wonder he’s squawking MAGA talking points, calling me a liar, and
supporting the hyper-partisan censure vote against me last year.

When I was Chairman of the House Intelligence Committee, our investigation
and Special Counsel Bob Mueller’s revealed that Trump’s campaign chairman,
Paul Manafort, was giving internal campaign polling data to Russian
intelligence while Russian intelligence was helping their campaign,
including in key states.

We found that the Russians offered “dirt” on Hillary Clinton — in writing
— as part of what the Russians described as their government’s effort to
help the Trump campaign, and that the Trump campaign said they would love
the help, even arranging a secret meeting with the Russians in Trump
Tower. Not long after, the Russians started dumping stolen emails to hurt
the Clinton campaign.

To anyone other than Donald Trump — and apparently Steve Garvey — that is
the very definition of collusion. But to them, I guess, they would just
call it good old-fashioned cheating with the enemy.

Given that I am on the same ballot as Donald Trump on March 5, and
Republicans will be turning out in droves to support him and Republican
Steve Garvey, I need to make sure we’re reaching the undecided voters of
California.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240128_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1011&akid=5245%2E5257348%2EFZ-ZEr ]Please pitch in
$10 to
help us respond to Garvey’s attacks on my record. With two more Senate
debates next month, who knows what other attacks he’ll throw my way.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240128_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1012&akid=5245%2E5257348%2EFZ-ZEr ]EXPRESS DONATE

$250

I don’t let the insults get to me,

— Adam

clean_body: | = I will get right to it, Peter: Recent polling shows that we are ahead of our likely Republican opponent Scott Baugh! = We have a narrow one-point lead on Baugh, and when voters learn about my vision for Orange County, our lead skyrockets to 14-points. Experts at the Cook Political Report have ranked our toss-up race as one of the most competitive in the entire country – which means the outcome in CA-47 very well could tip the scales when it comes to who controls the House majority. This is encouraging news, but there are still thousands of undecided voters in CA-47 we need to reach before our fast-approaching March primary in less than six weeks. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = In unity, Joanna =** | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! Peter, when I talk to folks about this race for Senate, I often hear questions like **“How can a Democrat even win in Tennessee?”** _Here’s what I tell them:_ Marsha Blackburn has turned her back on Tennessee women, betrayed families devastated by gun violence, and ignored the needs of our communities for far too long. It’s time to hold her accountable. **We’ll defeat MAGA Marsha Blackburn by building a multi-generational, multi-racial, multi-party coalition like nothing this state has seen before.** Look, I know that _everything_ has to go right for us to defeat my radical opponent. That starts by building a grassroots movement with YOUR support. Because our state is worth fighting for, and we’re in this race to win. _Here’s what I need:_ **the financial power to take on the corporate-PAC and mega-donor squad bankrolling Marsha’s campaign.** I’m counting on a groundswell of grassroots support in the next 3 days to hit our January fundraising goal. The last time I checked, it didn’t look like we were on track to hit that $200,000 target — but I’m betting we can step things up before my finance team gets back to the office tomorrow. **[Peter, I need you to donate at least $25 NOW to close the gap before January ends. | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

[There’s a movement afoot for change — join us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77922477/451886425/-849459103?refcode=ea.fd11c476-24be-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.fd11c476-24be-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDExYzQ3Ni0yNGJlLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QIyMXNymEbGjd8pODxIWG23aQbtxwwLeD5UlOL0ViUY=&emci=323549e5-9abc-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=fd11c476-24be-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=46764483) | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77922478/451886426/209297649?amount=25&refcode=ea.fd11c476-24be-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.fd11c476-24be-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDExYzQ3Ni0yNGJlLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QIyMXNymEbGjd8pODxIWG23aQbtxwwLeD5UlOL0ViUY=)

clean_body: Sorry to bug you on a Sunday. | Peter, when I talk to folks about this race for Senate, I often hear questions like “How can a Democrat even win in Tennessee?” Here’s what I tell them: Marsha Blackburn has turned her back on Tennessee women, betrayed families devastated by gun violence, and ignored the needs of our communities for far too long. It’s time to hold her accountable. We’ll defeat MAGA Marsha Blackburn by building a multi-generational, multi-racial, multi-party coalition like nothing this state has seen before. Look, I know that everything has to go right for us to defeat my radical opponent. That starts by building a grassroots movement with YOUR support. Because our state is worth fighting for, and we’re in this race to win. Here’s what I need: the financial power to take on the corporate-PAC and mega-donor squad bankrolling Marsha’s campaign. I’m counting on a groundswell of grassroots support in the next 3 days to hit our January fundraising goal. The last time I checked, it didn’t look like we were on track to hit that $200,000 target — but I’m betting we can step things up before my finance team gets back to the office tomorrow. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, Gloria = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Jon Tester
subject: brutal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| I need to be brutally honest, folks, we’re just not on track.

[**So in a minute, I’ll ask you to pitch in a split donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help us reach our first end-of-month goal of 2024.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60481?t=6&akid=12615%2E878179%2ETLzSB_) But first, let me explain why I even have to ask. | [BECOME A 2024 FOUNDING DONOR »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60481?t=7&akid=12615%2E878179%2ETLzSB_)
---
I’m reaching out today because fundraising is a necessary part of running a grassroots campaign, **and this is our first monthly deadline of 2024.**

In short, if we don’t hit this goal, national Republicans will think this seat is ripe for the taking and could increase their spending tenfold. That means more misinformation, baseless attacks, and dark money will flood our state.

With all of this in mind, I hope you don’t mind when I ask:

[**Will you split a donation between my reelection campaign and the Voter Protection Project today so we can close the gap on this critical deadline and show my opponents that this team means business? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60481?t=8&akid=12615%2E878179%2ETLzSB_)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60482?t=9&akid=12615%2E878179%2ETLzSB_)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60483?t=10&akid=12615%2E878179%2ETLzSB_)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60484?t=11&akid=12615%2E878179%2ETLzSB_)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60485?t=12&akid=12615%2E878179%2ETLzSB_)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60486?t=13&akid=12615%2E878179%2ETLzSB_)
Every dollar you give brings us one step closer to winning this thing come Election Day.

Thanks for whatever you’re able to pitch in,

Jon
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12615%2E878179%2ETLzSB_). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12615%2E878179%2ETLzSB_).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12615%2E878179%2ETLzSB_) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=12615%2E878179%2ETLzSB_). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=12615%2E878179%2ETLzSB_)

The GOP needs to flip AT LEAST two seats this November to take back control. Otherwise, the Left could remain in the Majority for the NEXT DECADE. There's no time to wait, friend. Our candidates need financial support RIGHT NOW if we want ANY SHOT at wrangling back power from Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. ****************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** At this point in the election cycle, even though RIGHT NOW is when your contribution would have the GREATEST IMPACT. So trust and believe when I tell you: _I'm the best candidate to combat their extremism, because I've done it before._

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District. We hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and The Collective PAC. Peter, Harry Dunn here. I don't want to take too much of your time, so I'll make this quick: I looked insurrectionists like Trump in the eye on January 6th and fought for our democracy. I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of that day while I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: I'm the best candidate to combat their extremism, because I've done it before. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Harry Dunn and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | -Harry The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Peter -- we just found out some _scary details about my MAGA opponent_ in my upcoming **March 5th** primary election.

My MAGA opponent wants to:
\- _**Defund**_ the EPA
\- _**Defund**_ the CDC
\- _**Defund**_ the IRA
\- _**Defund**_ the FBI, CIA, and more!

In fact, here’s him with a couple of his greatest heroes just last month! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77927316/451890859/314310606?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20240128_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTlkOTAxMS0yZmJlLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wca8xevtfwo2jHwpgg4p88mPM1h_6kKwzSKJ37I3ms0=) Peter, if this guy wins, he’ll be just another MAGA rubber stamp – prioritizing chaos and extremism over the good of the people. That’s why we have to fight back.

So right now, I’m counting on this grassroots army once again.

name: Stop AIPAC via Our Revolution
subject: Bernie started this and we have to keep it going
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14280?t=1011?refcode=email-20240128&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

AIPAC, a right-wing special interest group that supports insurrectionists
and corporate Democrats, is going to spend $100 million this election year
against progressives who criticized Israel’s relentless bombing campaigns
against the Palestinian people in Gaza.

This is an existential political fight between pro-Peace progressives and
right-wing special interests.

We don’t need $100 million, but we do need $12,478 to hit our monthly goal
in order to defend progressives from corporate, right-wing special
interests in 2024.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14280?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240128&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]Chip in today to directly support our work to defend and expand the
progressive caucus against $100,000,000 of AIPAC spending. Every dollar
raised today will go towards our end-of-month goal — and we can only raise
these funds with your help.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14280?t=1035?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240128&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14280?t=1036?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240128&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]CHIP IN $27
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14280?t=1037?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=email-20240128&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]CHIP IN $35 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14280?t=1038?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=email-20240128&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]CHIP IN $50
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14280?t=1039?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email-20240128&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]CHIP IN $100 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14280?t=1040?&amount=12&refcode=email-20240128&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

It’s not an exaggeration to say this is an existential fight for pro-Peace
progressives. $100 million is A LOT of money. And just look at this
headline in Slate from the end of 2023:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14281?t=1052&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ][IMG]

AIPAC-aligned groups like the Democratic Majority for Israel planted the
flag in this fight when they spent millions to stop Bernie Sanders in the
2020 Democratic presidential primary. And these right-wing groups are only
ramping up their spending.

Spending against progressives in the 2022 Democratic primaries shot up as
AIPAC started a new Super PAC called the United Democracy Project. Don’t
let the name fool you, the very antidemocratic Super PAC targeted
progressives with millions, overwhelming some progressive candidates.

But we contended with that big money to elect NINE new progressives to
Congress. Even with a shoestring budget, when we have the people power to
organize, we can win.

Now, AIPAC is ramping up its spending to $100 million all to go against
Bernie and other progressives because of their support for Palestinian
human rights, conditioning aid to Israel, and calls for peace in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14280?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240128&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]We don’t need $100 million, we just need you. We make every dollar count
and your contribution today will go a long way to fuel Our Revolution’s
work in 2024 to elect and re-elect progressives. Can you chip in towards
our end-of-month $12,478 goal to make sure we can do the organizing we
need to win?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1007&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13136?t=1009&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13139?t=1010&akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF ]GIVE ONCE

http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=5265%2E5885482%2ERzDwmF

| [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=72cfd26ff7c54b6aa7fe0af5108a5b96&_e=ZpYGQ5uWECKGLk34KgL4BIx7Sq5tR-1cUEhhIW-MBD1kqY2nSHkIn6hs24BLlB3l__Iu3ZT82ECFTHJDf2Jtvaj6bfmPwyzBuSGRutHRyK4zOIisPHIjrJFeJUf6OVTsOMusMID0Oj1UwfP8p8SNxVImeeNFld8d8wc3CTHqnfisKS6UFUMpdzzsr7mvB1rm-C1lWM_ujEGUQt7sUAKbwuZMGw9hcWw3LESBBoGk7fye0d1NN13FRjFyLEA_ZDPX5PnDATBW4e8JPhIQ4-Og29NYBcMeMIVpioL8rjjCZnBduWB5kwG3kPmvwpjfUcES)

Friend,

**I hate to break the bad news,_but this race could be a toss-up._**

[**I need your help.**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=72cfd26ff7c54b6aa7fe0af5108a5b96&_e=ZpYGQ5uWECKGLk34KgL4BIx7Sq5tR-1cUEhhIW-MBD1kqY2nSHkIn6hs24BLlB3l__Iu3ZT82ECFTHJDf2Jtvaj6bfmPwyzBuSGRutHRyK4zOIisPHIjrJFeJUf6OVTsavUc81o-ZHxNzmSMthUvJcosU-_DV6XQFlYGxQOhXYdpNr9W-cytxFpf5kPB4tO7ROou0d7r0DfIvpD7M_aI1kLWDnYOd1eRAWj5jm0gRoMMenP-3LczDnf1XCTFrVrfb6KH4kEA5Z6h3jCckp5A1X_p9Mzhp6DO9xgs2UqqhxJErKM_beARnpVKETk46eRT)

[**Now more than ever, I need your help. Can you chip in $25 (or whatever you can) to help me gain the resources I need to take this lead?**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=72cfd26ff7c54b6aa7fe0af5108a5b96&_e=ZpYGQ5uWECKGLk34KgL4BIx7Sq5tR-1cUEhhIW-MBD1kqY2nSHkIn6hs24BLlB3l__Iu3ZT82ECFTHJDf2Jtvaj6bfmPwyzBuSGRutHRyK4zOIisPHIjrJFeJUf6OVTsavUc81o-ZHxNzmSMthUvJcosU-_DV6XQFlYGxQOhXYcvCxmZJmtUpvRc0wbhXuPCW2pWpBXCqK5WoapJyvdJc5hj5yjqzxOfhX3hJjQHFF0xwrrCgtNmOnxtn0Nboy1O-FDMELNbyHjLk11nSqeBOvBqCFiVSq644L-Nu0yd68aKwuVX_IJvWr4tciOZa5li)
[**CHIP IN ANYTHING FOR MY CAMPAIGN**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=72cfd26ff7c54b6aa7fe0af5108a5b96&_e=ZpYGQ5uWECKGLk34KgL4BIx7Sq5tR-1cUEhhIW-MBD1kqY2nSHkIn6hs24BLlB3l__Iu3ZT82ECFTHJDf2Jtvaj6bfmPwyzBuSGRutHRyK4zOIisPHIjrJFeJUf6OVTsavUc81o-ZHxNzmSMthUvJcosU-_DV6XQFlYGxQOhXYcOkvnJ8Bi8N2Evw2FJeYEwqKsBs3AyeMFYzLaRVjUJ1jB5ZC31GcbEWfulHYgM_C79eJaNvNMfH7zgPfB-izXK4wJxlmasFBxAdqHENz0rMpJfVqGeiPk4CFcntY5rNLl8AFDgJSpKkgKzvESV9arA)
The Ohio Senate Primary has never been this close. I’m the only Conservative leader who has any shot of firing Sherrod Brown in November.

**Your support will make the difference between victory and defeat.**

[**Can you chip in RIGHT NOW to help me get back in this race?**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=72cfd26ff7c54b6aa7fe0af5108a5b96&_e=ZpYGQ5uWECKGLk34KgL4BIx7Sq5tR-1cUEhhIW-MBD1kqY2nSHkIn6hs24BLlB3l__Iu3ZT82ECFTHJDf2Jtvaj6bfmPwyzBuSGRutHRyK4zOIisPHIjrJFeJUf6OVTsavUc81o-ZHxNzmSMthUvJcosU-_DV6XQFlYGxQOhXYePqQFUuSalsG9tB_mOYA8XPJL6SWSSqzrVNHLRjZQ-6CKicxngqXJxC4EkedmKnMyU7Y0bQfZnZPXjdVN_bwJoGNFlGs7BmZH6zK0bjKXSDMWIU1nxTXuiQRLc3fxq9CEAZNCLGGAyNdfvnLD5Cmmf)

I have faith that we can win this.

Matt Dolan

clean_body: | Team, Earlier this month when Jason announced his reelection campaign, we asked people a simple question: “Why are you supporting Jason?” The response was overwhelming. Hundreds of folks from across Colorado and the country responded. We filtered your answers to see any trends on why folks are on Team Crow. Here are the results: = Over and over again, our supporters talked about Jason’s integrity in Congress. His work to put country over partisan politics to get things done — and the need to have more of that in Washington, DC. We agree. As a former Army Ranger, Jason is bringing true service leadership to Congress. His time in combat taught him to never back down from a fight, and he’s not going to stop now. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, — Team Crow | Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us? | = Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. body:
Peter, When Donald Trump broke the Blue Wall and nearly flipped Minnesota red in 2016, none of us saw it coming. Now, Trump is back, and Governor Walz is doing everything he can to sound the alarm and make sure he never comes anywhere near the White House ever again.

Peter,
When Donald Trump broke the Blue Wall and nearly flipped Minnesota red in 2016, none of us saw it coming.
Now, Trump is back, and Governor Walz is doing everything he can to sound the alarm and make sure he never comes anywhere near the White House ever again.
With hatred and bigotry on the march across our country like never before, Governor Walz is leading the Democratic Governors Association to fight Trumpism and defend our values up and down the ballot in November. But we have a tough fight ahead of us.
Republicans are outraising Democrats across the country, and polling continues to show Donald Trump and President Biden in a statistical dead heat in Minnesota.
**The bottom line? This election is a fight to defend our democracy, and with our first end-of-month fundraising of the year coming up on Wednesday, we need you with us more than ever.**
**[With three days to go, we’re still trailing our budget target by $13,472. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: With just a little more than 72 hours until the end-of-month deadline, I'm asking for you to get involved today. | | Friend, It’s critical you read this before 10:00 p.m. It’s Jim Jordan with a message about a couple of things I know to be true: 1. We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it 2. Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1 That’s why I’m reaching out today. The stakes are as high now as they were in 2022, yet 40% of our supporters who gave then aren’t giving now. If you can, would you - our average Donation in January - or another amount today? God Bless, Jim Jordan | About Jim Jordan: Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.
